meanings.meaning_cn: 药房；配药学，药剂学；制药业；一批备用药品
meanings.meaning_en: a shop or a part of a shop where medicines are prepared and sold

meanings.meaning_en: laborious

meanings.meaning_cn: 抹去，抹掉；使自己不受人注意
meanings.meaning_en: to destroy or remove something
meanings.example: Nothing can efface the last picture I have of them from my mind.
meanings.example_cn: 没有什么能抹去他们在我脑海中留下的最后印象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 塑料的；（外科）造型的；可塑的
meanings.meaning_en: made of plastic
meanings.example: a plastic spoon
meanings.example_cn: 塑料汤匙

meanings.meaning_en: a light strong material that is produced by a chemical process, and which can be made into different shapes when it is soft
meanings.example: plastic bags
meanings.example_cn: 塑料袋

meanings.meaning_en: public support for a course of action or way of doing things
a large number of things that are scattered somewhere in an untidy way
meanings.example: Could you get rid of some of that clutter in your bedroom?
meanings.example_cn: 你能把你卧室那些杂物清理掉一些吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to cover or fill a space or room with too many things, so that it looks very untidy

meanings.meaning_cn: 职业，专业；声明，宣布，表白
meanings.meaning_en: a job that needs a high level of education and training
meanings.example: people who work in the professions
meanings.example_cn: 从事专业性工作的人

meanings.meaning_cn: 吝啬的；过于节俭的；质量差的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely unwilling to spend money
used to show your approval when someone, especially a performer, has done something very well
meanings.example: Bravo! Encore!
meanings.example_cn: 好极了！ 再来一个！

meanings.meaning_en: used to show your approval when someone, especially a performer, has done something very well
a substance that forms a chemical salt when combined with an acid
meanings.example: The extremely salty, alkali lake holds little life, but its waters are a favorite spot for wading birds.
meanings.example_cn: 其味极咸，碱湖保存了湖中的小生命，但其水域仍为涉水鸟所喜欢的地方。

meanings.example: To get similar characteristics from composites, the carbon fibres are first chemically treated with an alkali which creates lots of tiny pits on their surface.
meanings.example_cn: 为了在复合碳材料上获取与电容器相似的性质，这种碳纤维首先经过碱化学处理以令其表面生成许多细微的凹点。

meanings.meaning_en: to increase the value, amount, effectiveness etc of something
meanings.example: Any surplus was sold to augment their income.
meanings.example_cn: 所有多余的东西被售卖一空来增加他们的收入。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is quarrelsome quarrels a lot with people
meanings.example: He became quarrelsome after drinking too much.
meanings.example_cn: 他喝多了就爱找人吵架。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无责任的；莫名其妙的；不可理解的
meanings.meaning_en: very surprising and difficult to explain
meanings.example: the unaccountable shyness she always felt in Louise’s presence
meanings.example_cn: 她在路易丝面前总是感到的莫名羞涩

meanings.meaning_en: to guess that something is true, using the information you know already
meanings.example: There's so little to go on, we can only surmise what happened.
meanings.example_cn: 几乎没有什么可继续进行的，我们只能猜测发生过的事。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that a particular conclusion is surmise, you mean that it is a guess based on the available evidence and you do not know for certain that it is true
meanings.example: It is mere surmise that Bosch had Brant's poem in mind when doing this painting.
meanings.example_cn: 博斯画这幅画时头脑里想着勃朗特的诗，这只是猜测而已。

meanings.meaning_en: a famous living person
meanings.example: a sporting celebrity
meanings.example_cn: 体育明星

meanings.meaning_en: taking a lot of time and effort
meanings.example: the laborious business of drying the crops
meanings.example_cn: 把收获的庄稼晒干这一艰苦的工作

meanings.meaning_cn: 暴躁的；任性的；难以取悦的
meanings.meaning_en: behaving in an unreasonably impatient and angry way, like a child
meanings.example: His critics say he's just being silly and petulant.
meanings.example_cn: 批评他的人说，他真是又愚蠢又任性。

meanings.meaning_en: to become worse
meanings.example: Inactivity can make your joints stiff, and the bones may begin to degenerate.
meanings.example_cn: 不活动会使关节僵硬，骨骼因此可能会开始退化。

meanings.meaning_en: morally unacceptable
someone whose behaviour is considered to be morally unacceptable
wildly fanciful; imaginary
meanings.example: After exposing several infamous "monopolies" as either chimerical or the product of government privilege, Paterson turns her attention to the putative remedy for monopoly.
meanings.example_cn: 在揭露一些臭名昭著的垄断其实质或者是空想，或者是政府特权的产物后，帕特森把注意力转向了公认对垄断的补救措施上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 斜坡；倾斜；斜率；扛枪姿势
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of ground or a surface that slopes
meanings.example: a steep slope
meanings.example_cn: 陡坡

meanings.meaning_en: if the ground or a surface slopes, it is higher at one end than the other
meanings.example: a gentle
meanings.example_cn: 缓坡

meanings.example: Safety, little scathe on the fabric strength.
meanings.example_cn: 使用安全，对织物强度的损伤极小。

meanings.meaning_en: harm
meanings.example: Results: The general medical conditions mostly were skin parenchyma scathe , infection disease, malnutrition and fracture and so on.
meanings.example_cn: 结果：躯体疾病以皮肤软组织损伤、感染性疾病、营养不良、传染病、骨折等占前几位。

meanings.meaning_en: all people of about the same age
meanings.example: Like most of my generation, I had never known a war.
meanings.example_cn: 和我们这一代的大多数人一样，我并没有经历过战争。

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of soldiers forming part of an army
meanings.example: Snowmobile brigades delivered food and medicine.
meanings.example_cn: 雪车队送来了食物和药品。

meanings.meaning_en: if two things alternate, or if you alternate them, they happen one after the other in a repeated pattern
meanings.example: The two patterns alternate over periods of two to seven years in the tropical Pacific.
meanings.example_cn: 在热带的太平洋地区，这两种现象的交替周期超过了两到七年。

meanings.meaning_en: two alternate things are placed one after the other in a regular pattern
meanings.example: To make the tiger blink, you alternate the transparency between the two areas by locating both the areas and paths in the corresponding XML.
meanings.example_cn: 要让老虎眨眼，可以通过在相应的 XML 中定位这两个区域及其路径来在两个区域间交替透明性。

meanings.meaning_en: An alternate is a person or thing that replaces another, and can act or be used instead of them
meanings.example: In most jurisdictions, twelve jurors and two alternates are chosen.
meanings.example_cn: 在大多数审判中，12名陪审员和2名替补人员会被选出。

meanings.meaning_en: happening every three years

meanings.meaning_cn: 指责，非难；抨击；反驳；对…表示怀疑
meanings.meaning_en: to express doubts about someone’s honesty, courage, ability etc
meanings.example: I did not mean to impugn her professional abilities.
meanings.example_cn: 我并不是怀疑她的专业能力。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument in an aircraft that tells you how high you are
meanings.example: And that is where the altimeter stayed for most of the 14-hour journey.
meanings.example_cn: 在14个小时旅途中的大部分时间里高度计都停留在那个位置。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea or set of ideas that is accepted by most people to be correct and right
meanings.example: He challenged the political orthodoxy of his time.
meanings.example_cn: 他对同时代的正统政治观念提出了质疑。

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid obtained from petroleum, used mainly for producing power in the engines of cars, trucks etc
meanings.example: A gasoline engine drives the motorboat.
meanings.example_cn: 汽油引擎推动汽船。

meanings.meaning_en: something or someone that makes it difficult for you to do something
meanings.example: A degree is more of a hindrance than a help in British industry.
meanings.example_cn: 在英国工业界，学位反倒是个累赘。

meanings.meaning_en: to show your money, success, beauty etc so that other people notice it – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: The rich flaunted their wealth while the poor starved on the streets.
meanings.example_cn: 富人摆阔，穷人却在大街上饿肚子。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific idea that plants and animals develop and change gradually over a long period of time
meanings.example: the theory of evolution
meanings.example_cn: 进化论

meanings.meaning_cn: 通行费；代价；钟声；伤亡人数
meanings.meaning_en: the number of people killed or injured in a particular accident, by a particular illness etc
meanings.example: The death toll has risen to 83.
meanings.example_cn: 死亡人数已上升到83人。

meanings.meaning_en: if a large bell tolls, or if you toll it, it keeps ringing slowly, especially to show that someone has died
meanings.example: The bombings took a heavy toll , killing hundreds of Londoners.
meanings.example_cn: 轰炸造成严重伤亡，有几百名伦敦人丧生。

meanings.meaning_cn: 肯定的；独断的；坚定而自信的
meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a confident way, so that people notice you
meanings.example: Women have become more assertive in the past decade.
meanings.example_cn: 妇女在过去十年已变得更坚定自信。

meanings.meaning_cn: n中值，中位数；三角形中线；梯形中位线
meanings.meaning_en: the middle number or measurement in a set of numbers or measurements that have been arranged in order
meanings.example: The median age of the group is 42.
meanings.example_cn: 该组的中间年龄为42岁。

meanings.meaning_en: being the middle number or measurement in a set of numbers or measurements that have been arranged in order
the salient points or features of something are the most important or most noticeable parts of it
meanings.example: the salient points of the report
meanings.example_cn: 这份报告的要点

meanings.meaning_cn: 建设性的；推定的；构造上的；有助益的
meanings.meaning_en: useful and helpful, or likely to produce good results
meanings.example: The meeting was very constructive.
meanings.example_cn: 这次会议很有建设性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 诅咒；革出教门；被诅咒者；令人厌恶的人
meanings.meaning_en: If something is anathema to you, you strongly dislike it
meanings.example: Violence was anathema to them.
meanings.example_cn: 暴力是他们非常厌恶的事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 倒退的；退化的；次序颠倒的
meanings.meaning_en: involving a return to an earlier and worse situation
meanings.example: The closure of the factories is seen as a retrograde step .
meanings.example_cn: 工厂的关闭被认为是一个退步。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无论什么地方；究竟在哪里
meanings.meaning_en: to or at any place, position, or situation
meanings.example: Children will play wherever they happen to be.
meanings.example_cn: 小孩子走到哪里玩到哪里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无论在哪里；无论什么情况下
meanings.example: Sit wherever you like.
meanings.example_cn: 随便坐吧。

meanings.meaning_en: a man who is effeminate looks or behaves like a woman
meanings.example: ...a skinny, effeminate guy in lipstick and earrings.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个抹口红、戴耳环，骨瘦如柴的娘娘腔男人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使柔弱；使无男子汉气概
变得无男子汉气概；变得柔弱

meanings.meaning_en: involving strong emotions, especially of sexual love
meanings.example: a torrid love affair
meanings.example_cn: 狂热的风流韵事

meanings.meaning_cn: 动态的；动力的；动力学的；有活力的
meanings.meaning_en: continuously moving or changing
meanings.example: a dynamic and unstable process
meanings.example_cn: 不断变化的、不稳定的过程

meanings.meaning_en: something that causes action or change
an occasion when you officially announce that you have decided to leave your job or an organization, or a written statement that says you will be leaving
meanings.example: Illness forced his resignation.
meanings.example_cn: 他不得不因病辞职。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being able to read and write
meanings.example: a new adult literacy campaign
meanings.example_cn: 新一轮成人识字[扫盲]运动

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually become less or weaker before disappearing completely, or to make something do this
meanings.example: As he thought it over, his anger gradually dissipated.
meanings.example_cn: 他想明白后，怒气就渐渐消了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 虚构的，假想的；想像的；虚数的
meanings.meaning_en: not real, but produced from pictures or ideas in your mind
meanings.example: As she listened, she played an imaginary piano on her knees.
meanings.example_cn: 她边听边在膝盖上作弹钢琴状。

meanings.meaning_en: showing that someone has a particular illness
meanings.example: These serve to show that children with mental disorders can not only be treated but can direct some of their symptomatic behavior into positive channels.
meanings.example_cn: 做这些是为了告诉人们，精神疾病患儿不仅是可以治疗的，而且可以将一些症状行为引导到积极的方面上。

meanings.meaning_en: having a clear aim or purpose
meanings.example: a purposeful and consistent foreign policy
meanings.example_cn: 明确而一贯的外交政策

meanings.meaning_en: if a feeling, idea, or smell pervades a place, it is present in every part of it
meanings.example: A spirit of hopelessness pervaded the country.
meanings.example_cn: 一种无望的情绪笼罩着该国。

meanings.meaning_cn: 美的；美学的；审美的，具有审美趣味的
meanings.meaning_en: connected with beauty and the study of beauty
meanings.example: From an esthetic point of view, it’s a nice design.
meanings.example_cn: 从美学角度看，这是个不错的设计。

meanings.meaning_cn: [化学] 腐蚀性的；[化学] 苛性的；刻薄的；焦散的
meanings.meaning_en: a caustic substance can burn through things by chemical action
meanings.example: caustic soda (= a chemical used for cleaning things )
meanings.example_cn: 苛性钠，烧碱

meanings.meaning_cn: [助剂] 腐蚀剂；苛性钠；焦散曲线
[电子] 定时器；计时器；计时员，记时员；跑表；延时调节器
meanings.meaning_en: an instrument that you use to measure time, when you are doing something such as cooking
meanings.example: Set the timer on the cooker for three minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 把炉子上的定时器设定为三分钟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 螺旋，螺旋状物；[解剖] 耳轮
meanings.meaning_en: a line that curves and rises around a central line
helpful and likely to make you successful
meanings.example: He was now in a more advantageous position.
meanings.example_cn: 他现在的位置更有利。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有利可图的，赚钱的；合算的
meanings.meaning_en: a job or activity that is lucrative lets you earn a lot of money
meanings.example: Thousands of ex-army officers have found lucrative jobs in private security firms.
meanings.example_cn: 成千上万的退役军官在私人保安公司找到了薪水丰厚的工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 依教规的；权威的；牧师的
meanings.example: ...Ballard's status as a canonical writer.
meanings.example_cn: ...巴拉德的经典作家地位。

meanings.meaning_en: the way someone or something appears to be, which hides the truth or is only temporary
meanings.example: It’s the same idea in a different guise.
meanings.example_cn: 还是一样的观点，只是形式不同。

meanings.meaning_en: the practice or system of censoring something
meanings.example: censorship of books
meanings.example_cn: 书籍的审查

meanings.meaning_cn: [法] 非法的；违法的；违反规则的
meanings.meaning_en: not allowed by the law
meanings.example: illegal drugs
meanings.example_cn: 违禁药品

meanings.meaning_en: an illegal immigrant
meanings.example: They were involved in illegal activities.
meanings.example_cn: 他们参与了非法活动。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to give advice on a particular subject
meanings.example: a management consultant
meanings.example_cn: 管理顾问

meanings.example: When spring is coming all trees begin to burgeon .
meanings.example_cn: 当春天到来的时候，所有树开始发芽。

meanings.example: The brain-drain effect of studying abroad has started to burgeon due to flaws in the domestic academic environment.
meanings.example_cn: 由于国内学术环境恶劣，出国留学造成人才外流的现象已经初显萌芽。

meanings.meaning_cn: 自动机；机器人；自动机器
meanings.meaning_en: a machine, especially one in the shape of a human, that moves without anyone controlling it
if something such as an event or a message resonates, it seems important or good to people, or continues to do this
meanings.example: The bass guitar began to thump so loudly that it resonated in my head.
meanings.example_cn: 低音吉他开始砰然作响，震得我的脑袋嗡嗡的。

meanings.meaning_cn: [安全] 保护；保卫；保护措施
meanings.meaning_en: a rule, agreement etc that is intended to protect someone or something from possible dangers or problems
meanings.example: International safeguards prevent the increase of nuclear weapons.
meanings.example_cn: 国际安全条约防止核武器数量增加。

meanings.meaning_en: to protect something from harm or damage
If you rectify something that is wrong, you change it so that it becomes correct or satisfactory
meanings.example: Only an act of Congress could rectify the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 只有国会的法案才能扭转这种局面。

meanings.meaning_en: the first public appearance of an entertainer, sports player etc or of something new and important
meanings.example: She made her debut in a 1937 production of "Hamlet."
meanings.example_cn: 她在1937年《哈姆雷特》的演出中首次登台。

meanings.meaning_en: to decorate with, make like, or make of brass
meanings.example: The braze and interfacial microstructures were characterized by optical microscopy, scanning electron microscopy, and energy dispersive spectroscopy.
meanings.example_cn: 在钎焊和界面微观结构的特点是光学显微镜，扫描电子显微镜和能谱。

meanings.example: The method and technology of oxyacetylene flame braze welding for main cable wrapping at Shantou Bay Bridge were introduced, and the difficulties of the welding were analyzed.
meanings.example_cn: 介绍汕头海湾大桥主缆缠丝所采用的氧- 乙炔火焰钎接焊方法及其工艺，并对主缆缠丝焊接的难点进行了分析。

meanings.meaning_cn: 瘟疫（尤指鼠疫）；有害的事物
meanings.meaning_en: a disease that spreads quickly and kills a lot of people
meanings.example: We are fighting to save the world from the pestilence of Nazi tyranny -(Cheers)-and in defence of all that is most sacred to man.
meanings.example_cn: 我们要为从纳粹暴政的瘟疫下拯救世界而战（欢呼），要为捍卫所有对人类来说无比神圣的价值而战。

meanings.meaning_cn: 中世纪的；原始的；仿中世纪的；老式的
meanings.meaning_en: connected with the Middle Ages (= the period between about 1100 and 1500 AD )
meanings.example: These spices were first brought to Italy from the East in medieval times.
meanings.example_cn: 这些香料最早是在中世纪时从东方被带到了意大利。

meanings.meaning_cn: 延缓，推迟；使暂停；使悬浮
meanings.meaning_en: to officially stop something from continuing, especially for a short time
meanings.example: Sales of the drug will be suspended until more tests are completed.
meanings.example_cn: 这种药品在完成进一步检验之前将暂停销售。

meanings.meaning_en: The demolition of a structure, for example, a building, is the act of deliberately destroying it, often in order to build something else in its place
meanings.example: The project required the total demolition of the old bridge.
meanings.example_cn: 这项工程要求那座旧桥的彻底拆除。

meanings.meaning_en: a speech in a play in which a character, usually alone on the stage, talks to himself or herself so that the  audience  knows their thoughts

meanings.meaning_cn: 典范的；惩戒性的；可仿效的
meanings.meaning_en: excellent and providing a good example for people to follow
meanings.example: a company with an exemplary record on environmental issues
meanings.example_cn: 在处理环境问题方面可作为楷模的公司

meanings.meaning_en: a very clear or typical example of something
meanings.example: ...a new paradigm of production.
meanings.example_cn: …一种新的生产范例。

meanings.meaning_en: if a hollow part of your body dilates or if something dilates it, it becomes wider
meanings.example: dilated pupils
meanings.example_cn: 扩大的瞳孔

meanings.meaning_en: something that exists as a single and complete unit
meanings.example: The mind exists as a separate entity.
meanings.example_cn: 思想作为一个独立的实体存在。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or consisting of money
meanings.example: He was trying to get a pecuniary advantage for himself.
meanings.example_cn: 他拼命为自己敛财。

meanings.meaning_cn: 宏伟的；堂皇的；浮夸的；宏大的
meanings.meaning_en: grandiose plans sound very important or impressive, but are not practical
meanings.example: The lack of such leaders may also be the hallmark of a largely post-ideological era in which far less need is felt for unifying doctrines or the grandiose figures who provide them.
meanings.example_cn: 这种领袖人物的缺乏可能也是一个大后意识形态时代的重要象征，在这个时代，人们更少需要一个统一的教义或是一个提供给大众的浮夸形象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 挑剔的；受批判的（名词censoriousness，副词censoriously）
meanings.meaning_en: criticizing and expressing disapproval
meanings.example: His tone was censorious.
meanings.example_cn: 他语气苛刻。

meanings.meaning_en: not typical or usual
meanings.example: The economy of the province was atypical because it was particularly small.
meanings.example_cn: 该省的经济并不算典型，因为它的规模特别小。

meanings.meaning_cn: 烹饪法，美食法；享乐主义
meanings.meaning_en: the art and science of cooking and eating good food
meanings.example: Burgundy has always been considered a major centre of gastronomy.
meanings.example_cn: 勃艮第常被看作主要的美食中心。

meanings.meaning_en: a clever amusing remark
to name a list of things one by one
meanings.example: I enumerate the work that will have to be done.
meanings.example_cn: 我将必须要做的工作一一列举出来。

meanings.meaning_en: to repeat what someone else has just said
meanings.example: ‘You bet,’ she said, echoing his words.
meanings.example_cn: “当然啦。她重复着他的话。

meanings.meaning_en: a sound that you hear again after a loud noise, because it was made near something such as a wall

meanings.meaning_cn: 资格；条件；限制；赋予资格
meanings.meaning_en: if you have a qualification, you have passed an examination or course to show you have a particular level of skill or knowledge in a subject
meanings.example: He left school without any qualifications.

meanings.example_cn: 在我的著作当中，我认为合理性是人类最重要的价值之一。

meanings.meaning_cn: 纯正的；英币的；纯银制的
meanings.example: Ella has done some sterling work.
meanings.example_cn: 埃拉做了一些出色的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: the standard unit of money in the United Kingdom, based on the pound

meanings.meaning_cn: 元素；要素；原理；成分；自然环境
meanings.meaning_en: one part or feature of a whole system, plan, piece of work etc, especially one that is basic or important
meanings.example: Business and management elements are built into the course.
meanings.example_cn: 本课程加入了商务和管理方面的内容。

meanings.meaning_cn: 顽固的；倔强的；难以控制的
meanings.meaning_en: determined not to change your ideas, behaviour, opinions etc, even when other people think you are being unreasonable
meanings.example: He was the most obstinate man I’ve ever met.
meanings.example_cn: 他是我遇到过的最固执的人。

meanings.example: His family could only cry and watch this expert marksman twist and writhe in his death agonies.
meanings.example_cn: 他的家人只能嚎啕大哭，眼睁睁地看着这个出色的神枪手在扭曲翻滚中痛苦地死去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 体现，使具体化；具体表达
meanings.meaning_en: to be a very good example of an idea or quality
meanings.example: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher.
meanings.example_cn: 她具备了我所钦佩的教师该具备的一切素质。

meanings.meaning_en: living without any physical pleasures or comforts, especially for religious reasons
meanings.example: an ascetic life
meanings.example_cn: 清苦的生活

meanings.meaning_en: An ascetic is someone who is ascetic

meanings.meaning_cn: 均衡；平静；保持平衡的能力
meanings.meaning_en: a balance between different people, groups, or forces that compete with each other, so that none is stronger than the others and a situation is not likely to change suddenly
meanings.example: The government is anxious not to upset the economic equilibrium.
meanings.example_cn: 政府急切希望不要打乱经济平衡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 显性的；占优势的；支配的，统治的
meanings.meaning_en: more powerful, important, or noticeable than other people or things
meanings.example: The dominant male gorilla is the largest in the group.
meanings.example_cn: 领头的公猩猩是这群大猩猩中体形最大的一个。

meanings.example: Japan became dominant in the mass market during the 1980s.
meanings.example_cn: 20世纪80年代日本在大众市场上开始占据优势。

meanings.meaning_en: to steal money or property from a person, bank etc
meanings.example: They killed four policemen while robbing a bank.
meanings.example_cn: 他们抢劫一家银行的时候杀了4名警察。

meanings.meaning_en: to say publicly that you no longer have a political or religious belief that you had before
meanings.example: White House officials ordered Williams to recant.
meanings.example_cn: 白宫官员命令威廉斯公开宣布放弃自己的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who changes spoken words from one language into an-other, especially as their job
meanings.example: Speaking through an interpreter (= using an interpreter ), Ahmed said, ‘I’m very worried about my wife and children.’
meanings.example_cn: 艾哈迈德通过口译者说:“我很担心我的妻子和孩子们。”

meanings.meaning_en: using very few words, in a way that seems rude
meanings.example: a brusque manner
meanings.example_cn: 简慢的态度

meanings.meaning_en: to examine something carefully in order to understand it
meanings.example: books in which the lives of famous people are dissected
meanings.example_cn: 剖析名人生平的书籍

meanings.meaning_en: to divide into two or more smaller, narrower, or less important parts
meanings.example: When you reach the village green, the street branches into two .
meanings.example_cn: 到了村中心的公共草地，这条街就分岔成两条路。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a tree that grows out from the  trunk (=  main stem  )  and that has leaves, fruit, or smaller branches growing from it
the negative  electrode  , marked (-), from which an electric current leaves a piece of equipment such as a  battery
meanings.example: And if I evacuate it, I have a cathode ray tube.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我对其抽真空，我会得到一根阴极射线管。

meanings.meaning_en: a state of confusion, excitement, or anxiety
meanings.example: She lived through the turmoil of the French Revolution.
meanings.example_cn: 她经历过法国大革命的混乱之后仍旧活着。

meanings.meaning_cn: 授权；命令，指令；委托管理；受命进行的工作
meanings.meaning_en: if a government or official has a mandate to make important decisions, they have the authority to make the decisions because they have been elected by the people to do so
meanings.example: Matters debated in meetings do not become a mandate automatically.
meanings.example_cn: 会议上讨论的事宜并不能自动成为一项指令。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone the right or power to do something

meanings.meaning_cn: 不重要的，琐碎的；琐细的
meanings.example: a trivial sum
meanings.example_cn: 一笔极小的金额

meanings.meaning_en: very sad and serious – sometimes used humorously
meanings.example: his lugubrious tear-stained face
meanings.example_cn: 他那张忧伤、泪痕斑斑的脸

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of an area, room, container etc that is empty or available to be used
meanings.example: How much space is there on each disk?
meanings.example_cn: 每张磁盘有多大容量？

meanings.example: The hedge takes up too much space .
meanings.example_cn: 这树篱占了太多的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: the belief that your actions should be based on scientific thinking rather than emotions or religious beliefs
meanings.example: philosophers who accept scientific rationalism
meanings.example_cn: 接受科学唯理论的哲学家们

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of writing on the stone over someone’s grave(= place in the ground where someone is buried )
meanings.example: His epitaph for himself would have well suited man as he wanted him to be.
meanings.example_cn: 他为自己写的墓志铭非常适合像他所期望成为的那种人。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to become strong, happy, or successful again after a difficult situation or event
meanings.example: People showed remarkable resilience during the war.
meanings.example_cn: 战争期间人们表现得特别坚韧。

meanings.meaning_en: cognate words or languages have the same origin
meanings.example: This one branch is the Liberty of Thought: from which it is impossible to separate the cognate liberty of speaking and of writing.
meanings.example_cn: 这条支线就是思想的自由。 把同源的言语的自由与写作的自由和思想的自由分开是不可能的。

meanings.meaning_en: a word in one language that has the same origin as a word in another language
meanings.example: There is no Hebrew or Greek cognate word in the Biblical text to reflect the modern term "same-sex orientation" or "homosexuality."
meanings.example_cn: 在《圣经》文本中，没有关于现代概念“同性恋取向”或“同性恋”的希伯来文或希腊文的同源词。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迷人的；可爱的；引人注目的
meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a pleasant and attractive way
meanings.example: a winsome smile
meanings.example_cn: 迷人的微笑

meanings.meaning_en: a name or title
meanings.example: He earned the appellation "rebel priest."
meanings.example_cn: 他得了一个“叛逆牧师”的称号。

meanings.meaning_en: public argument or action for social or political change
a state or situation of complete agreement among a group of people
meanings.example: All decisions would require unanimity.
meanings.example_cn: 所有决定都需要全体一致同意。

meanings.meaning_en: A commotion is a lot of noise, confusion, and excitement
meanings.example: He heard a commotion outside.
meanings.example_cn: 他听到外面一阵骚动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 机敏的；狡猾的，诡计多端的
meanings.meaning_en: able to understand situations or behaviour very well and very quickly, especially so that you can get an advantage for yourself
meanings.example: an astute politician
meanings.example_cn: 机敏的政治家

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid in your stomach that changes food into a form that your body can use
meanings.example: The impressively named chief cells secrete pepsinogen which, when it mixes with stomach acid, becomes an enzyme called pepsin.
meanings.example_cn: 而令人印象深刻的主细胞则分泌胃蛋白酶原，当它与胃酸混合时，就形成一种酶，叫做胃蛋白酶。

meanings.meaning_en: a short angry or humorous reply
meanings.example: He was about to make a sharp retort .
meanings.example_cn: 他正要尖刻地反驳。

meanings.meaning_en: to reply quickly, in an angry or humorous way
subconscious feelings, desires etc are hidden in your mind and affect your behaviour, but you do not know that you have them
meanings.example: a subconscious fear of failure
meanings.example_cn: 对失败下意识的恐惧

meanings.meaning_cn: 潜在意识；下意识心理活动
meanings.meaning_en: the part of your mind that has thoughts and feelings you do not know about

meanings.meaning_cn: 庞大的，巨大的；凶暴的，极恶的
meanings.meaning_en: very big in size or in amount
meanings.example: an enormous bunch of flowers
meanings.example_cn: 巨大的花束

meanings.meaning_cn: 培养；养育，抚育；抱（希望等）
meanings.meaning_en: to help a skill, feeling, idea etc develop over a period of time
meanings.example: The bishop helped foster the sense of a community embracing all classes.
meanings.example_cn: 主教鼓励一种包容各个阶层的社区精神。

meanings.meaning_en: Foster parents are people who officially take a child into their family for a period of time, without becoming the child's legal parents. The child is referred to as their foster child.
meanings.example: Little Jack was placed with foster parents.
meanings.example_cn: 小杰克被安置在养父母家。

meanings.meaning_cn: (Foster)人名；(英、捷、意、葡、法、德、俄、西)福斯特
优雅的；轻飘的；缥缈的；超凡的
meanings.meaning_en: very delicate and light, in a way that does not seem real
meanings.example: ethereal beauty
meanings.example_cn: 超凡的美丽

meanings.meaning_cn: 优柔寡断的；踌躇不定的；无决断的
meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is irresolute cannot decide what to do
meanings.example: The worst reason to launch an attack would be a fear of seeming irresolute.
meanings.example_cn: 发起攻击最坏的理由就是因为害怕看起来犹豫不决。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell people that they must come together for a formal meeting
meanings.example: Separate meetings had been convoked by the two opposing factions.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个对立的派别各自召开了会议。

meanings.meaning_en: a document making a change or addition to a  will (= a legal document saying who you want your money and property to go to when you die )
meanings.example: In codicil, keep your plans somewhat flexible so that you can change ships at the last minute.
meanings.example_cn: 在遗嘱，让您的计划一定灵活性，以便您可以更改船舶在最后一分钟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 保留的，预订的；缄默的，冷淡的，高冷的；包租的
meanings.meaning_en: A table in a restaurant or a seat in a theatre that is reserved is being kept for someone rather than given or sold to anyone else
meanings.example: Seats, or sometimes entire tables, were reserved.
meanings.example_cn: 座位，有时候全部的桌子，都被预订了。

meanings.meaning_en: bad-tempered, unhappy, and silent
meanings.example: Daniel seems very morose and gloomy.
meanings.example_cn: 丹尼尔好像闷闷不乐，情绪低落。

meanings.meaning_cn: 昏昏欲睡的；沉寂的；催眠的
meanings.meaning_en: tired and almost asleep
meanings.example: The drug can make you drowsy.
meanings.example_cn: 这种药会让人昏昏欲睡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乱语；快速而不清楚的言语
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone's words or ideas as gibberish, you mean that they do not make any sense
meanings.example: When he was talking to a girl he could hardly speak, and when he did speak he talked gibberish.
meanings.example_cn: 跟女孩讲话时，他几乎说不出来，好不容易说出来了，又都是些胡言乱语。

meanings.meaning_cn: 教条主义者；独断家；独断论者
外国的；相异的，性质不同的；不相容的
meanings.meaning_en: belonging to another country or race
meanings.example: alien cultures
meanings.example_cn: 异域文化

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not a legal citizen of the country they are living or working in
meanings.example: an alien multiracial society
meanings.example_cn: 一个多种族的异国社会

meanings.meaning_en: A cartographer is a person whose job is drawing maps
meanings.example: This is my survey of a tumultuous landscape, done with all the uncertainty of a cartographer who does not know exactly where the boundaries of revolt begin and end.
meanings.example_cn: 这就是我对这片动荡之地的调查，在调查中制图师完全不能确定起义发生和结束的界限范围。

meanings.meaning_en: to make (a person) resentful or bitter

meanings.meaning_cn: 突出的；强迫人的；冒失的
meanings.example: obtrusive TV antennas
meanings.example_cn: 碍眼的电视天线

meanings.meaning_cn: 仿真；模仿；尽力赶上；同…竞争
meanings.meaning_en: to do something or behave in the same way as someone else, especially because you admire them
meanings.example: He hoped to emulate the success of Wilder.
meanings.example_cn: 他希望效仿怀尔德的成功。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone regales you with stories or jokes, they tell you a lot of them, whether you want to hear them or not
meanings.example: He was constantly regaled with tales of woe.
meanings.example_cn: 别人老是给他讲些倒霉事儿来逗他开心。

meanings.meaning_en: very many, or too many to be counted
meanings.example: She’s served on innumerable committees.
meanings.example_cn: 她在多个委员会担任委员。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring the amount of  energy  that food will produce
meanings.example: A potato has about 90 calories.
meanings.example_cn: 一个马铃薯大约有90卡路里的热量。

meanings.meaning_cn: 报应；给与惩罚的人；天罚
meanings.meaning_en: a punishment that is deserved and cannot be avoided
meanings.example: The new mathematics test will become the nemesis of teachers.
meanings.example_cn: 新的数学测试将会是对老师们的严重惩罚。

meanings.meaning_en: a confusing and difficult problem
meanings.example: the conundrum of our purpose on Earth
meanings.example_cn: 我们为何目的活在世上这一难题

meanings.meaning_cn: 发牢骚；哭诉；嘎嘎响；发呜呜声
meanings.meaning_en: if a machine whines, it makes a continuous high sound
meanings.example: Oh Charlotte, please stop whining.
meanings.example_cn: 哎呀，夏洛特，请你别再抱怨了。

meanings.meaning_en: Whine is also a noun
meanings.example: ...the whine of air-raid sirens.
meanings.example_cn: …空袭警报的尖叫。

meanings.meaning_en: If something incriminates you, it suggests that you are responsible for something bad, especially a crime
meanings.example: He claimed that the drugs had been planted to incriminate him.
meanings.example_cn: 他声称那些毒品是有人为了栽赃陷害他而放在那里的。

meanings.meaning_en: when a particular type of animal or plant stops existing
meanings.example: species in danger of extinction
meanings.example_cn: 有灭绝危险的物种

meanings.meaning_en: a punishment for breaking a law, rule, or legal agreement
meanings.example: No littering. Penalty $500.
meanings.example_cn: 禁止乱扔垃圾。 违者罚款500美元。

meanings.meaning_en: careful attention that you give to what is happening, so that you will notice any danger or illegal activity
meanings.example: the need for increased police vigilance
meanings.example_cn: 警方加强警戒的必要性

meanings.meaning_cn: 分析者；精神分析医师；分解者
meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to think about something carefully in order to understand it, and often to advise other people about it
meanings.example: Political analysts expect the Conservatives to win.
meanings.example_cn: 政治分析家预计保守党获胜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 关节；接缝；接合处，接合点；（牛，羊等的腿）大块肉
meanings.meaning_en: a part of your body that can bend because two bones meet there
meanings.example: What should I use to seal the joint between the carport roof and the house wall?
meanings.example_cn: 我应该用什么材料填补车棚顶和房屋墙面的接缝？

meanings.meaning_cn: 共同的；连接的；联合的，合办的
meanings.meaning_en: involving two or more people or groups, or owned or shared by them

meanings.meaning_cn: 连接，贴合；接合；使有接头

meanings.meaning_en: behaving as if you want to keep something secret
meanings.example: There was something furtive about his actions.
meanings.example_cn: 他的行为有点鬼鬼祟祟。

meanings.meaning_en: based on facts
meanings.example: an authentic account
meanings.example_cn: 真实可信的说法

meanings.meaning_en: to become smaller or narrower
meanings.example: Metal contracts as it cools.
meanings.example_cn: 金属遇冷收缩。

meanings.meaning_en: an official agreement between two or more people, stating what each will do
meanings.example: The economy has contracted by 2.5% since last year.
meanings.example_cn: 自去年起经济已经萎缩了2.5%。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the nature and meaning of existence, truth, good and evil, etc
meanings.example: Emma studies philosophy at university.
meanings.example_cn: 埃玛在大学攻读哲学。

meanings.meaning_cn: 挑衅的；目中无人的，蔑视的；挑战的
meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone is defiant, you mean they show aggression or independence by refusing to obey someone
meanings.example: The players are in a defiant mood as they prepare for tomorrow's game.
meanings.example_cn: 在准备明天的比赛时，球员们态度挑衅。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that is against a law or someone’s legal rights
meanings.example: A backup copy of a computer program does not infringe copyright.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机程序的备份不侵犯版权。

meanings.meaning_en: all the  genes  in one type of living thing
meanings.example: the human genome
meanings.example_cn: 人类基因组

meanings.meaning_en: relating to horse-riding
meanings.example: equestrian sports
meanings.example_cn: 马术运动

meanings.meaning_cn: 固定的；静止的；定居的；常备军的
meanings.meaning_en: standing still instead of moving
meanings.example: How did you manage to drive into a stationary vehicle?
meanings.example_cn: 你是怎么开车的，竟会撞上一辆停着的车子？

meanings.meaning_en: to copy the way someone behaves, speaks, moves etc, especially in order to make people laugh
meanings.example: She was a splendid mimic and loved to imitate Winston Churchill.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个出色的模仿者，喜欢模仿温斯顿·丘吉尔。

meanings.meaning_cn: 切线的，相切的；接触的；离题的
meanings.example: If we were moving on the tangent plane, this would be an actual equality.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我们在切平面上移动,这将会是一个真正的等式。

meanings.meaning_en: a straight line that touches the outside of a curve but does not cut across it
meanings.example: If you want strict equalities in approximations means that we replace the function by its tangent approximation.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你想要严格的近似等式,那就意味着我们要用切线逼近来取代原函数。

meanings.meaning_cn: 徒劳的；自负的；无结果的；无用的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is vain is too proud of their good looks, abilities, or position – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Men can be just as vain as women.
meanings.example_cn: 男人有时会和女人一样虚荣。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of interfering
meanings.example: Industrial relations should be free from state interference.
meanings.example_cn: 劳资关系应不受政府干预。

meanings.meaning_en: involving actions that are intended to injure or kill people, by hitting them, shooting them etc
meanings.example: the increase in violent crime
meanings.example_cn: 暴力犯罪的增多

meanings.meaning_cn: [贸易] 报价单；引用语；引证
meanings.meaning_en: a sentence or phrase from a book, speech etc which you repeat in a speech or piece of writing because it is interesting or amusing
meanings.example: The following quotation is taken from a nineteenth century travel diary.
meanings.example_cn: 下文引自19世纪的一篇旅行日记。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance of a low quality that is contained in or mixed with something else, making it less pure
meanings.example: All natural minerals contain impurities.
meanings.example_cn: 凡天然矿物都含有杂质。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提高的；高尚的；严肃的；欢欣的
meanings.meaning_en: elevated thoughts, words etc seem to be intelligent or of high moral standard
meanings.example: elevated philosophical language
meanings.example_cn: 充满智慧的哲学语言

meanings.meaning_cn: 提高；抬起；振奋；提拔（elevate的过去分词）
磨光，擦亮；擦亮剂；优雅，精良
meanings.meaning_en: an act of polishing a surface to make it smooth and shiny
meanings.example: An occasional polish will keep wall tiles looking good.
meanings.example_cn: 偶尔擦拭一下能使墙砖保持美观。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something smooth, bright, and shiny by rubbing it

meanings.meaning_cn: 衰退，[核] 衰减；腐烂，腐朽
meanings.meaning_en: to be slowly destroyed by a natural chemical process, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Her body was already starting to decay.
meanings.example_cn: 她的尸体已经开始腐烂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 衰退，[核] 衰减；腐烂，腐朽
meanings.meaning_en: the natural chemical change that causes the slow destruction of something
meanings.example: Most archaeological finds are broken, damaged, or decayed.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分考古发现物都已破裂、损坏或腐烂。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who believes in the ideas of a great teacher or leader, especially a religious one
meanings.example: ...a major intellectual figure with disciples throughout Europe.
meanings.example_cn: …一位信徒遍布欧洲的重要知识分子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧握；柄；支配；握拍方式；拍柄绷带
meanings.meaning_en: the way you hold something tightly, or your ability to do this
meanings.example: Hold the microphone in a firm grip and keep it still.
meanings.example_cn: 紧紧握住麦克风不要让它动。

meanings.meaning_en: to hold something very tightly
meanings.example: She felt her wrist caught in a vice-like grip .
meanings.example_cn: 她觉得手腕像是卡在铁钳里被牢牢地抓住了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 给人好感的；有魅力的；引人注意的
meanings.meaning_en: looking attractive or pleasant
meanings.example: a prepossessing smile
meanings.example_cn: 迷人的微笑

meanings.meaning_cn: 预先影响；使先具有（prepossess的现在分词）

meanings.meaning_en: to smear over; daub

meanings.meaning_cn: 求援，求助；[经] 追索权；依赖；救生索

meanings.meaning_en: the day or year exactly 100 years after a particular event

meanings.meaning_en: someone who attacks another person

meanings.example_cn: 其他参加聚会的人从攻击者手中救出了这名受伤的男子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假装虔诚的；假装圣洁的；假装诚实的

meanings.meaning_cn: 不定的；周游的；错误的；偏离正路的
meanings.meaning_en: Errant is used to describe someone whose actions are considered unacceptable or wrong by other people. For example, an errant husband is unfaithful to his wife.
meanings.example: Usually his cases involved errant husbands and wandering wives.
meanings.example_cn: 通常他接手的案子都涉及出轨的丈夫和离家出走的妻子。

meanings.meaning_en: a false name, usually used by a criminal

meanings.meaning_en: when an animal kills and eats another animal

meanings.meaning_en: to beat as with a stick; cudgel; club

meanings.example: Your walk and posture and general physical demeanor before you talk to any potential one night stands is just as important, if not moreso.

meanings.meaning_en: a product that is bought and sold

meanings.example: Please countermand our order for same.

meanings.meaning_en: to say false things about someone in order to damage other people’s good opinion of them

to make remarks or jokes that show you think someone or something is silly or useless

meanings.example_cn: 你不应该嘲笑他们的努力。

meanings.meaning_en: a sweet white or brown substance that is obtained from plants and used to make food and drinks sweet

meanings.example_cn: 你的咖啡加糖吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 刻苦钻研；苦心而成的著作

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid

meanings.meaning_en: to make a serious public request for help, money, information etc

meanings.meaning_en: sorrow, pity, or regret
to make something less effective or spoil it

meanings.meaning_en: In betting, odds are expressions with numbers such as "10 to 1" and "7 to 2" that show how likely something is thought to be, for example, how likely a particular horse is to lose or win a race

meanings.example: Please inform us if there are any significant changes in your plans.

relating to or involved in studies done at a university after completing a first degree
someone who likes books

meanings.example_cn: Illustration“嗨，我的名字叫Gary，我是一个藏书家。”

meanings.example_cn: 他们的活动受到警方的严密监视。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of leather bands put around a horse’s head and used to control its movements
a strange feeling that something, especially something bad, is going to happen

meanings.example: the pituitary gland
meanings.example_cn: 脑垂体腺

meanings.meaning_cn: 信赖；信心；受信赖的人或物
meanings.example: the country’s heavy reliance on trade
meanings.example_cn: 该国对贸易的严重依赖

meanings.meaning_en: a large  cage  where birds are kept
meanings.example: Already he had begun to forget them, and Shepperton soon became an extraordinary aviary, filled with birds of every species.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经把那些邻居们给忘记了，谢伯顿不久就变成了一个特别的鸟类饲养场，拥有各类品种的鸟。

meanings.meaning_en: a speech or piece of writing that praises someone or something a lot
meanings.example: The book is a panegyric on the intoxicating effects of marijuana.
meanings.example_cn: 该书是一篇对大麻兴奋陶醉效应的颂词。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent or avoid a problem or the need to do something
meanings.example: The new treatment obviates the need for surgery.
meanings.example_cn: 新的疗法免除了手术的必要。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone ill and weak
meanings.example: He was debilitated by his illness.
meanings.example_cn: 他由于生病身体虚弱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有偏见的；结果偏倚的，有偏的
meanings.meaning_en: unfairly preferring one person or group over another
meanings.example: Of course I’m biased, but I thought my daughter’s paintings were the best.
meanings.example_cn: 当然我有偏心，但我还是认为我女儿的画最好。

meanings.meaning_en: to accept or forgive behaviour that most people think is morally wrong
meanings.example: I cannot condone the use of violence under any circumstances.
meanings.example_cn: 我不能原谅在任何情况下使用暴力。

meanings.meaning_en: a belief about what is right and wrong that prevents you from doing bad things
meanings.example: a man with no moral scruples
meanings.example_cn: 一个道德上无所顾忌的男人

meanings.meaning_en: to pull something away from someone violently
meanings.example: I managed to wrest the photograph from his grasp.
meanings.example_cn: 我设法把他攥在手里的照片夺了过来。

meanings.meaning_en: to fill something or someone with a particular feeling or quality
the quality of the sound made by a particular instrument or voice
meanings.example: His voice had a deep timbre.
meanings.example_cn: 他的嗓音深沉。

meanings.meaning_en: If you impute something such as blame or a crime to someone, you say that they are responsible for it or are the cause of it
meanings.example: It is grossly unfair to impute blame to the United Nations.
meanings.example_cn: 把责任归咎于联合国是极不公平的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没有骨气的；无脊椎的；懦弱的
meanings.meaning_en: lacking courage and determination – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: a bunch of spineless politicians
meanings.example_cn: 一群怯弱的政客

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone extremely angry
meanings.example: Her actions infuriated her mother.
meanings.example_cn: 她的举动使她母亲极为生气。

meanings.example: It infuriated him that Beth was with another man.
meanings.example_cn: 贝丝和另一个男人在一起，这使他极为愤怒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧急情况；突发事件；非常时刻
meanings.meaning_en: an unexpected and dangerous situation that must be dealt with immediately
meanings.example: Lifeguards are trained to deal with emergencies.
meanings.example_cn: 救生员接受过应对紧急情况的训练。

meanings.meaning_en: An emergency action is one that is done or arranged quickly and not in the normal way, because an emergency has occurred
meanings.example: (= In case of emergency ), press the alarm button.
meanings.example_cn: 遇到紧急情况，请按报警按钮。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不受影响的；自然的；真挚的；不矫揉造作的
meanings.meaning_en: not changed or influenced by something
meanings.example: her easy unaffected manner
meanings.example_cn: 她那从容而自然的举止

meanings.meaning_cn: 圆顶礼帽；投球手；玩滚球的人
meanings.meaning_en: a player in  cricket  who throws the ball at a  batsman

meanings.meaning_cn: 蚱蜢；[植保] 蝗虫；小型侦察机
meanings.meaning_en: an insect that has long back legs for jumping and that makes short loud noises

meanings.meaning_cn: 秘密的，私下的；偷偷摸摸的
meanings.meaning_en: done or kept secret
meanings.example: a clandestine affair
meanings.example_cn: 秘密关系

meanings.meaning_en: a pointed stone decoration, like a small tower, on a building such as a church or castle
meanings.example: the pinnacle of academic achievement
meanings.example_cn: 学术成就的顶峰

meanings.meaning_cn: 造小尖塔；置于尖顶上；置于高处
宣告，公布；声明；表明；赞扬
meanings.meaning_en: to say publicly or officially that something important is true or exists
meanings.example: The President proclaimed the republic’s independence.
meanings.example_cn: 总统宣布共和国独立。

meanings.meaning_cn: 粗暴的；粗哑的；脾气坏的
meanings.meaning_en: A gruff voice sounds low and rough
meanings.example: He picked up the phone expecting to hear the chairman's gruff voice.
meanings.example_cn: 他拿起电话等着听主席那粗哑的声音。

meanings.meaning_en: natural ability or skill, especially in learning
meanings.example: He drifted into publishing and discovered an aptitude for working with accounts.
meanings.example_cn: 他偶入出版界，发现自己具有管账的天资。

meanings.meaning_cn: 辐射；光辉；发光；容光焕发
meanings.meaning_en: great happiness that shows in someone’s face and makes them look attractive
meanings.example: a young face full of radiance
meanings.example_cn: 一张光彩照人的年轻脸庞

meanings.meaning_cn: 谴责；悲悼；哀叹；对…深感遗憾
meanings.meaning_en: to disapprove of something very strongly and criticize it severely, especially publicly
meanings.example: The UN deplored the invasion as a ‘violation of international law’.
meanings.example_cn: 联合国谴责这次入侵 “违反了国际法” 。

meanings.meaning_en: beliefs or ideas about what is right and wrong and about how people should behave
meanings.example: ...standards of morality and justice in society.
meanings.example_cn: …社会中道德和正义的标准。

meanings.meaning_cn: 文学的；书面的；精通文学的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to literature
meanings.example: a literary prize
meanings.example_cn: 文学奖

meanings.meaning_en: an atom which has been given a positive or negative force by adding or taking away an  electron
meanings.example: These vibrations turn the ion into a sort of superfast metronome.
meanings.example_cn: 铝离子因为这些振动成为一种超高速节拍器。

meanings.example: Finally, I'll talk briefly about how Merrill Lynch is leveraging these forces to achieve preeminence in financial services.
meanings.example_cn: 最后，我简要谈一下美林将如何充分运用这些力量在金融服务业中追求卓越。

meanings.example: There is always a clamorous din when I go to visit my father.
meanings.example_cn: 每当我去看视父亲的的时候，总有一个声音在那里大喊大叫。

meanings.meaning_en: pleased with a situation, especially something you have achieved, so that you stop trying to improve or change things – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: There’s a danger of becoming complacent if you win a few games.
meanings.example_cn: 赢了几场比赛可能就会变得沾沾自喜。

meanings.meaning_en: to work together with a person or group in order to achieve something, especially in science or art
meanings.example: Much later he collaborated with his son Michael on the English translation of a text on food production.
meanings.example_cn: 后来他和儿子迈克尔合作，把一个有关食品生产的文本翻译成英语。

meanings.example: Wherefore, I strongly advise you, my lords, to put aside all care and solicitude and to receive readily the most holy Body and Blood of our Lord Jesus Christ in holy commemoration of Him.
meanings.example_cn: 为此，我强烈地建议你们，大人，把（对此世的）关心和渴望放到一边并接受我们的主基督在祂神圣的纪念仪式中已经是最神圣的身体和血。

meanings.meaning_en: very formal and careful in the way you speak and behave, and easily shocked by anything rude
meanings.example: She looked prim and nervous in her best hat and coat.
meanings.example_cn: 她戴着最好的帽子并穿着最好的外套，显得拘谨不安。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使显得一本正经；把…打扮得整整齐齐
meanings.example: a very prim and proper young lady
meanings.example_cn: 相当古板正经的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_cn: (Prim)人名；(法、德、匈、捷、瑞典、西、葡)普里姆

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Australian aborigines
meanings.example: ...Aboriginal art.
meanings.example_cn: …土著艺术。

meanings.meaning_en: an aborigine
to make someone feel calmer and less anxious, upset, or angry
meanings.example: Lucy soothed the baby by rocking it in her arms.
meanings.example_cn: 露西把宝宝抱在怀里摇晃着，让他安静下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难懂的；易忘的；逃避的；难捉摸的
meanings.meaning_en: an elusive result is difficult to achieve
meanings.example: She enjoys a firm reputation in this country but wider international success has been elusive.
meanings.example_cn: 她在这个国家享有稳固的声誉，但却一直难以在国际上取得更大的成功。

meanings.example: "We went into a market and established a kiosk in that market out of a butcher's shop," Kalanda says.
meanings.example_cn: 卡兰达说，“由于一家肉店，我们进入这个市场，在那个市场我们建立了一个公用电话亭”

meanings.meaning_en: not controlled by strict rules, but decided on by someone in a position of authority
meanings.example: the court’s discretionary powers
meanings.example_cn: 法庭的酌情决定权

meanings.meaning_en: a very fast speed
meanings.example: I was forced to attempt a gallop.
meanings.example_cn: 我被迫尝试一次骑马疾驰。

meanings.meaning_cn: 飞驰；急速进行；急急忙忙地说
meanings.meaning_en: if a horse gallops, it moves very fast with all its feet leaving the ground together

meanings.meaning_cn: [流][机] 流量；变迁；不稳定；流出
meanings.example: Everything is in flux at the moment.
meanings.example_cn: 眼下一切都变化不定。

meanings.meaning_en: to fight someone and successfully stop their attack on you
meanings.example: Government troops repulsed an attack by rebel forces.
meanings.example_cn: 政府军击退了叛军的攻击。

meanings.meaning_en: a shape that is similar to a ball, but not perfectly round
meanings.example: It looked like a sphere but on closer examination I saw it was really a spheroid.
meanings.example_cn: 它看起来是圆形，但仔细观察后发现它实际上是回转椭球体。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of being more powerful, more important, or more noticeable than other people or things
meanings.example: The latest fighting appears to be an attempt by each group to establish dominance over the other.
meanings.example_cn: 最近的战斗似乎是冲突各方在试图争夺控制权。

meanings.meaning_en: to buy insurance so that you will receive money if something bad happens to you, your family, your possessions etc
meanings.example: Have you insured the contents of your home?
meanings.example_cn: 你给家庭财产投保了吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 吸收；使同化；把…比作；使相似
meanings.meaning_en: to completely understand and begin to use new ideas, information etc
meanings.example: It will take time to assimilate all these facts.
meanings.example_cn: 充分掌握所有这些情况需要时间。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is removed from their job
meanings.example: Wilson was claiming compensation for unfair dismissal .
meanings.example_cn: 威尔逊正在就无理解雇要求赔偿。

meanings.meaning_en: if something irks you, it makes you feel annoyed
meanings.example: The rehearsal process also irked him increasingly.
meanings.example_cn: 排练过程也更加让他厌烦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 严重的，[医] 急性的；敏锐的；激烈的；尖声的
meanings.meaning_en: an acute problem is very serious
meanings.example: The housing shortage is more acute than first thought.
meanings.example_cn: 住房短缺情况比一开始想的要严重。

meanings.meaning_en: Oxygen is a colourless gas that exists in large quantities in the air. All plants and animals need oxygen in order to live.
meanings.example: The human brain needs to be without oxygen for only four minutes before permanent damage occurs.
meanings.example_cn: 人脑缺氧只需4分钟就会造成永久性损伤。

meanings.meaning_en: an action that breaks a law, rule, or agreement
meanings.example: The congressman was accused of a breach of secrecy rules.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国会议员被指控违反保密条例。

meanings.meaning_en: to break a law, rule, or agreement
to continue doing an activity or trying to achieve something over a long period of time
meanings.example: She plans to pursue a career in politics.
meanings.example_cn: 她计划从政。

meanings.example: The relationship was open, and the suasion was gradual and systemic.
meanings.example_cn: 这种关系是开放的，劝说是渐进性的和系统性的。

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a piece of equipment or a decoration that is not necessary, but that makes a machine, car, room etc more useful or more attractive
meanings.example: bathroom accessories such as mirrors and towel-rails
meanings.example_cn: 镜子和毛巾架等浴室配件

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a book or an article that explains or discusses a book, poem, idea etc
meanings.example: political commentary
meanings.example_cn: 政论

meanings.meaning_cn: 贮藏室，仓库；知识库；智囊团
meanings.meaning_en: a place or container in which large quantities of something are stored

meanings.meaning_cn: 地球的；陆地的，[生物] 陆生的；人间的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Earth rather than to the moon or other  planets
meanings.example: ...terrestrial life forms.
meanings.example_cn: …地球上的生命形态。

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧张的；费力的；奋发的；艰苦的；热烈的
meanings.meaning_en: needing a lot of effort or strength
meanings.example: a strenuous climb
meanings.example_cn: 艰难的攀登

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone's behaviour or their actions as atrocious, you mean that it is unacceptable because it is extremely violent or cruel
meanings.example: The judge said he had committed atrocious crimes against women.
meanings.example_cn: 该法官称他对妇女犯下了残暴的罪行。

meanings.meaning_en: great love and admiration
meanings.example: the look of adoration in his eyes
meanings.example_cn: 他爱慕的眼神

meanings.meaning_en: to provide information that supports or helps to prove someone else’s statement, idea etc
meanings.example: We now have new evidence to corroborate the defendant’s story.
meanings.example_cn: 我们现在有新的证据来证实被告人的说法。

meanings.meaning_cn: 连续的；继承的；依次的；接替的
meanings.meaning_en: coming or following one after the other
meanings.example: The team has had five successive victories.
meanings.example_cn: 这支球队已经连胜五场了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 瘟疫；灾祸；麻烦；讨厌的人
meanings.meaning_en: a disease that causes death and spreads quickly to a large number of people
meanings.example: drops in population levels due to plagues and famines
meanings.example_cn: 瘟疫和饥荒造成的人口水平下降

meanings.meaning_en: to cause pain, suffering, or trouble to someone, especially for a long period of time

meanings.meaning_cn: [有化] 甲烷；[能源] 沼气
meanings.meaning_en: a gas that you cannot see or smell, which can be burned to give heat
meanings.example: Methane is one of the principal gases contributing to the greenhouse effect.
meanings.example_cn: 甲烷是造成温室效应的主要气体之一。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone's voice, smile, or actions are tremulous, they are unsteady because the person is uncertain, afraid, or upset
meanings.example: She fidgeted in her chair as she took a deep, tremulous breath.
meanings.example_cn: 她在椅子上坐立不安，轻颤着深吸了一口气。

meanings.meaning_en: a deep narrow valley with steep sides
meanings.example: The bus overturned and fell into a ravine.
meanings.example_cn: 这辆公共汽车翻了车，掉进了一处深谷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 柜台；对立面；计数器；（某些棋盘游戏的）筹码
meanings.meaning_en: the place where you pay or are served in a shop, bank, restaurant etc
meanings.example: He wondered if the girl behind the counter recognised him.
meanings.example_cn: 他在想柜台后面的那个女孩是否认出了他。

meanings.meaning_cn: 反击，还击；反向移动，对着干；反驳，回答
meanings.meaning_en: to say something in order to try to prove that what someone said was not true or as a reply to something

meanings.meaning_cn: 变异，[生物] 分化；区别

meanings.meaning_en: if a feeling or quality reigns, it exists strongly for a period of time
meanings.example: For several minutes confusion reigned .
meanings.example_cn: 有好几分钟场面大乱。

meanings.meaning_en: the period when someone is king, queen, or  emperor
meanings.example: Silence reigned while we waited for news.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在等待消息的时候鸦雀无声。

meanings.meaning_en: music that is played in the background at the same time as another instrument or singer that plays or sings the main tune
meanings.example: White wine makes an excellent accompaniment to fish.
meanings.example_cn: 白葡萄酒是吃鱼时绝佳的佐餐酒。

meanings.meaning_en: anger
meanings.example: Their ire was directed mainly at the government.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的愤怒主要针对该政府。

meanings.meaning_cn: 费用；电荷；掌管；控告；命令；负载
meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money you have to pay for goods or services
meanings.example: Guided tours are provided at no charge .
meanings.example_cn: 免费提供有导游带队的观光游览。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使充电；使承担；指责；装载；对…索费；向…冲去
meanings.meaning_en: to say publicly that you think someone has done something wrong
meanings.example: Your order will be sent free of charge (= with no cost ) .
meanings.example_cn: 你订的货物将免费运送。

meanings.meaning_en: a complete lack of respect that you show for someone or something because you think they are not important or good enough
meanings.example: a look of complete disdain
meanings.example_cn: 极为鄙视的样子

meanings.meaning_en: to have no respect for someone or something, because you think they are not important or good enough

meanings.meaning_cn: [物] 轨道，轨线；[航][军] 弹道
meanings.meaning_en: the curved path of an object that has been fired or thrown through the air
meanings.example: The decision was certain to affect the trajectory of French politics for some time to come.
meanings.example_cn: 这一决定在未来的一段时间里必将影响法国的政治轨迹。

meanings.meaning_cn: 费解的；不可思议的；无限的
meanings.meaning_en: difficult or impossible to understand
meanings.example: legal documents full of incomprehensible jargon
meanings.example_cn: 满是难懂术语的法律文件

meanings.meaning_cn: 使变无效；使显得愚笨；使无价值
meanings.example: ...a uniformed guard stultified with boredom.
meanings.example_cn: ...一名穿制服的闲得无聊的警卫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 艺术的；风雅的；有美感的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to art or culture
meanings.example: artistic work
meanings.example_cn: 艺术作品

meanings.meaning_cn: 过度；饮食过度；恶心（由于饮食过度所引起）
meanings.meaning_en: A surfeit of something is an amount which is too large
meanings.example: Rationing had put an end to a surfeit of biscuits long ago.
meanings.example_cn: 定量供应很久以前就结束了饼干过剩的情况。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使饮食过度；使厌腻；使过度沉溺于

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel that things will not improve
meanings.example: The report paints a gloomy picture of the economy.
meanings.example_cn: 这篇报告描绘了一幅惨淡的经济现状。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难以置信的，不像真实的
meanings.meaning_en: difficult to believe and therefore unlikely to be true
meanings.example: It’s not entirely implausible that a galaxy could be identical to our own.
meanings.example_cn: 某个星系和我们这个星系完全相同并非完全不可能。

meanings.meaning_en: to support an idea, belief etc, especially a political one
meanings.example: She ran away with him to Mexico and espoused the revolutionary cause.
meanings.example_cn: 她与他一起逃到了墨西哥，支持革命事业。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 0
meanings.example: Make x greater than or equal to zero.
meanings.example_cn: 设x大于或等于零。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 0
a substance that remains on a surface, in a container etc and cannot be removed easily, or that remains after a chemical process
meanings.example: The flies leave a sticky residue on crops.
meanings.example_cn: 苍蝇在庄稼上留下黏糊糊的分泌物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 对人友好的，开朗的；出发的，外出的；即将离职的；乐于助人的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is outgoing likes to meet and talk to new people
meanings.example: We’re looking for someone with an outgoing personality.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在找一个性格外向的人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is making a claim against someone or defending themselves against a claim in a court of law
meanings.example: Touching the case, I suggest that we should go to ask the litigant.
meanings.example_cn: 关于这个案子，我建议我们去问问当事人。

meanings.example: How can I as a private litigant seek redress for defamation that ruins my business?
meanings.example_cn: 做为私人诉讼当事人，我怎么对毁了我的事业的诽谤寻求补救呢？

meanings.meaning_cn: 幽灵；幻影；鬼怪；离奇出现的东西
meanings.meaning_en: something that you imagine you can see, especially the spirit of a dead person
meanings.example: He stared at the strange apparition before him.
meanings.example_cn: 他盯着面前那个古怪的幽灵。

meanings.meaning_cn: 按年代顺序排列的；依时间前后排列而记载的
meanings.meaning_en: arranged according to when things happened or were made
meanings.example: We arranged the documents in chronological order .
meanings.example_cn: 我们把这些文件按时序排列。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无趣味的；无生气的；索然乏味的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone or something as vapid, you are critical of them because they are dull and uninteresting
meanings.example: ...the minister's young and rather vapid wife.
meanings.example_cn: ...部长年轻却乏味的妻子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 股份，股票；库存；血统；树干；家畜
meanings.meaning_en: farm animals, especially cattle
meanings.example: We have a huge stock of quality carpets on sale.
meanings.example_cn: 我们备有大量优质地毯出售。

meanings.meaning_en: if a shop stocks a particular product, it keeps a supply of it to sell
a change or changes made to a system or organization in order to improve it

meanings.example_cn: 为复苏经济而进行了改革。

meanings.meaning_en: to improve a system, law, organization etc by making a lot of changes to it, so that it operates in a fairer or more effective way

meanings.meaning_cn: 热心的；强烈的；炽热的；热烈的

meanings.example_cn: 对和平的强烈呼吁

meanings.meaning_en: involving two groups or nations
meanings.example: ...bilateral talks between Britain and America.
meanings.example_cn: …英美之间的双边会谈。

meanings.meaning_cn: 引人注目的；强制的；激发兴趣的
meanings.meaning_en: very interesting or exciting, so that you have to pay attention
meanings.example: His life makes a compelling story .
meanings.example_cn: 他的一生是个引人入胜的故事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 强迫；以强力获得（compel的ing形式）

meanings.meaning_en: argumentative
meanings.example: Ecological discourse' can thus be seen as the most productive cultural form for generating and mobilising ideological consensus and dissentious in modern societies.
meanings.example_cn: 生态学讨论可被视为最有效的文化形式，它产生和推动现代社会的思想共识和争论。

meanings.meaning_en: to attack a place for a long time using large weapons, bombs etc
meanings.example: I had been in action, bombarding the Normandy coast.
meanings.example_cn: 我参加过轰炸诺曼底海岸的行动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分泌脂质的；脂肪的，脂肪质的；似油脂或皮脂的

meanings.example_cn: 皮脂腺

meanings.meaning_en: if a particular period of time elapses, it passes

meanings.example_cn: 过了几个月他的案子才开审。

meanings.example: The assignment must be completed within an overall elapsed time of one week.
meanings.example_cn: 这项任务总的时限为一周，必须按时完成。

meanings.meaning_cn: 能生产的；生产的，生产性的；多产的；富有成效的
meanings.meaning_en: producing or achieving a lot

meanings.meaning_en: to divide into clearly separate groups with opposite beliefs, ideas, or opinions, or to make people do this
meanings.example: The issue has polarized the country.
meanings.example_cn: 这个问题使整个国家变得两极化。

meanings.meaning_en: a ruddy face looks pink and healthy

meanings.example_cn: 红润的脸色

meanings.example: ruddy cheeks
meanings.example_cn: 红润的面颊

meanings.meaning_cn: [植] 树液；精力，元气；活力；坑道
meanings.meaning_en: the watery substance that carries food through a plant
meanings.example: The leaves, bark and sap are also common ingredients of local herbal remedies.
meanings.example_cn: 树叶、树皮和树液也是当地草药疗法的常用药材。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使衰竭，使伤元气；挖掘以破坏基础

meanings.meaning_en: a philanthropic person or institution gives money and help to people who are poor or in trouble
meanings.example: Some of the best services for the seniors are sponsored by philanthropic organizations.
meanings.example_cn: 一些一流老人服务机构是由慈善组织资助的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 视觉的，视力的；栩栩如生的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to seeing
meanings.example: Artists translate their ideas into visual images.
meanings.example_cn: 画家把自己的思想转换成视觉画面。

meanings.meaning_en: the practice of giving money and help to people who are poor or in trouble

meanings.example_cn: ...一位以乐善好施闻名的退休银行家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 斜面；伪善之言；黑话；角落

meanings.meaning_en: to lean, or make something lean

结合；组合；联合；[化学] 化合
meanings.meaning_en: two or more different things that exist together or are used or put together

meanings.example: Newspapers have been fulsome in their praise of the former president.

meanings.meaning_cn: 世俗的，平凡的；世界的，宇宙的
meanings.meaning_en: ordinary and not interesting or exciting

meanings.example_cn: 刚开始，这工作非常乏味。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin mark on a piece of paper, the ground, or another surface
meanings.example: Draw a straight line across the top of the page.
meanings.example_cn: 在这一页的上方画一条直线。

meanings.example_cn: 在虚线上签名。

meanings.example_cn: 激进分子因为除掉了他而欣喜若狂。

meanings.meaning_en: burning

meanings.example_cn: 其中有一艘船遭人纵火。

meanings.meaning_cn: 幸运的；侥幸的；吉祥的；带来幸运的

meanings.example_cn: 所幸正巧有个过路人听到了她的呼救。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling of not being interested in something, and not willing to make any effort to change or improve things

meanings.example_cn: 由于公众反应冷淡，这次运动失败了。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something to show that you are sorry for having done something wrong

meanings.example_cn: 他觉得他已弥补曾对儿子所做的错事。

meanings.meaning_en: something you do in order to prevent something dangerous or unpleasant from happening

meanings.example_cn: 防火措施被忽视了。

meanings.example: Vets took precautions to prevent the spread of the disease.
meanings.example_cn: 兽医们为防止疾病蔓延采取了预防措施。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沉默的；有保留的；谨慎的

meanings.example_cn: 她对于自己的成就如此缄默。

meanings.meaning_en: quiet, serious, and well-behaved – used especially about women in the past

meanings.example_cn: 老照片上的玛吉显得年轻而又端庄娴静。

meanings.example_cn: 该图案完全对称。

meanings.example_cn: 杰克逊说她的老板变得越来越抑郁，又重新大量吸烟了。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of revoking a law, decision, or agreement
the most successful point in the development of something

meanings.meaning_cn: 强健的；健康的；粗野的；粗鲁的

meanings.meaning_cn: 易怒的；暴躁的；胆汁质的

meanings.example: They arehearersof their Origin, but not servants of machination.

meanings.meaning_en: to respect and admire someone or something very much

meanings.meaning_en: to feel annoyed and disappointed
eager interest and enjoyment

meanings.example_cn: 被捉奸的危险为这件风流韵事增添了一些刺激性。

meanings.example_cn: 请联络当地分部安排预约。

meanings.meaning_cn: 洪水；一阵；大雨；突然迸发

meanings.meaning_en: skill in a particular artistic activity

meanings.meaning_en: a process in which something happens more and more quickly

meanings.example_cn: 这款最新型号加速性能优异。

meanings.example_cn: …优美环境与悲怆历史的辛酸结合。

meanings.example: ...a poignant love story.
meanings.example_cn: …一个令人感伤的爱情故事。

meanings.example_cn: 他歪戴着帽子冲了出去。

meanings.example_cn: 演奏者们常常把颤音演奏成波音，在绝大多数情况下波音也不能完整的演奏好。

meanings.meaning_en: unhappy, disappointed, or sad

meanings.example_cn: 失业者沮丧地站在街角。

meanings.meaning_en: the final result of a situation

meanings.example_cn: 他有时候真让人难以忍受，自我中心又自恋。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the ability to understand things and think intelligently

meanings.example_cn: 马克很聪明。

meanings.meaning_cn: 知识分子；凭理智做事者

meanings.meaning_cn: 怠惰，懒惰；[脊椎] 树懒
meanings.meaning_en: an animal in Central and South America that moves very slowly, has grey fur, and lives in trees
meanings.example: He admitted a lack of motivation and a feeling of sloth.
meanings.example_cn: 他承认自己缺乏动力，感觉懒散。

meanings.meaning_en: not paying attention to something

meanings.example_cn: 奥哈拉不理会危险，继续骑马前行。

meanings.example: The web site provides plant science consulting and research services for applications in horticulture, urban forestry, arboriculture , natural plant communities, and agriculture.
meanings.example_cn: 网站提供了以下几个方面的植物科学咨询与研究信息服务：园艺、城市林学、植物栽培、自然植物群落、农学等。

meanings.meaning_en: to be so big that other things are made to seem very small

meanings.example_cn: 周围的摩天大楼使得大教堂显得很矮小。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who is a dwarf has not continued to grow to the normal height because of a medical condition. Many people think that this use is offensive.
a dwarf plant or animal is much smaller than the usual size
the special meaning or importance that something has for you because it relates to your own experiences
meanings.example: a tradition that has little resonance in the 21st century
meanings.example_cn: 在21世纪难以引起共鸣的传统

meanings.meaning_en: to repeat exactly the same journey that someone else has made

meanings.example_cn: 我们将重走马可·波罗走过的路线。

meanings.meaning_en: dogged behaviour shows that you are very determined to continue doing something
meanings.example: a dogged determination to succeed

meanings.meaning_en: small
meanings.example: a shy diminutive man
meanings.example_cn: 一个腼腆的矮个子男人

meanings.meaning_cn: 爱称；指小词；身材极小的人
meanings.meaning_en: a word formed by adding a diminutive suffix
the quality of being symmetrical
meanings.example: ...the incredible beauty and symmetry of a snowflake.
meanings.example_cn: …雪花令人难以置信的美丽和对称。

meanings.meaning_cn: （言语或理论）轻率的，未经深思熟虑的
meanings.example: facile generalizations
meanings.example_cn: 肤浅的概括

meanings.meaning_en: if a solid dissolves, or if you dissolve it, it mixes with a liquid and becomes part of it
meanings.example: Stir until the sugar dissolves.
meanings.example_cn: 一直搅拌到糖溶解掉。

meanings.meaning_en: doing or saying the same thing many times
meanings.example: Children used to learn by repetition.
meanings.example_cn: 过去小孩子是通过背诵来学习的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 斯多葛学派哲学家；禁欲主义者；恬淡寡欲的人，不以苦乐为意的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who does not show their emotions and does not complain when bad things happen to them

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚忍的，苦修的；斯多葛派的；禁欲主义的
总共的；粗野的；恶劣的；显而易见的
meanings.meaning_en: clearly wrong and unacceptable
meanings.example: He abused the Admiral in the grossest terms.
meanings.example_cn: 他用最粗俗的字眼辱骂那位海军上将。

meanings.meaning_en: to earn £20,000 etc before tax has been taken away
a story, painting etc in which the events and characters represent ideas or teach a moral lesson
meanings.example: The poem's comic allegory was transparent.
meanings.example_cn: 这首诗歌的喜剧性讽寓很明显。

meanings.meaning_cn: 天真的；朴实的；无虚饰的
meanings.meaning_en: natural, honest, and sincere

meanings.meaning_en: a very small living thing that causes infectious illnesses
