meanings.meaning_en: to keep a person or animal apart from others for a period of time in case they are carrying a disease
meanings.example: She was sent home and put in quarantine.
meanings.example_cn: 她被送回家实施隔离。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time when a person or animal is kept apart from others in case they are carrying a disease
continuing for only a limited period of time
meanings.example: temporary pain relief
meanings.example_cn: 疼痛的暂时缓解

meanings.example: I’m living with my parents, but it’s only temporary.
meanings.example_cn: 我和父母住在一起，但这只是暂时的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 监督人；负责人；主管；指挥者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is in charge of all the schools in a particular area in the US
meanings.example: a young park superintendent
meanings.example_cn: 年轻的公园负责人

meanings.meaning_cn: 怠慢的；迟缓的；不小心的
meanings.meaning_en: If someone is remiss, they are careless about doing things that ought to be done
meanings.example: I would be remiss if I did not do something about it.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我对此不做点儿什么，就是懈怠。

meanings.meaning_en: to become more important, powerful, famous etc than someone or something else, so that they are no longer noticed
meanings.example: The economy had eclipsed the environment as an election issue.
meanings.example_cn: 经济作为竞选话题已经盖过环境问题。

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when the sun or the moon cannot be seen, because the Earth is passing directly between the moon and the sun, or because the moon is passing directly between the Earth and the sun
a situation in which people have the same rights, advantages etc
meanings.example: ...equality of the sexes.
meanings.example_cn: …性别平等。

meanings.meaning_en: a taste or love for curios or works of fine art; connoisseurship

meanings.meaning_cn: 戏剧的；急剧的；引人注目的；激动人心的
meanings.meaning_en: great and sudden
meanings.example: A superb goal by Owen earned United a dramatic victory yesterday.
meanings.example_cn: 昨天欧文的一个超级入球为联队赢得了激动人心的胜利。

meanings.meaning_en: Reprimand is also a noun
meanings.example: He has been fined five thousand dollars and given a severe reprimand.
meanings.example_cn: 他被罚款5000美元，并且受到严厉的训斥。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone officially that something they have done is very wrong
impressive and respected
meanings.example: an august institution
meanings.example_cn: 庄严的机构

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone or something deep into a liquid so that they are completely covered
meanings.example: The electrodes are immersed in liquid.
meanings.example_cn: 电极被浸没在液体中。

meanings.meaning_cn: 选举权；投票；参政权；代祷；赞成票
meanings.meaning_en: the right to vote in national elections
meanings.example: ...the women's suffrage movement.
meanings.example_cn: ...女性选举权运动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 好斗的；野蛮的；言词刻毒的
meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone is truculent, you mean that they are bad-tempered and aggressive
meanings.example: a truculent attitude
meanings.example_cn: 凶狠的态度

meanings.meaning_cn: 法警；执行官；区镇的地方长官
meanings.meaning_en: an official of the legal system who watches prisoners and keeps order in a court of law
meanings.example: The court bailiff said jurors did not wish to speak to news media until the sentencing.
meanings.example_cn: 法院法警说，陪审员不想在宣判之前接受新闻媒体采访。

meanings.meaning_en: angry and surprised because you feel insulted or unfairly treated
meanings.example: an indignant reply
meanings.example_cn: 愤慨的回复

meanings.meaning_cn: 最重要的，主要的；至高无上的
meanings.meaning_en: more important than anything else
meanings.example: During a war the interests of the state are paramount, and those of the individual come last.
meanings.example_cn: 战争时期国家利益是首要的，个人利益置于最后。

meanings.example: Women’s role as mothers is of paramount importance to society.
meanings.example_cn: 女性作为母亲的角色对社会至关重要。

meanings.meaning_en: a belief that you have been treated unfairly, or an unfair situation or event that affects and upsets you
meanings.example: anyone who has a legitimate grievance against the company
meanings.example_cn: 凡是有正当理由对公司感到不满的人

meanings.meaning_en: a way of behaving, speaking etc that is not sincere or natural
meanings.example: Calling everyone ‘darling’ is just an affectation.
meanings.example_cn: 逢人就叫“亲爱的”很做作。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of cell that makes up the nervous system and sends messages to other parts of the body or the brain
meanings.example: What it does mean is that, for whatever reason, this particular neuron was activated by this particular scene, almost certainly with a network of other neurons across the brain.
meanings.example_cn: 他确切的意思是:无论是处于什么原因，这个特别的神经元会被特别的场景激活，当然，是和大脑中同一个网状下的其它神经元一起工作的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 尽情享受；使有风味；加调味品于；品尝，欣赏
沼泽，沼泽地；无法脱身的困境
meanings.meaning_en: an area of soft wet muddy ground
meanings.example: In the rainy season the roads become a quagmire.
meanings.example_cn: 在雨季，道路变得一片泥泞。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不合理的；昧着良心的；肆无忌惮的；过度的
meanings.meaning_en: much more than is reasonable or acceptable
meanings.example: The war caused an unconscionable amount of suffering.
meanings.example_cn: 战争造成了太多的苦难。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一队；民防团；地方武装团队
meanings.meaning_en: a group of the same kind of people
meanings.example: ...a posse of reporters.
meanings.example_cn: ...一群记者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 营养物；促进生长的东西
meanings.meaning_en: a substance that gives plants and animals what they need in order to live and grow
Bombast is trying to impress people by saying things that sound impressive but have little meaning
meanings.example: There was no bombast or conceit in his speech.
meanings.example_cn: 他的发言里没有浮夸或自负。

meanings.meaning_cn: （法国封建时代的）城堡；（尤指法国的）别墅
[数] 公式，准则；配方；婴儿食品
meanings.meaning_en: a method or set of principles that you use to solve a problem or to make sure that something is successful
meanings.example: We’re still searching for a peace formula.
meanings.example_cn: 我们仍在寻找和平方案。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使困扰；使烦恼；反复袭击
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone’s life unpleasant, for example by frequently saying offensive things to them or threatening them
meanings.example: A number of black youths have complained of being harassed by the police.
meanings.example_cn: 一些黑人青年投诉称受到警察骚扰。

meanings.meaning_cn: 易燃的；易激动的；燃烧性的
meanings.meaning_en: able to burn easily
meanings.example: The ability of coal to release a combustible gas has long been known.
meanings.example_cn: 煤能够释放易燃气体这一点早已为人所知。

meanings.meaning_cn: [化学] 纯度；纯洁；纯净；纯粹
meanings.meaning_en: the quality or state of being pure
meanings.example: the purity of tap water
meanings.example_cn: 自来水的纯净度

meanings.meaning_en: a terrible and unexpected event that causes a lot of damage or suffering
meanings.example: It will be a calamity for farmers if the crops fail again.
meanings.example_cn: 如果再次歉收，将会给农民带来灾难。

meanings.meaning_cn: 残忍的；野蛮的；无人性的
meanings.meaning_en: very cruel or without any normal feelings of pity
meanings.example: The refugees had suffered degrading and inhuman treatment.
meanings.example_cn: 难民遭受了侮辱性和非人的待遇。

meanings.meaning_cn: 否认，否定；抵赖；拒绝对…的责任
meanings.meaning_en: to say that you are not responsible for something, that you do not know about it, or that you are not involved with it
meanings.example: Dr. Samuels immediately disavowed the newspaper story.
meanings.example_cn: 塞缪尔斯医生马上否认了报纸上的这条新闻。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使多样化，使变化；增加产品种类以扩大
meanings.meaning_en: if a business, company, country etc diversifies, it increases the range of goods or services it produces
meanings.example: We need to diversify the economy.
meanings.example_cn: 我们要使经济多元化。

meanings.meaning_cn: 友好；亲善关系；友好关系
meanings.meaning_en: friendship, especially between countries
meanings.example: a spirit of perfect amity
meanings.example_cn: 亲善无间的精神

meanings.meaning_en: Something that is askew is not straight or not level with what it should be level with
meanings.example: There were no shutters at the windows, and some of the doors hung askew.
meanings.example_cn: 窗户上没有百叶窗，有些门也是歪斜着安装的。

meanings.meaning_en: not quite straight or in the right position
an introduction at the beginning of a book or speech
meanings.example: ...the preface to Kelman's novel.
meanings.example_cn: …凯尔曼小说的前言。

meanings.meaning_en: If you preface an action or speech with something else, you do or say this other thing first
meanings.example: I will preface what I am going to say with a few lines from Shakespeare.
meanings.example_cn: 我将引用莎士比亚的几行诗作为我讲话的开场白。

meanings.meaning_en: the science of numbers involving adding, multiplying etc
meanings.example: ...teaching the basics of reading, writing and arithmetic.
meanings.example_cn: …教授读、写、算的基本知识。

meanings.meaning_en: a difficult part of a long piece of music, which a performer plays alone in order to show his or her skill
meanings.example: So here's Chuck Mangione with his saxophonist and a saxophone cadenza.
meanings.example_cn: 这就是查克·曼卓林,和他的萨克斯手一起演出的一段华彩乐章

meanings.meaning_en: to learn words, music etc so that you know them perfectly
meanings.example: He studied his map, trying to memorize the way to Rose's street.
meanings.example_cn: 他研究了地图，努力记住去罗丝家那条街的路。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有独创性的；机灵的，精制的；心灵手巧的
meanings.meaning_en: an ingenious plan, idea, or object works well and is the result of clever thinking and new ideas
meanings.example: Many fish have ingenious ways of protecting their eggs from predators.
meanings.example_cn: 很多鱼都有绝妙的方法来保护它们产的卵不被捕食者吃掉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流浪者；流浪儿；飘流物；无主物；信号旗
meanings.meaning_en: If you refer to a child or young woman as a waif, you mean that they are very thin and look as if they have nowhere to live
meanings.example: The dirty-faced waif was only five or six years old.
meanings.example_cn: 这个流浪儿脸上脏兮兮的，只有五六岁大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 碰撞；冲突；（意见，看法）的抵触；（政党等的）倾轧
meanings.meaning_en: an accident in which two or more people or vehicles hit each other while moving in different directions
meanings.example: Two people were killed in a head-on collision (= between two vehicles that are moving directly towards each other ) on highway 218.
meanings.example_cn: 218号公路上有两辆汽车迎面相撞，两人死亡。

meanings.meaning_en: to stem the flow of (a liquid, esp blood) or (of a liquid) to stop flowing

meanings.meaning_cn: 适于抓握的；善于领会的
meanings.meaning_en: a prehensile tail, foot etc can curl around things and hold on to them
meanings.example: Only the kinkajou's tail is prehensile, like a monkey's, and only the kinkajou has been a pet for Paris Hilton.
meanings.example_cn: 二者仅有的不同点在于蜜熊的尾巴像猴子一样可以用来抓握，而且还曾被帕里斯·希尔顿拿来当宠物养。

meanings.meaning_en: ribald remarks or jokes are humorous, rude, and about sex
meanings.example: a ribald remark
meanings.example_cn: 粗俗的言论

meanings.meaning_cn: 言谈粗俗的人；说下流话的人
meanings.example: ribald humour
meanings.example_cn: 猥亵的幽默

meanings.meaning_cn: 过度的，过分的；不适当的；未到期的
meanings.meaning_en: more than is reasonable, suitable, or necessary
meanings.example: De Gaulle felt that America had undue influence in Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 戴高乐感到美国在欧洲影响力过大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生物所能分解的，能进行生物降解的
meanings.meaning_en: materials, chemicals etc that are biodegradable are changed naturally by  bacteria  into substances that do not harm the environment
meanings.example: This carton is made of biodegradable plastic.
meanings.example_cn: 这盒子是用生物降解塑料做的。

meanings.meaning_en: containing or consisting of salt
meanings.example: saline solution
meanings.example_cn: 盐溶液

meanings.meaning_cn: 复合，再结合；[遗] 重组
优先的；选择的；特惠的；先取的
meanings.meaning_en: preferential treatment, rates etc are deliberately different in order to give an advantage to particular people
meanings.example: preferential credit terms for reliable borrowers
meanings.example_cn: 向可靠借款人提供的优惠信贷条件

meanings.meaning_cn: 易受攻击的，易受…的攻击；易受伤害的；有弱点的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is vulnerable can be easily harmed or hurt
meanings.example: He took advantage of me when I was at my most vulnerable.
meanings.example_cn: 他在我最脆弱的时候利用了我。

meanings.meaning_cn: 数字；手指或足趾；一指宽
meanings.meaning_en: one of the written signs that represent the numbers 0 to 9
meanings.example: Her telephone number differs from mine by one digit.
meanings.example_cn: 她的电话号码跟我的差一个数字。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of strong dislike towards someone or something
meanings.example: ...the voting public's antipathy toward the president.
meanings.example_cn: …投票民众对总统的憎恶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 肉体的；肉欲的；淫荡的；性欲的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to sex or someone’s body
meanings.example: carnal desires
meanings.example_cn: 肉欲

meanings.meaning_en: when you do something very quietly, slowly or secretly, so that no one notices you
meanings.example: Cats rely on stealth to catch their prey.
meanings.example_cn: 猫科动物靠偷袭捕捉猎物。

meanings.meaning_en: a drinking cup with straight sides and no handle, usually made of plastic

meanings.example: I know you, you scoundrel! I have heard of you before. You are Holmes, the meddler.
meanings.example_cn: 我知道你，这个恶棍。我以前听过你。你是福尔摩斯，爱管闲事的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正派的；得体的；相当好的
meanings.meaning_en: of a good enough standard or quality
meanings.example: a decent salary
meanings.example_cn: 不错的工资待遇

meanings.meaning_cn: 卓越的；超常的；出类拔萃的
meanings.meaning_en: going far beyond ordinary limits
meanings.example: the transcendent genius of Mozart
meanings.example_cn: 莫扎特的超凡天才

meanings.meaning_en: to change the sound of your voice
meanings.example: He carefully modulated his voice.
meanings.example_cn: 他仔细地调节了自己的声音。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不幸的；麻烦的；倔强的；困难的
meanings.example: The surveyor's report didn't highlight anything untoward.
meanings.example_cn: 测量员的报告没有强调有出乎意料的困难。

meanings.meaning_en: Iron is an element that usually takes the form of a hard, dark grey metal. It is used to make steel, and also forms part of many tools, buildings, and vehicles. Very small amounts of iron occur in your blood and in food.
meanings.example: The huge, iron gate was locked.
meanings.example_cn: 那扇巨大的铁门被锁上了。

meanings.meaning_en: If you iron clothes, you remove the creases from them using an iron
meanings.example: ...the highest grade iron ore deposits in the world.
meanings.example_cn: …世界上最优质的铁矿床。

meanings.meaning_en: You can use iron to describe the character or behaviour of someone who is very firm in their decisions and actions, or who can control their feelings well
meanings.example: She used to iron his shirts.
meanings.example_cn: 她过去常给他熨衬衫。

meanings.meaning_en: to praise someone or something publicly
meanings.example: His work was acclaimed by art critics.
meanings.example_cn: 他的作品得到艺术评论家的推崇。

meanings.meaning_en: Acclaim is public praise for someone or something
meanings.example: Angela Bassett has won critical acclaim for her excellent performance.
meanings.example_cn: 安杰拉·巴西特因她出色的表演而赢得了评论界的赞扬。

meanings.meaning_en: to stick firmly to something
a type of plant with green leaves shaped like large feathers, but no flowers
meanings.example: A ladder fern springs from a crack in the 1979 lava flows from Kilauea Volcano on the Big Island of Hawaii.
meanings.example_cn: 1979年，夏威夷大岛上蕨类植物生长在基拉韦厄火山所流出的阶梯形的岩浆上。

meanings.meaning_en: not having much experience of how complicated life is, so that you trust people too much and believe that good things will always happen
meanings.example: a naive young girl
meanings.example_cn: 天真的小女孩

meanings.meaning_en: so upset and worried that you cannot think clearly
meanings.example: Relatives are tonight comforting the distraught parents.
meanings.example_cn: 亲戚们今晚都在安慰这对忧心如焚的父母。

meanings.meaning_en: showing too much interest in sex
meanings.example: the media’s love of salacious gossip
meanings.example_cn: 媒体对传播桃色八卦的热衷

meanings.meaning_cn: 目空一切的，高傲的；傲慢的，自大的
meanings.meaning_en: behaving as if you think that other people are less important than you – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: supercilious wine waiters
meanings.example_cn: 傲慢的侍酒师

meanings.meaning_en: a tall African animal with a very long neck and legs and dark spots on its yellow-brown fur
meanings.example: Can I get the mommy giraffe for Christmas?
meanings.example_cn: 我在圣诞节能得到一个长颈鹿妈妈吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 明了的；清晰明白的；易懂的
meanings.meaning_en: (of speech or writing) easily understood; lucid
to give something, especially money, to a person or an organization in order to help them
meanings.example: people who volunteer to donate blood
meanings.example_cn: 自愿献血者

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of outer clothing worn by women and girls, which hangs down from the waist like the bottom part of a dress
meanings.example: She wore a white blouse and a plain black skirt.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿着白衬衣和纯黑的裙子。

meanings.meaning_en: to avoid talking about an important subject, especially because it is difficult or embarrassing – used to show disapproval
to succeed in getting information or a reaction from someone, especially when this is difficult
meanings.example: When her knock elicited no response, she opened the door and peeped in.
meanings.example_cn: 敲门没有回应，她便推开门往里张望。

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 整数；整体；完整的事物
meanings.meaning_en: a whole number
meanings.example: 6 is an integer, but 6.4 is not.
meanings.example_cn: 6是整数，而6.4不是。

meanings.meaning_en: the official leaders of religious activities in organized religions, such as priests,  rabbi s  , and  mullah s
meanings.example: Thus, his preaching was directed at not only the laity, but the clergy as well.
meanings.example_cn: 因此，他的讲道面向的不只是世俗之人，也面向神职人员。

meanings.meaning_cn: 恭维；称赞；问候；致意；道贺
meanings.meaning_en: a remark that shows you admire someone or something
meanings.example: All the guests paid her extravagant compliments.
meanings.example_cn: 所有客人都对她赞不绝口。

meanings.meaning_en: to say something nice to someone in order to praise them
meanings.example: Being compared to Abba is a great compliment.
meanings.example_cn: 能和阿巴乐队相提并论是极大的赞誉。

meanings.meaning_en: completely clear and without any possibility of doubt
meanings.example: His answer was an unequivocal ‘No.’
meanings.example_cn: 他的回答是毫不含糊的“不”。

meanings.meaning_en: unable or unwilling to believe something
meanings.example: ‘You sold the car?’ she asked, incredulous.
meanings.example_cn: “你把车卖了？”她难以置信地问道。

meanings.meaning_en: a quick look at someone or something that does not allow you to see them clearly
meanings.example: Some of the fans had waited 24 hours outside the hotel to catch a glimpse of their heroine.
meanings.example_cn: 某些追星族为了一睹女杰的风采已在宾馆外守候了24小时。

meanings.meaning_en: to see someone or something for a moment without getting a complete view of them
water that contains bubbles and is often added to alcoholic drinks
meanings.example: a Scotch and soda
meanings.example_cn: 一杯加苏打水的苏格兰威士忌

meanings.meaning_en: altruistic behaviour shows that you care about and will help other people, even though this brings no advantage for yourself
meanings.example: Were his motives entirely altruistic?
meanings.example_cn: 他的动机是完全无私的吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 苍白的；暗淡的；无生气的
meanings.meaning_en: very pale, especially in a way that looks weak or unhealthy
meanings.example: pallid cheeks
meanings.example_cn: 苍白的脸颊

meanings.meaning_cn: （权利的）转让，出让；（领土的）割让
meanings.meaning_en: the act of giving up land, property, or rights, especially to another country after a war, or something that is given up in this way
meanings.example: Spanish cession of the territory in 1818
meanings.example_cn: 1818年西班牙割让的领土

meanings.meaning_en: food supplies for horses and cattle
meanings.example: Do notlet animals graze until you are notified that forage in your area is safe.
meanings.example_cn: 得到你所在区域的饲料安全的通知前，不要让动物吃青草。

meanings.meaning_en: to go around searching for food or other supplies
showing a lot of knowledge based on careful study
meanings.example: There’s also the intrinsic pleasure you get from boosting your knowledge and becoming more erudite.
meanings.example_cn: 这也有利于你发自内心地努力奋进获得更多学识变得更博学。

meanings.example: The supreme symbol for the author is the word; the erudite Hirst in The Voyage Out has the forename St John recalling the evangelist whose opening line was ‘In the beginning was the Word’.
meanings.example_cn: 文字是作家最有力的表达符号，《远航》中博学的赫斯特的教名为圣·约翰，取自感召福音的传教士之名。 他在小说中的开场白为：“语言是世界的初始”。

meanings.example: postcards that have been retouched to cover the grey skies
meanings.example_cn: 经过修饰把灰色天空掩盖起来的明信片

meanings.meaning_en: to improve a picture or photograph by painting over marks or making other small changes
an idea about what something is like, or a general understanding of something
meanings.example: the original conception of the book
meanings.example_cn: 此书最初的构想

meanings.meaning_cn: 根据；证明；正当理由；委任状
meanings.meaning_en: a legal document that is signed by a judge, allowing the police to take a particular action
meanings.example: There is no warrant for copying other people’s work.
meanings.example_cn: 剽窃他人作品毫无道理。

meanings.meaning_en: to promise that something is true

meanings.meaning_cn: 身体；主体；大量；团体；主要部分
meanings.meaning_en: the physical structure of a person or animal
meanings.example: the human body
meanings.example_cn: 人体

meanings.example: My fingers were numb and my whole body ached.
meanings.example_cn: 我手指麻木，浑身疼痛。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of anxiety or fear about something that is going to happen
meanings.example: With some trepidation, I opened the door.

meanings.example: The plant makes alumina -- a derivative of the metal ore bauxite that is used to make aluminum.
meanings.example_cn: 这家工厂生产矾土。 矾土是金属矿石铝土矿的衍生品，用来制造金属铝。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove all the parts of a book, play etc that you think might offend someone – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: a bowdlerized version of ‘Antony and Cleopatra’
meanings.example_cn: 《安东尼和克里奥帕特拉》的删节本

meanings.meaning_cn: 强大的，强盛的；有势力的，有权力的
meanings.meaning_en: powerful
to make a very high loud sound, especially because you are afraid, angry, excited, or in pain
meanings.example: They were dragged from their homes, shrieking and weeping.
meanings.example_cn: 他们哭喊着被人从家里拖出去。

meanings.meaning_en: a loud high sound made because you are frightened, excited, angry etc
meanings.example: He shrieked in agony.
meanings.example_cn: 他痛苦地尖叫起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to respect and admire someone or something
meanings.example: Peden was greatly esteemed by the people of Ayrshire.
meanings.example_cn: 佩登深受艾尔郡人的尊敬。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of respect for someone, or a good opinion of someone
meanings.example: He was esteemed as a literary wit.
meanings.example_cn: 他被尊为文学才子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 勤勉的；用功的，费尽心血的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is diligent works hard and is careful and thorough
meanings.example: a diligent student
meanings.example_cn: 勤勉的学生

meanings.meaning_cn: 放弃；脱离关系；拒绝承认；抛弃；弃权
meanings.meaning_en: when someone makes a formal decision to no longer believe in something, live in a particular way etc
meanings.example: The talks were dependent on a renunciation of terrorism.
meanings.example_cn: 会谈以放弃恐怖主义为前提。

meanings.meaning_en: good and likely to bring good results
meanings.example: a propitious moment
meanings.example_cn: 有利时机

meanings.meaning_en: the number by which another number is to be divided
meanings.example: What in the world does that have to do with my divisor example?
meanings.example_cn: 那么这到底跟我的除数的例子有什么关系呢？

meanings.meaning_cn: 卑鄙的；邪恶的；低廉的；肮脏的
meanings.meaning_en: evil or immoral
meanings.example: a vile act of betrayal
meanings.example_cn: 卑鄙的背叛行为

meanings.meaning_en: to completely get rid of something such as a disease or a social problem
meanings.example: an attempt to eradicate inflation
meanings.example_cn: 为消除通货膨胀所作的努力

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for ever, even after someone has died
meanings.example: everlasting fame
meanings.example_cn: 永久的名声

meanings.meaning_en: to honour or respect someone or something because they are old, holy, or connected with the past
meanings.example: a symbol of Arab courage, to be venerated for generations
meanings.example_cn: 受到世代尊崇的阿拉伯人勇气的象征

meanings.meaning_en: the length of time that something continues
meanings.example: The course is of three years’ duration.
meanings.example_cn: 该课程为期三年。

meanings.meaning_cn: 祝福；赐福；恩赐；祈求上帝赐福的仪式
meanings.meaning_en: a Christian prayer that asks God to protect and help someone
meanings.example: The minister pronounced the benediction.
meanings.example_cn: 牧师做了赐福祈祷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无意识的；失去知觉的；不省人事的；未发觉的
meanings.meaning_en: unable to see, move, feel etc in the normal way because you are not conscious
meanings.example: She was found alive but unconscious.
meanings.example_cn: 她被找到时还活着，但已不省人事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 化石；僵化的事物；顽固不化的人
meanings.meaning_en: an animal or plant that lived many thousands of years ago and that has been preserved, or the shape of one of these animals or plants that has been preserved in rock
meanings.example: fossils of early reptiles
meanings.example_cn: 早期爬行动物的化石

meanings.example: Marine sponges have a long fossil record (= their development has been recorded over a long period ) .
meanings.example_cn: 海绵动物留下了漫长的化石记录。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of digesting food
meanings.example: Too much tea is bad for your digestion.
meanings.example_cn: 喝太多茶会影响消化。

meanings.meaning_cn: 被诅咒的；讨厌的；可憎的
meanings.meaning_en: used to show that something makes you very angry
meanings.example: Study and investigation of this strange idiom lead to the mysterious point of intersection of regular society with society which is accursed.
meanings.example_cn: 对这种奇特语言深入的钻研能把人引向正常社会和那被诅咒的社会幽奥的交叉点。

meanings.meaning_en: if several people or things constitute something, they are the parts that form it
meanings.example: We must redefine what constitutes a family.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须对家庭的构成重新定义。

meanings.meaning_cn: 意志的；表示意志的；发自意志的
meanings.meaning_en: of, relating to, or emanating from the will
to examine and analyse one's own thoughts and feelings
meanings.example: The point is, if you just can't get things done, and this has been going on for a long time, then it's time to self-introspect and find out what this is all about.
meanings.example_cn: 重点是，如果你连完成工作都不能做到，而且这已经花费了很长一段时间，那么是时候该进行自身的反省并找出关于这个的全部原因。

meanings.meaning_cn: [化学] 化合物；混合物；复合词
meanings.meaning_en: a substance containing atoms from two or more  elements
meanings.example: man-made organic compounds
meanings.example_cn: 人造有机化合物

meanings.meaning_en: Compound is used to indicate that something consists of two or more parts or things
meanings.example: ...the big compound eyes of dragonflies.
meanings.example_cn: …蜻蜓的大复眼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合成；混合；恶化，加重；和解，妥协
meanings.meaning_en: to make a difficult situation worse by adding more problems

meanings.meaning_cn: 有礼貌的，高雅的；端正的
meanings.meaning_en: having the correct appearance or behaviour for a particular occasion
meanings.example: It's a very mannered, decorous language.
meanings.example_cn: 是一种非常礼貌且高雅的语言。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赎回；挽回；兑换；履行；补偿；恢复
meanings.meaning_en: to make something less bad
meanings.example: Olivier’s performance redeemed an otherwise second-rate play.
meanings.example_cn: 奥利维尔的表演补救了一出本是二流水平的戏。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to your body’s metabolism
meanings.example: Exercise can increase your metabolic rate.
meanings.example_cn: 运动可以提高新陈代谢率。

meanings.meaning_cn: 明晰的；透明的；易懂的；头脑清楚的
meanings.meaning_en: expressed in a way that is clear and easy to understand
meanings.example: You must write in a clear and lucid style.
meanings.example_cn: 你的写作风格一定要清楚易懂。

meanings.meaning_en: to be afraid and show it by shaking a little bit or moving back slightly
meanings.example: The very words make many of us quail.
meanings.example_cn: 这几个字眼让我们中的很多人都感到畏缩。

meanings.meaning_en: a small fat bird with a short tail that is hunted for food or sport, or the meat from this bird

meanings.meaning_cn: 抵销；使…中和；使…无效；使…中立
meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something from having any effect
meanings.example: Rising prices neutralize increased wages.
meanings.example_cn: 不断上涨的物价会抵消工资的增长。

meanings.meaning_cn: 转矩，[力] 扭矩；项圈，金属领圈
meanings.meaning_en: the force or power that makes something turn around a central point, especially in an engine

meanings.meaning_cn: (向轴、螺栓、圆轮等)施以扭动力；(使)沿轴转动；使(绕轴等)扭转；施加转矩

meanings.meaning_en: the best or most suitable

meanings.meaning_cn: 渴望的；沉思的，默想的；引起怀念的；不满足似的
meanings.meaning_en: thinking sadly about something you would like to have but cannot have, especially something that you used to have in the past
meanings.example: a wistful smile
meanings.example_cn: 怅然若失的微笑

meanings.meaning_en: someone who writes plays
meanings.example: The playwright does something remarkable in this scene, but without any impression of straining after an effect.
meanings.example_cn: 剧作家在这场中有许多惊人妙笔，但并不给人留下竭力追求表面效果的印象。

meanings.meaning_en: to slander
to move around quickly, looking very busy
meanings.example: My mother bustled around the kitchen.
meanings.example_cn: 我母亲在厨房里忙得团团转。

meanings.meaning_cn: 喧闹；活跃；裙撑；热闹的活动
meanings.meaning_en: busy and usually noisy activity

meanings.meaning_cn: 认真的；尽责的；本着良心的；小心谨慎的
meanings.meaning_en: careful to do everything that it is your job or duty to do
meanings.example: A conscientious teacher may feel inclined to take work home.
meanings.example_cn: 一个认真负责的教师可能会想着把工作带回家去做。

meanings.meaning_cn: 思考；精神活动；脑髓作用
meanings.meaning_en: the act of thinking; consideration; thought

meanings.meaning_cn: 必要的，不可避免的；紧急的；命令的，专横的；势在必行的；[语]祈使的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely important and needing to be done or dealt with immediately
meanings.example: It is imperative that politicians should be good communicators.
meanings.example_cn: 政治家应该是很好的沟通者，这很重要。

meanings.meaning_cn: 必要的事；命令；需要；规则；[语]祈使语气
meanings.meaning_en: something that must be done urgently
a good idea about what you should do, write, say etc, especially one which you get suddenly
meanings.example: The Malvern Hills have provided inspiration for many artists and musicians over the decades.
meanings.example_cn: 几十年来，莫尔文丘陵为很多艺术家和音乐家提供了灵感。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使困惑，使模糊；罩入雾中
meanings.meaning_en: to surround with fog
having all angles equal
meanings.example: If you test by the triangle's angles, possible types are right, acute, obtuse, or equiangular.
meanings.example_cn: 如果您用三角形的角度进行测试，那么可能的类型是直角、锐角、钝角或等角三角形。

meanings.meaning_en: to become an acid or make something become an acid
meanings.example: Adding vinegar will acidify the solution.
meanings.example_cn: 加醋会使溶液变酸。

meanings.meaning_en: a large mass of snow, ice, and rocks that falls down the side of a mountain
meanings.example: Two skiers were killed in the avalanche.
meanings.example_cn: 两名滑雪者在雪崩中丧生。

meanings.meaning_cn: 均匀的；[数] 齐次的；同种的；同类的，同质的
meanings.meaning_en: Homogeneous is used to describe a group or thing which has members or parts that are all the same
meanings.example: The unemployed are not a homogeneous group.
meanings.example_cn: 失业者并不都是同一类人。

meanings.meaning_en: very eager to argue or fight with people
meanings.example: The professor had been pugnacious and irritable.
meanings.example_cn: 那位教授好斗而易怒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 山那边的人；教皇绝对权力主义者

meanings.meaning_en: on the other side of the mountains, esp the Alps, from the speaker or writer
when someone says things like this
meanings.example: He was the victim of calumny.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾是诽谤的受害者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 多种子的；结籽的；破烂的；没精打采的；下流的
meanings.example: a seedy nightclub
meanings.example_cn: 一家乌烟瘴气的夜总会

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of slight worry or doubt because you are not sure that what you are doing is right
meanings.example: Despite my qualms, I took the job.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管有些疑虑，我还是接受了那份工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沉默寡言的；无言的，不太说话的
meanings.meaning_en: speaking very little, so that you seem unfriendly
meanings.example: A taciturn man, he replied to my questions in monosyllables.
meanings.example_cn: 他不爱说话，对我的问题一两个字就打发了。

meanings.meaning_en: arriving, happening, or being done at exactly the time that has been arranged
meanings.example: She’s always very punctual for appointments.
meanings.example_cn: 她一向准时赴约。

meanings.meaning_cn: 取代，位移；[船] 排水量
meanings.meaning_en: the weight or  volume  of liquid that something replaces when it floats in that liquid – used especially to describe how heavy something such as a ship is
meanings.example: ...the displacement of traditional agriculture by industrial crops.
meanings.example_cn: …经济作物对传统农业的替代。

meanings.meaning_en: a long tube with mirrors fitted in it, used to look over the top of something, especially to see out of a  submarine
meanings.example: Submarines are most vulnerable to detection when the submarine commander uses a periscope to assess the situation on the surface.
meanings.example_cn: 当潜艇指挥官使用潜望镜对海面态势进行评估的时候最容易被探测到也最容易被攻击。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a judgment about a person or situation after thinking carefully about it
meanings.example: The test was to assess aptitude rather than academic achievement.
meanings.example_cn: 该测试将评估能力而不是学业成绩。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乞丐；穷人；靠救济度日者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is very poor
meanings.example: Mozart died in 1791 and was buried in a pauper's grave at Vienna's St. Mark's Cemetery.
meanings.example_cn: 莫扎特于1791年逝世，当时他被埋在维也纳圣马克墓地的一个贫民坟墓里。

meanings.example: Mozart died in 1791 and was buried in a pauper's grave at Vienna's St.
meanings.example_cn: 莫扎特于1791年逝世，当时他被埋在维也纳圣马克墓地的一个贫民坟墓�。

meanings.meaning_cn: 以对话体写的文章；谈话，会话
meanings.meaning_en: a conversation

meanings.example: The Madagascar is located in African southeast ministry, separating a sound with African mainland, it is to bestrew bramble everywhere over there, cannot the bush of exceed.
meanings.example_cn: 马达加斯加位于非洲东南部，与非洲大陆隔着一道海峡，那里到处是布满荆棘。无法逾越的灌木。

meanings.meaning_en: being part of the nature or character of someone or something
meanings.example: the intrinsic interest of the subject
meanings.example_cn: 该话题本身的趣味

meanings.meaning_en: a comely woman is attractive
meanings.example: Here, a comely woman coach jogs alongside an inmate in the prison yard.
meanings.example_cn: 这儿，一个清秀的女子教练一起和犯人在监狱院子里慢跑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 相应的；[生物] 同源的；类似的；一致的
meanings.meaning_en: having a related or similar position, structure, etc
meanings.example: There are so many important genes on every chromosome that the loss of both members of a homologous pair would be fatal, wouldn’t even get past embryonic development.
meanings.example_cn: 每一条染色体上都包含了数量巨大的重要基因，而同时丢失一对同源染色体将是致命的，生命甚至通不过胚胎发育期。

meanings.meaning_cn: 天真的；坦白的；正直的；朴实的
meanings.meaning_en: an ingenuous person is simple, trusting, and honest, especially because they have not had much experience of life
meanings.example: He seemed too ingenuous for a reporter.
meanings.example_cn: 他好像太天真诚实，不适合做记者。

meanings.meaning_en: a mass of gas and dust among the stars, which often appears as a bright cloud in the sky at night

meanings.meaning_cn: 检举；贯彻；从事；依法进行
meanings.meaning_en: if a lawyer prosecutes a case, he or she tries to prove that the person charged with a crime is guilty
meanings.example: Mrs Lynn Smith, prosecuting, said the offence took place on January 27.
meanings.example_cn: 控方律师林恩·史密斯夫人称案件发生于1月27日。

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone as ebullient, you mean that they are lively and full of enthusiasm or excitement about something
meanings.example: ...the ebullient Russian president.
meanings.example_cn: …精力充沛的俄罗斯总统。

meanings.meaning_en: when you are not in the place where people expect you to be, or the time that you are away
meanings.example: In the absence of any evidence, the police had to let Myers go.
meanings.example_cn: 警察没有证据，只好把迈尔斯放了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 强制；强迫；高压政治；威压
meanings.meaning_en: the use of threats or orders to make someone do something they do not want to do
meanings.example: The defendant explained that he had been acting under coercion.
meanings.example_cn: 被告辩解说他是受到胁迫才那么做的。

meanings.meaning_en: to avoid a problem or rule that restricts you, especially in a clever or dishonest way – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: The company opened an account abroad, in order to circumvent the tax laws.
meanings.example_cn: 为规避税法，这家公司在国外开设了账户。

meanings.meaning_en: expressing sexual or romantic love
meanings.example: Within amatory range, can I also be kind with you?
meanings.example_cn: 在爱情的范围内，我也可以对你好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which someone gets money by deceiving someone else
meanings.example: a big tax swindle
meanings.example_cn: 巨额税款诈骗

meanings.meaning_en: to get money from someone by deceiving them

meanings.meaning_cn: 优先购买；强制收购；抢先占有；取代

meanings.meaning_en: having an eager desire; longing
meanings.example: I am restless. I am athirst for faraway things.
meanings.example_cn: 我心绪不宁。我渴望着遥远的事物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 全体；总效果；全套服装；全套家具；合奏组
meanings.meaning_en: a set of clothes that are worn together
meanings.example: an attractive ensemble
meanings.example_cn: 一套漂亮的服装

meanings.meaning_en: to stop opposing someone or something that is stronger than you, and allow them to take control
meanings.example: Don't succumb to the temptation to have just one cigarette.
meanings.example_cn: 不要屈服于只抽一支烟的诱惑。

meanings.meaning_en: a combination of two or more different things, feelings, or types of people
meanings.example: Pour the mixture into four small dishes.
meanings.example_cn: 把混合料倒入四个小碟子里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 维护，坚持；断言；主张；声称
meanings.meaning_en: to state firmly that something is true
meanings.example: French cooking, she asserted, is the best in the world.
meanings.example_cn: 她坚称法国菜是世界上最好的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 总督；（北美）一种黑色蝴蝶
meanings.meaning_en: a man who was sent by a king or queen in the past to rule another country

meanings.meaning_cn: 变量的；可变的；易变的，多变的；变异的，[生物] 畸变的
meanings.meaning_en: likely to change often
meanings.example: Expect variable cloudiness and fog tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 预计明天多云有雾，天气多变。

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 变量；可变物，可变因素
meanings.meaning_en: something that may be different in different situations, so that you cannot be sure what will happen
meanings.example: Interest rates can be highly variable.
meanings.example_cn: 利率有时会大幅波动。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is an impressive achievement, because it needs a lot of skill, strength etc to do
meanings.example: A racing car is an extraordinary feat of engineering.
meanings.example_cn: 赛车是工程学的一项非凡业绩。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of becoming less, or the amount by which something becomes less
meanings.example: In Spain and Portugal there has been a decrease in the number of young people out of work.
meanings.example_cn: 在西班牙和葡萄牙，失业青年人数已经有所下降。

meanings.meaning_en: to become less or go down to a lower level, or to make something do this
a small model of a person or animal used as a decoration
meanings.example: Michelle and her mother once gave me a figurine of a beautiful black child sitting in a wheelchair.
meanings.example_cn: 米歇尔和她的母亲曾经送给我一座小雕像，是一个坐在轮椅上的漂亮黑人小孩。

meanings.meaning_cn: 禁止；禁令；禁酒；诉讼中止令
meanings.meaning_en: the act of saying that something is illegal
meanings.example: ...a prohibition on discrimination.
meanings.example_cn: …一项对歧视的禁令。

meanings.meaning_cn: 干部会议；核心会议；党团会议
meanings.meaning_en: a meeting of the members of a political party to choose people to represent them in a larger meeting, election etc
meanings.example: ...the Black Caucus of minority congressmen.
meanings.example_cn: …由少数派国会议员组成的黑人核心组织。

meanings.meaning_cn: 召开干部会议；开核心会议

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance produced by your body that influences its growth, development, and condition
meanings.example: ...the male sex hormone testosterone.
meanings.example_cn: …男性性激素睾酮。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有感情的；有感觉力的；意识到的
meanings.meaning_en: able to experience things through your senses
meanings.example: Man is a sentient being.
meanings.example_cn: 人是有感知力的生命。

meanings.meaning_cn: 轰动；巨型炸弹；一鸣惊人者
meanings.meaning_en: a book or film that is very good or successful
meanings.example: the latest Hollywood blockbuster
meanings.example_cn: 好莱坞最新大片

meanings.meaning_en: not likely to be true or correct
meanings.example: The statistics are highly questionable.
meanings.example_cn: 这个统计数据大有问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一丝不苟的；精密细心的；拘泥形式的
meanings.meaning_en: very careful to behave correctly and follow rules
meanings.example: He was punctilious about being ready and waiting in the entrance hall exactly on time.
meanings.example_cn: 他拘于礼数地准备妥当，按时在门厅的入口处等候。

meanings.meaning_cn: 相簿；唱片集；集邮簿；签名纪念册
meanings.meaning_en: a book that you put photographs, stamps etc in
meanings.example: a photograph album
meanings.example_cn: 相册

meanings.meaning_en: the act of saying goodbye, especially in a formal speech
to experience something, especially problems or opposition
meanings.example: The doctor had encountered several similar cases in the past.
meanings.example_cn: 那位医生过去曾碰到过好几个类似病例。

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when you meet or experience something
to think carefully and deeply about something
meanings.example: He ruminated on the terrible wastefulness that typified American life.
meanings.example_cn: 他认真思考了美国生活中典型且非常严重的浪费问题。

meanings.example_cn: 我们不要太吹毛求疵。

meanings.meaning_en: Cavil is also a noun
meanings.example: These cavils aside, most of the essays are very good indeed.
meanings.example_cn: 撇开这些吹毛求疵的意见，大多数论文确实非常好。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to think quickly and make good judgments

meanings.meaning_cn: 插曲；一段情节；插话；有趣的事件

meanings.example_cn: 布朗先生被判疏忽驾驶罪。

meanings.meaning_cn: 君主政体；君主国；君主政治

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical reaction in which a compound reacts with water to produce other compounds

meanings.example_cn: 当水与脂肪和油产生一种被称为水解的化学反应时，其产物是甘油与肥皂。

meanings.meaning_en: a ball shape

衰落；变小；亏缺；退潮；消逝
meanings.meaning_en: if something such as power, influence, or a feeling wanes, it becomes gradually less strong or less important

meanings.example_cn: 我对这个项目的热情逐渐减退了。

meanings.example: The group’s influence had begun to wane by this time.
meanings.example_cn: 此时，这个团体的影响力已经开始减弱。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin metal instrument that doctors and scientists use to examine parts of the body

meanings.example_cn: 对警察贪污行为的彻底调查

meanings.meaning_en: to ask questions in order to find things out, especially things that other people do not want you to know

meanings.meaning_cn: 比喻的；修饰丰富的；形容多的

meanings.meaning_cn: 臭的，散发气味的；芬芳的

to take someone else’s power, position, job etc when you do not have the right to

meanings.meaning_cn: 不重要的；不合理的；不合逻辑的

meanings.meaning_en: an account of events in the order in which they happened

meanings.meaning_cn: 感触不到的；难理解的；无形的
meanings.meaning_en: impossible to touch or feel physically
meanings.example: To the untrue man, the whole universe is false- it is impalpable- it shrinks to nothing within his grasp.
meanings.example_cn: 对那个不真实的人来说，整个宇宙都是虚伪的——都是难以触摸的，在他的把握之中化为子虚乌有。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is overweight is too heavy and fat

meanings.meaning_cn: 长度，长；时间的长短；（语）音长

meanings.meaning_en: the practice of lending money to people and making them pay interest14

meanings.example_cn: 在中世纪，基督徒放高利贷是犯法的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 轻蔑的；[临床] 恶化的，变坏的

meanings.example_cn: 对强硬派共和党来说，“自由”一词已成了贬义词。

meanings.meaning_en: a prolific artist, writer etc produces many works of art, books etc

meanings.example_cn: 韩德尔丰富的歌剧作品

meanings.meaning_en: very eager to please or agree with people who are powerful – used in order to show disapproval

meanings.example_cn: 谄媚的微笑

meanings.meaning_en: to admit that something is true or correct, although you wish it were not true

meanings.example_cn: “那是唯一可行的解决办法。”“对，我想是。”查尔斯承认道。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of an object that is furthest from its centre

meanings.example_cn: 把鸡蛋放在盘子中间，盘边一圈放些蔬菜和香草。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使锐利；将…开刃；给…加上边

meanings.example_cn: 他站在水边，凝视着湖对面。

meanings.example_cn: 他不住地道歉。

meanings.example_cn: 测试表明贝类中的毒素级别上升了。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, thing, or situation that annoys you or causes problems

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 分母；命名者；共同特征或共同性质；平均水平或标准

meanings.meaning_cn: 血的；血红色的；多血质的；乐观的
meanings.meaning_en: of, containing, relating to, or associated with blood
to find information, especially on a computer

meanings.example_cn: 用户可以远程获取语音邮件。

meanings.meaning_en: the right to enter a place, use something, see someone etc
the general spirit or feeling of a period in history, as shown by people’s ideas and beliefs at the time

meanings.example_cn: 他确实非常准确地描绘出了20世纪60年代乡村生活的真实风貌。

meanings.example_cn: 包含无谓暴力内容的儿童书籍

meanings.meaning_en: harmful

meanings.example_cn: 一个备受中伤的政治家

the part of a building that is left after the rest has been destroyed

meanings.example_cn: 一处有意思的古老废墟

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone lose all their money

meanings.example_cn: 被炸毁的办公楼的废墟

meanings.meaning_cn: 周长；周界；[眼科] 视野计

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring electrical power

meanings.example_cn: 100瓦的灯泡

meanings.meaning_cn: 完美的；洁净的；无瑕疵的

meanings.example_cn: 她完美的舞台表演

meanings.meaning_en: the main part of a tree

meanings.meaning_en: strange, unexpected, or unsuitable in a particular situation

meanings.meaning_cn: [电] 变压器；促使变化的人

when you transcribe something

meanings.example_cn: 发音通过一种音标系统标示出来。

meanings.meaning_en: to settle yourself in a place where you feel comfortable and safe

meanings.example_cn: 例如，其一，每个人都具有非凡的合理化能力。

meanings.example_cn: 那位教授被指控剽窃学生的观点拿去发表。

meanings.example_cn: ...围绕一位身价数百万的民粹主义政治候选人的一部喜剧，其预见性近乎诡异。

meanings.example_cn: 17个负债最重的国家

meanings.example: I should not obtrude my affairs so much on the notice of my readers if very particular inquiries had not been made by my townsmen concerning my mode of life.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我的生活方式已经被我的乡邻们详细的调查出来的话我是不会强迫我的读者来注意我的锁事的。

meanings.meaning_en: an important official who represents his or her government in a foreign country

meanings.example_cn: …德国驻波兰大使。

meanings.meaning_cn: 金属线制的；金属丝般的；坚硬的；瘦长结实的；（噪音）尖细的

meanings.example: His body is wiry and athletic.
meanings.example_cn: 他的身体精瘦结实而且健壮。

meanings.meaning_cn: 波动；起伏；挥手示意；摇动；呈波形
meanings.meaning_en: to raise your arm and move your hand from side to side in order to make someone notice you
meanings.example: Enid waved at us and we waved back.
meanings.example_cn: 伊妮德向我们挥手，我们也向她挥手。

meanings.meaning_cn: 波动；波浪；高潮；挥手示意；卷曲
meanings.meaning_en: a line of raised water that moves across the surface of the sea
to order someone to come to a place
meanings.example: Robert summoned the waiter for the bill.
meanings.example_cn: 罗伯特召唤服务员结账。

meanings.meaning_en: niggardly with money

meanings.example_cn: 她笑着说起在湖南养猪的父母的吝啬的生活方式。

meanings.meaning_en: to press a mixture of flour and water many times with your hands

meanings.example_cn: 将面团揉三分钟。

meanings.meaning_en: actions, reactions, decisions etc that are justifiable are acceptable because they are done for good reasons

meanings.example_cn: 情有可原的愤怒

meanings.meaning_cn: 和谐的；协调的；一致的；和声的
meanings.meaning_en: being in agreement or having the same regular pattern
meanings.example: But there's no reason that business can't be a major part of the climate change solution, or that profit isn't concordant with a desire to save the Earth.
meanings.example_cn: 其实气候变化的解决方案完全有条件可以成为一笔大生意，它的利润与拯救地球的期望相比，是完全协调的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拆除；取消；解散；除掉…的覆盖物
meanings.meaning_en: If you dismantle a machine or structure, you carefully separate it into its different parts
meanings.example: He asked for immediate help from the United States to dismantle the warheads.
meanings.example_cn: 他向美国请求即时援助，拆除弹头。

meanings.example: She conducted an orchestra of forty instruments.
meanings.example_cn: 她在一个拥有40种乐器的管弦乐队里当指挥。

meanings.meaning_en: a place in the wall of a room that is built further back than the rest of the wall
meanings.example: In the alcoves on either side of the fire were bookshelves.
meanings.example_cn: 凹室内炉火的两侧是书架。

meanings.meaning_cn: 比…重（在重量上）；比…重要；比…有价值
meanings.meaning_en: to be more important or valuable than something else
meanings.example: The benefits of the scheme outweigh the disadvantages.
meanings.example_cn: 这项计划利大于弊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 债券；结合；约定；粘合剂；纽带
meanings.meaning_en: an official document promising that a government or company will pay back money that it has borrowed, often with  interest
meanings.example: My father put all his money into stock market bonds.
meanings.example_cn: 我父亲把他所有的钱都投在上市债券上。

meanings.meaning_en: if two things bond with each other, they become firmly fixed together, especially after they have been joined with glue
meanings.example: furious trading on the bond market
meanings.example_cn: 债券市场疯狂的交易

meanings.meaning_cn: 奉献的（副词votively）；献纳的；诚心祈求的
meanings.meaning_en: offered, given, undertaken, performed or dedicated in fulfilment of or in accordance with a vow

meanings.meaning_cn: 乐观的；满怀希望的；面色红润的
meanings.meaning_en: happy and hopeful about the future
meanings.example: a sanguine view
meanings.example_cn: 乐观的态度

meanings.meaning_cn: 逼真，貌似真实；逼真的事物
meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being true or real
meanings.example: questions about the verisimilitude of the document
meanings.example_cn: 针对这份文件的真实性提出的问题

meanings.meaning_cn: 谨慎的；机警的；惟恐的；考虑周到的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is wary is careful because they think something might be dangerous or harmful
meanings.example: Keep a wary eye on the weather before you set sail.
meanings.example_cn: 出航前要密切注意天气。

meanings.meaning_en: a quantity such as force that has a direction as well as size
having three parts or involving three groups, people, events etc
meanings.example: a triple murder investigation
meanings.example_cn: 对一宗三重谋杀案的调查

meanings.example: a triple bill of horror movies
meanings.example_cn: 三部恐怖电影的连续放映

meanings.meaning_en: to increase by three times as much, or to make something do this
meanings.example: the triple world champion
meanings.example_cn: 三连冠世界冠军

meanings.meaning_cn: 平均的；卑鄙的；低劣的；吝啬的
meanings.meaning_en: not wanting to spend money, or not wanting to use much of something
meanings.example: He’s too mean to buy a present for his wife.
meanings.example_cn: 他很吝啬，给他妻子买件礼物都不肯。

meanings.meaning_en: to intend to do something or intend that someone else should do something
the average amount, figure, or value
if liquid, light, or air percolates somewhere, it passes slowly through a material that has very small holes in it
meanings.example: Rain water will only percolate through slowly.
meanings.example_cn: 雨水只会慢慢地渗进来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 扰乱；使…混乱；使…心绪不宁
meanings.meaning_en: If something perturbs you, it worries you quite a lot
meanings.example: What perturbs me is that magazine articles are so much shorter nowadays.
meanings.example_cn: 让我不安的是现在杂志文章都短多了。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of time that someone or something lives
meanings.example: The ancient Chinese claimed that garlic promoted longevity.
meanings.example_cn: 中国古人说蒜能延寿。

meanings.meaning_en: a union of two or more political parties that allows them to form a government or fight an election together
meanings.example: the centre-right coalition government
meanings.example_cn: 政治上中间偏右的联合政府

meanings.meaning_en: existing or popular for only a short time
meanings.example: Fashion is by nature ephemeral.
meanings.example_cn: 从本质上说，时尚不过是一时的潮流。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不道德的；邪恶的；淫荡的
meanings.meaning_en: morally wrong
meanings.example: Deliberately making people suffer is immoral.
meanings.example_cn: 故意使人吃苦头是不道德的。

meanings.meaning_en: full of strong feeling and emotion
meanings.example: She appeared on television to make an impassioned plea for help.
meanings.example_cn: 她在电视上恳切地请求人们帮助。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使充满激情（impassion的过去式和过去分词）
meanings.example: an impassioned speech
meanings.example_cn: 激昂的演讲

meanings.meaning_cn: 奉献；使神圣；供神用；献身于
meanings.example: The bones will be reburied in consecrated ground .
meanings.example_cn: 尸骨将被重新安葬在圣地里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 承认；公开宣称；坦率承认
meanings.meaning_en: to make a public statement about something you believe in
meanings.example: He avowed his commitment to Marxist ideals.
meanings.example_cn: 他宣称对马克思主义理想矢志不渝。

meanings.meaning_en: a good knowledge of a particular subject or place
meanings.example: I miss the familiarity of home.
meanings.example_cn: 我怀念家的那种亲切感。

meanings.meaning_en: the material that everything in the universe is made of, including solids, liquids, and gases
meanings.example: particles of matter
meanings.example_cn: 物质的微粒

meanings.meaning_en: to be important, especially to be important to you, or to have an effect on what happens

meanings.meaning_cn: 疯狂的；精神错乱的；愚蠢的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone's behaviour or ideas as lunatic, you think they are very foolish and possibly dangerous
meanings.example: ...the operation of the market taken to lunatic extremes.
meanings.example_cn: …疯狂到极点的市场运作。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who behaves in a crazy or very stupid way – often used humorously
a movement of part of your body, especially your hands or head, to show what you mean or how you feel
meanings.example: Luke made an obscene gesture with his finger.
meanings.example_cn: 卢克用手指做了一个下流的手势。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your hand, arm, or head to tell someone something, or show them what you mean
a solid substance that has been chemically separated from a liquid
meanings.example: The riot was precipitated when four black men were arrested.
meanings.example_cn: 这场骚乱是因为四名黑人男子的被捕而突然引发的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使沉淀；促成；猛抛；使陷入
meanings.meaning_en: to make something serious happen suddenly or more quickly than was expected
meanings.example: I don't think we should make precipitate decisions.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为我们不应该做出仓促的决定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 突如其来的；猛地落下的；急促的
meanings.meaning_en: A precipitate action or decision happens or is made more quickly or suddenly than most people think is sensible

meanings.meaning_cn: 抽筋的；急动的；不平稳的
meanings.meaning_en: jerky movements are rough, with many starts and stops
meanings.example: His skin was dry and hot, his breathing rapid and jerky.
meanings.example_cn: 他的皮肤又干又热，呼吸急促不匀。

meanings.meaning_en: meat that has been cut into thin pieces and dried in the sun or with smoke
meanings.example: The bus came to a jerky halt.
meanings.example_cn: 公共汽车颠簸着停了下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奇迹，奇事；奇才；奇观；预兆
meanings.meaning_en: A prodigy is someone young who has a great natural ability for something such as music, mathematics, or sports
meanings.example: The Russian tennis prodigy is well on the way to becoming the youngest world champion of all time.
meanings.example_cn: 这位俄罗斯网球奇才已很有望成为历史上最年轻的世界冠军。

meanings.meaning_cn: 意外事故；伤亡人员；急诊室
meanings.meaning_en: the part of a hospital that people are taken to when they are hurt in an accident or suddenly become ill
meanings.example: Our aim is to reduce road casualties .
meanings.example_cn: 我们的目标是减少交通事故的伤亡人数。

meanings.meaning_cn: 国内的；家庭的；驯养的；一心只管家务的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to or happening in one particular country and not involving any other countries
meanings.example: Unfortunately his domestic life wasn’t very happy.
meanings.example_cn: 不幸的是，他的家庭生活并不幸福。

meanings.meaning_en: a servant who works in a large house
to agree to a suggestion, idea etc after considering it carefully
meanings.example: I assented to the request of the American publishers to write this book.
meanings.example_cn: 我同意了美国出版商们写这本书的请求。

meanings.meaning_en: approval or agreement from someone who has authority

meanings.example: Curiger sees “a lot of commonalities between the Venetian master's quest and the eagerness of some contemporary artists to defy the conventions which beleaguer art in our time.”
meanings.example_cn: Curiger 看到“在威尼斯大师的探求和当代艺术家热心反抗习俗中的许多共性，在我们这个时代，艺术被围攻，这些当代艺术家们敢公然反抗习俗。”

meanings.meaning_en: someone who murders an important person
meanings.example: Kennedy’s assassin is assumed to have been Lee Harvey Oswald.
meanings.example_cn: 暗杀肯尼迪的人据说是李·哈维·奥斯瓦尔德。

meanings.meaning_cn: 远景，狭长的街景；展望；回顾
meanings.meaning_en: a view of a large area of beautiful scenery
meanings.example: Exchange programs open up new vistas for students.
meanings.example_cn: 交流计划为学生展现了新的前景。

meanings.meaning_cn: 装备；供以军用品，供以服装
meanings.meaning_en: to provide with equipment or dress, esp military
best or most important
meanings.example: one of Dublin’s premier hotels
meanings.example_cn: 都柏林最好的酒店之一

meanings.meaning_en: a  prime minister  – used in news reports
insincere or dishonest words or behaviour
meanings.example: He dismissed the prime minister’s comments as ‘pure humbug’.
meanings.example_cn: 他对首相的评论不屑一顾，认为是“纯粹的假道学”。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有实质的；大量的；真实的；独立存在的
meanings.meaning_en: dealing with things that are important or real
meanings.example: They plan to meet again in Rome very soon to begin substantive negotiations.
meanings.example_cn: 他们计划很快在罗马再次会面以开始实质性的谈判。

meanings.meaning_cn: 名词性实词；独立存在的实体
meanings.meaning_en: a noun
You can describe something as a boon when it makes life better or easier for someone
meanings.example: It is for this reason that television proves such a boon to so many people.
meanings.example_cn: 正是这个原因电视机成为这么多人的一大福音。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使年轻；使更新；使恢复精神；使复原
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone look or feel young and strong again
meanings.example: I came back from holiday feeling rejuvenated.
meanings.example_cn: 我度假回来，感到恢复了活力。

meanings.meaning_en: Indolence means laziness
meanings.example: As the Cultural relics department warned, the security technology employed in the museum was seamless, so the major fault lay in the security guards’ irresponsibility and indolence.
meanings.example_cn: 正如文物部门警告，目前博物馆安保技术已无懈可击，但最大的漏洞在于人员的意识和责任心，懒惰成性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 文字的；逐字的；无夸张的
meanings.meaning_en: The literal sense of a word or phrase is its most basic sense
meanings.example: In many cases, the people there are fighting, in a literal sense, for their homes.
meanings.example_cn: 多数情况下，那里的人们实际上都是在为他们的家园而战斗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 休眠的；静止的；睡眠状态的；隐匿的
meanings.meaning_en: not active or not growing at the present time but able to be active later
meanings.example: a huge dormant volcano
meanings.example_cn: 一座巨大的休眠火山

meanings.example: This is something I learned as an anthropologist –people love to tell their stories.
meanings.example_cn: 这是我作为一名人类学家所理解的----人们喜欢讲述自己的故事。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement in which two or more countries, groups etc agree to work together to try to change or achieve something
meanings.example: independent organizations and alliances
meanings.example_cn: 独立组织和联盟

meanings.meaning_cn: 可锻的；可塑的；有延展性的；易适应的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is malleable is easy to press or pull into a new shape
meanings.example: malleable steel
meanings.example_cn: 展性钢

meanings.meaning_cn: 伪造；篡改；歪曲；证明虚假
meanings.meaning_en: to change figures, records etc so that they contain false information
meanings.example: The file was altered to falsify the evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 文件被动了手脚，以此伪造证据。

meanings.meaning_cn: 能见度，可见性；能见距离；明显性
meanings.meaning_en: the distance it is possible to see, especially when this is affected by weather conditions
meanings.example: Visibility on the roads is down to 20 metres due to heavy fog.
meanings.example_cn: 道路能见度因浓雾降至20米。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过度的；无节制的；紊乱的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something as inordinate, you are emphasizing that it is unusually or excessively great in amount or degree
meanings.example: They spend an inordinate amount of time talking.
meanings.example_cn: 他们聊天时间长得超乎想像。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缩短了的；被删节的；切去顶端的
meanings.meaning_en: A truncated version of something is one that has been shortened
meanings.example: The review body has produced a truncated version of its annual report.
meanings.example_cn: 这家评论机构出版了一份其年报的删节版本。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缩短（truncate的过去分词）；截去…的顶端

meanings.meaning_en: a small yellow bird that people often keep as a pet
meanings.example: Tommy: I cleaned the bird cage and the canary disappeared.
meanings.example_cn: 汤米：我刚才打扫鸟笼来着，金丝雀不见了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 世界性的；世界主义的，四海一家的
meanings.meaning_en: a cosmopolitan place has people from many different parts of the world – use this to show approval
meanings.example: a vibrant, cosmopolitan city
meanings.example_cn: 一个充满活力的国际性都市

meanings.meaning_cn: 四海为家者；世界主义者；世界各地都有的东西
meanings.example: a lively hotel with a cosmopolitan atmosphere
meanings.example_cn: 一家有着国际化氛围的、热闹的宾馆

meanings.meaning_en: Wavelets are small waves on the surface of a sea or lake
meanings.example: This is the same sound transformed by a different type of wavelet.
meanings.example_cn: 这是用上幅图中同样的声音信号经过另外一种形式的小波变换而形成的声图。

meanings.meaning_en: an ironic situation is one that is unusual or amusing because something strange happens, or the opposite of what is expected happens or is true
meanings.example: Your car was stolen at the police station! How ironic!
meanings.example_cn: 你的车在警察局被偷！真让人哭笑不得！

meanings.meaning_en: an official decision made in a court of law, especially about whether someone is guilty of a crime or how a death happened
meanings.example: The verdict was ‘not guilty’.
meanings.example_cn: 裁决为“无罪”。

meanings.meaning_en: An amour is a love affair, especially one that is kept secret

meanings.example: He came closest to visiting alien worlds through his love of deep-sea diving, its weightlessness and strange life forms.
meanings.example_cn: 他以他深海潜水般的爱去做外星世界访问，探寻那里的失重状态和奇异的生命形式。

meanings.meaning_cn: 系统的；体系的；有系统的；[图情] 分类的；一贯的，惯常的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is done in a systematic way is done according to a fixed plan, in a thorough and efficient way
meanings.example: They went about their business in a systematic way.
meanings.example_cn: 他们按部就班地做生意。

meanings.meaning_en: to be used to something or gradually become used to it
meanings.example: Over the centuries, these animals have become habituated to living in a dry environment.
meanings.example_cn: 几百年下来，这些动物已经习惯于生活在干燥的环境里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大量的；实质的；内容充实的
meanings.meaning_en: large in amount or number
meanings.example: We have the support of a substantial number of parents.
meanings.example_cn: 我们有相当多家长的支持。

meanings.example: a substantial salary
meanings.example_cn: 丰厚的薪水

meanings.meaning_cn: 和谐的，和睦的；协调的；悦耳的
meanings.meaning_en: harmonious relationships are ones in which people are friendly and helpful to one another
meanings.example: The decor is a harmonious blend of traditional and modern.
meanings.example_cn: 这种装饰风格是传统与现代的和谐统一。

meanings.meaning_cn: 智力；情报工作；情报机关；理解力；才智，智慧；天分
meanings.meaning_en: the ability to learn, understand, and think about things
meanings.example: To be good at the game, you need a reasonable level of intelligence.
meanings.example_cn: 要想把这种游戏玩好，需要一定的智力水平。

meanings.meaning_en: Hedonism is the belief that gaining pleasure is the most important thing in life
meanings.example: ...the life of hedonism that she embraced in her youth.
meanings.example_cn: …她年轻时所奉行的享乐主义生活。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不适当的，不相称的；不合身的，不得体的
meanings.meaning_en: clothes that are unbecoming make you look unattractive
meanings.example: Austin displayed conduct unbecoming of an officer and a gentleman.
meanings.example_cn: 奥斯汀的行为不符合军官和绅士的身份。

meanings.meaning_en: to jumble (a story, quotation, etc), esp unintentionally
the act of garbling
taking stupid and unnecessary risks
meanings.example: a foolhardy attempt to capture more territory
meanings.example_cn: 想占领更多地盘的鲁莽行为

meanings.meaning_en: the ability of something to stretch and go back to its usual length or size
meanings.example: the skin’s natural elasticity
meanings.example_cn: 皮肤天生的弹性

meanings.meaning_en: a ceremony that is always performed in the same way, in order to mark an important religious or social occasion
meanings.example: ancient pagan rituals
meanings.example_cn: 古老的异教仪式

meanings.meaning_cn: 仪式的；例行的；礼节性的
meanings.meaning_en: done in a fixed and expected way, but without real meaning or sincerity
meanings.example: the importance of religion and ritual in our lives
meanings.example_cn: 我们生活中宗教和宗教仪式的重要性

meanings.meaning_en: a name given to someone, especially by their friends or family, that is not their real name and is often connected with what they look like or something they have done
meanings.example: Stephen earned himself the nickname Hawkeye.
meanings.example_cn: 斯蒂芬得了个“鹰眼”的绰号。

meanings.meaning_en: If you nickname someone or something, you give them an informal name
meanings.example: When he got older I nicknamed him Little Alf.
meanings.example_cn: 他长大些后，我给他起了绰号“小阿尔夫”。

meanings.meaning_cn: 行话；轻快脚步声；急速拍打声
meanings.meaning_en: the sound made by something as it keeps hitting a surface lightly and quickly
meanings.example: the pitter-patter of raindrops
meanings.example_cn: 噼噼啪啪的雨声

meanings.meaning_cn: 滴答地响；急速地说；发出急速轻拍声
meanings.meaning_en: if something, especially water, patters, it makes quiet sounds as it keeps hitting a surface lightly and quickly

meanings.meaning_cn: 钟摆；摇锤；摇摆不定的事态
meanings.meaning_en: a long metal stick with a weight at the bottom that swings regularly from side to side to control the working of a clock
meanings.example: After several years of Republican government, the pendulum will undoubtedly swing back and voters will elect a Democrat.
meanings.example_cn: 由共和党执政数年后，选民无疑会掉过头来，选出一位民主党人。

meanings.meaning_en: said or written at the beginning of a book, speech etc in order to explain what it is about
meanings.example: as the chairman said in his introductory remarks
meanings.example_cn: 正如主席在开场白中所说的

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone information that should be secret
meanings.example: Officials refuse to divulge details of the negotiations.
meanings.example_cn: 官员们拒绝透露谈判的细节。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling or showing a lot of interest and excitement about something
meanings.example: an enthusiastic supporter of reform
meanings.example_cn: 改革的热心支持者

meanings.meaning_cn: 警惕的；警醒的；注意的；警戒的
meanings.meaning_en: giving careful attention to what is happening, so that you will notice any danger or illegal activity
meanings.example: Please remain vigilant at all times and report anything suspicious.
meanings.example_cn: 请时刻保持警惕，有可疑情况随时报告。

meanings.meaning_cn: 衬托；阻止，挡开；挫败；贴箔于
meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something bad that someone is planning to do
meanings.example: A massive arms-smuggling plan has been foiled by the CIA.
meanings.example_cn: 一项大规模的军火走私计划已被中央情报局挫败。

meanings.meaning_cn: 箔，金属薄片；衬托，烘托；叶形片
meanings.meaning_en: metal sheets that are as thin as paper, used for wrapping food

meanings.meaning_cn: 面向文件的翻译语言（file-Oriented interpretive language）
刺状的；多刺的；尖尖的；难弄的
meanings.meaning_en: resembling a spine or thorn
meanings.example: the spinous process of a bone

meanings.meaning_en: tiredness and lack of energy or interest
meanings.example: Symptoms of anaemia include general fatigue and lassitude.
meanings.example_cn: 贫血症状包括全身疲劳和困乏。

meanings.example: In Britain, a lexicographer (dictionary author) named Samuel Johnson, who lived in the 18th century, coined the word “gray” and supported its use.
meanings.example_cn: 十八世纪的英国有一个叫塞缪尔.约翰逊的词典编撰人（词典作者）。 他杜撰了“gray”这个单词，并提倡使用。

meanings.meaning_en: believing or feeling something too strongly
meanings.example: And one more: Migrating animals maintain a fervid attentiveness to the greater mission, which keeps them undistracted by temptations and undeterred by challenges that would turn other animals aside.
meanings.example_cn: 还有一点：迁徙动物热切关注更大的使命，因而不为诱惑所动，不受吓退其它动物的挑战所阻。

meanings.meaning_en: very many
meanings.example: the myriad causes of homelessness
meanings.example_cn: 导致人们无家可归的种种原因

meanings.meaning_cn: 无数，极大数量；无数的人或物
meanings.meaning_en: a very large number of things
a hospital – often used in the names of hospitals in Britain

meanings.meaning_cn: 移情作用的；同感的（等于empathic）
meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is empathetic has the ability to share another person's feelings or emotions as if they were their own
meanings.example: ...Clinton's skills as an empathetic listener.
meanings.example_cn: ...克林顿作为一位感同身受倾听者的本领。

meanings.meaning_en: to start to use new ideas, methods, or inventions
meanings.example: the need for large businesses to innovate
meanings.example_cn: 大公司革新的需要

meanings.meaning_en: very serious and causing great pain or suffering
meanings.example: a grievous shortage of hospital beds
meanings.example_cn: 医院床位的严重短缺

meanings.meaning_cn: 使蓬乱；使头发凌乱；弄乱
meanings.meaning_en: to disarrange (the hair or clothes) of (someone)
a new word or expression, or a word used with a new meaning
meanings.example: The newspaper used the neologism "dinks," Double Income No Kids.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报纸使用了新词汇"dinks"—双收入无小孩的家庭。

meanings.meaning_en: covered with dirt
meanings.example: grimy windows
meanings.example_cn: 落满灰尘的窗子

meanings.meaning_en: feeling or looking shocked by something you have seen or just found out
meanings.example: Hank looked at her aghast.
meanings.example_cn: 汉克惊恐地望着她。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有说服力的；劝诱的，劝说的
meanings.meaning_en: able to make other people believe something or do what you ask
meanings.example: Trevor can be very persuasive.
meanings.example_cn: 特雷弗有时很会说服人。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two areas that are on the left or the right of an imaginary line, or on the left or the right of a border, wall, river etc
meanings.example: Fuel is cheaper on the French side of the border.
meanings.example_cn: 燃料在边境那边的法国要便宜些。

meanings.meaning_en: to support or argue against a person or group in a quarrel, fight etc
meanings.example: A man stood watching me from the other side of the road.
meanings.example_cn: 有个男人站在马路的对面看着我。

meanings.meaning_en: in or on the side of something
meanings.example: His friends and family were all on the other side of the world.
meanings.example_cn: 他的朋友和家人都在地球的另一边。

meanings.meaning_en: a confused, noisy, and excited situation, often caused by a large crowd
meanings.example: I could simply not be heard in the tumult.
meanings.example_cn: 一片嘈杂声中别人根本听不到我说话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 夜的；夜曲的；夜间发生的
meanings.meaning_en: an animal that is nocturnal is active at night
meanings.example: Hamsters are nocturnal creatures.
meanings.example_cn: 仓鼠是夜行动物。

meanings.example: Her eyes sparkled with merriment.
meanings.example_cn: 她的眼里闪现出愉快的神情。

meanings.meaning_en: to describe the grammar of a word when it is in a particular sentence, or the grammar of the whole sentence
an act of stirring something
meanings.example: Give that pan a stir , will you?
meanings.example_cn: 把那锅东西搅一搅，好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to move a liquid or substance around with a spoon or stick in order to mix it together

meanings.meaning_cn: 确立，牢固；用壕沟围住；挖掘
meanings.meaning_en: If something such as power, a custom, or an idea is entrenched, it is firmly established, so that it would be difficult to change it
meanings.example: ...a series of measures designed to entrench democracy and the rule of law.
meanings.example_cn: …一系列旨在巩固民主和法制的举措。

meanings.meaning_en: to make or become shrivelled
meanings.example: You Have to admit that it is a garden, Even if walking on the wizen ones, Perhaps you lost all flowers once again, but you still didn't lost whole garden !
meanings.example_cn: 即使在凋零的花园中散步，也得学著承认她还是一座花园，你也许一次有一次的失去了朵朵鲜花，但你并没有失去整个花园！

meanings.meaning_en: to make or become shrivelled
to make someone feel pleased and satisfied
meanings.example: He was gratified by Lucy’s response.
meanings.example_cn: 他对露西的回答很满意。

meanings.meaning_en: on fire
meanings.example: She was rescued from a burning building.
meanings.example_cn: 她被人从着火的大楼里救了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: very easy to notice

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage an attitude or feeling and make it stronger

meanings.meaning_cn: 不顾一切的；令人绝望的；极度渴望的

meanings.meaning_cn: 力学（用作单数）；结构；技术；机械学（用作单数）

meanings.meaning_en: to make something lose its effect or value

one of the parts into which a very long poem is divided

meanings.example_cn: 这是斯潘塞笔下描写贪神之洞的长诗的篇章,它描述了对于大地母亲粗暴冒犯的场景。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or used for discovering what is wrong with someone or something

meanings.meaning_en: to make a process or action happen more quickly

meanings.meaning_cn: 统治者，君主；有权势的人

to say that something must not be done, seen, used etc

the act of changing from one bus, aircraft etc to another while travelling

meanings.meaning_en: if a skill, idea, or quality transfers from one situation to another, or if you transfer it, it can be used in the new situation
If you say that a place is teeming with people or animals, you mean that it is crowded and the people and animals are moving around a lot

meanings.example_cn: 一年的大部分时间里这个地方都挤满了游客。

娇养；溺爱（等于mollycoddle）；用文火煮

meanings.meaning_en: boastful
to allow people to do, say, or believe something without criticizing or punishing them

meanings.meaning_cn: 无常的；短暂的；易逃逸的

meanings.meaning_en: to put something in a particular relationship with something else according to their relative size, amount, position etc
behaving in a stupid and offensive way which shows that you do not understand or care about other people’s feelings

meanings.meaning_en: relating to plants or the scientific study of plants

meanings.meaning_en: the yellow liquid waste that comes out of the body from the bladder

meanings.meaning_en: extreme sadness, especially because someone you love has died

meanings.example: That is because Hamas is a terrorist organisation. Its founding charter claims the Holy Land exclusively for Islam and calls for the complete annihilation of Israel.

meanings.meaning_en: a sound that is audible is loud enough for you to hear it

to be the cause of a situation or feeling
