meanings.meaning_cn: 滋补的；声调的；使精神振作的

meanings.meaning_en: a loquacious person likes to talk a lot
meanings.example: He said that despite older adults being less “loquacious” or talkative than their younger adult counterparts, they elicit much more vocal responses when calling.
meanings.example_cn: 他说，不管老人不太“饶舌”还是比年轻同伴更多话，他们呼叫时都能激发更多的语音回应。

meanings.meaning_en: something that happens or exists as a result of things that happened at an earlier time
meanings.example: She received a small legacy from her aunt.
meanings.example_cn: 她从姨妈那里继承了一小笔遗产。

meanings.meaning_en: willing to do dangerous things or go to dangerous places – often used humorously
meanings.example: intrepid explorers
meanings.example_cn: 勇敢的探险家

meanings.example: The impossibility of disproving egoism may sound like a virtue of the theory, but, as philosophers of science know, it’s really a fatal drawback.
meanings.example_cn: 无法否定利己主义可能听上去像是这种理论的优点，但正如科学哲学家所知，这其实是一个致命的缺点。

meanings.meaning_cn: [交] 栈桥，高架桥；支架，搁凳
meanings.meaning_en: an A-shaped frame used as one of the two supports for a temporary table
to change from doing or using one thing to doing or using another
meanings.example: The terrorists will switch tactics .
meanings.example_cn: 恐怖分子会改变战术。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that starts or stops the flow of electricity to a machine, light etc when you push it
a system that allows some criminals not to go to prison or to leave prison, if they behave well and see a probation officer regularly, for a particular period of time
meanings.example: The judge sentenced Jennings to three years’ probation.
meanings.example_cn: 法官判詹宁斯三年缓刑。

meanings.meaning_en: something that protects you from an unpleasant situation
if a price or amount fluctuates, it keeps changing and becoming higher and lower
meanings.example: Insect populations fluctuate wildly from year to year.
meanings.example_cn: 昆虫的数量每年变化很大。

meanings.meaning_en: lazy or not active
meanings.example: He was not slothful: he had been busy all night.
meanings.example_cn: 他可没偷懒：他忙了整整一夜。

meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that is honest and morally correct
meanings.example: ...people of the utmost moral rectitude.
meanings.example_cn: ...道义上极度正直的人。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn around fast in circles
meanings.example: The dancers gyrated wildly to the beat of the music.
meanings.example_cn: 舞蹈员随着音乐的节奏疯狂地旋转起舞。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft gentle wind
meanings.example: There was silence now except for the distant sea, a slight zephyr stirring the trees.
meanings.example_cn: 现在，除了遥远的海浪以外，一片寂静，一阵微风摇曳着树林。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the tubes that carries blood from your heart to the rest of your body
meanings.example: ...Connecticut Ave., one of the main arteries of Washington.
meanings.example_cn: …康涅狄格大道，华盛顿的主干道之一。

meanings.meaning_cn: 说模棱两可的话；支吾， 躲闪；推诿；含糊其词
meanings.meaning_en: to avoid giving a clear or direct answer to a question
meanings.example: He is equivocating a lot about what is going to happen if and when there are elections.
meanings.example_cn: 他含含糊糊地说着很多如果进行选举会发生的状况。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is irreverent does not show respect for organizations, customs, beliefs etc that most other people respect – often used to show approval
meanings.example: his irreverent sense of humour
meanings.example_cn: 他失礼的幽默感

meanings.meaning_en: the practice of teaching or the study of teaching
meanings.example: I’ve learned as much about teaching from learning about marketing as I have from studying pedagogy – maybe more.
meanings.example_cn: 我从销售上学到的有关教育的东西和我研究教育学时候学到的一样多——可能更多。

meanings.meaning_en: if an event is a prelude to a more important event, it happens just before it and makes people expect it
meanings.example: Living together as a prelude to marriage is now considered acceptable in many countries.
meanings.example_cn: 婚前同居如今在许多国家都已被接受。

meanings.meaning_cn: 成为…的序幕；演奏…作为前奏曲

meanings.meaning_en: something that is tedious continues for a long time and is not interesting
meanings.example: The work was tiring and tedious.
meanings.example_cn: 这工作既累人又枯燥。

meanings.meaning_en: dullness of colour, or loss of brightness
meanings.example: His regime was tarnished by human rights abuses.
meanings.example_cn: 他的政权因践踏人权而形象受损。

meanings.meaning_cn: 玷污；使……失去光泽；使……变灰暗
meanings.meaning_en: if an event or fact tarnishes someone’s  reputation  , record, image etc, it makes it worse

meanings.meaning_cn: 核心，要点；[计] 内核；仁；麦粒，谷粒；精髓
meanings.meaning_en: the part of a nut or seed inside the shell, or the part inside the stone of some fruits
meanings.example: The kernel of that message was that peace must not be a source of advantage or disadvantage for anyone.
meanings.example_cn: 那一信息的核心是和平绝不应该成为对任何人有利或不利的根源。

meanings.meaning_en: based on facts or relating to facts
meanings.example: Try to keep your account of events as factual as possible.
meanings.example_cn: 你要尽量如实地说明情况。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可原谅的；（罪过）轻微的；可宽恕的
meanings.meaning_en: a venial fault, mistake etc is not very serious and can be forgiven
meanings.example: a venial sin
meanings.example_cn: 可赦之罪

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone a lot of questions for a long time in order to get information, sometimes using threats
meanings.example: The police interrogated the suspect for several hours.
meanings.example_cn: 警察盘问了这名嫌疑犯好几个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: an endemic disease or problem is always present in a particular place, or among a particular group of people
meanings.example: Violent crime is now endemic in parts of Chicago.
meanings.example_cn: 芝加哥一些地区暴力犯罪成患。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring temperature. It can be shown as a symbol after a number. For example, 70° means 70 degrees.
meanings.example: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
meanings.example_cn: 把烘箱预热至425度。

meanings.meaning_en: an important principle or fact that is always true
meanings.example: the eternal verities of life
meanings.example_cn: 生命的永恒真理

meanings.meaning_cn: 响亮的；作响的；能发出响亮声音的
meanings.meaning_en: having a pleasantly deep loud sound
meanings.example: a sonorous voice
meanings.example_cn: 洪亮的嗓音

meanings.meaning_en: a small insect
meanings.example: There’s a nasty bug going round (=  that a lot of people have caught  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 现在流行着一种很烦人的传染病。

meanings.meaning_en: to put a  bug (=  small piece of electronic equipment  )  somewhere secretly in order to listen to conversations

meanings.example: Mr Bush is a convert to an evangelical Christianity that emphasises emotion—particularly the intensely emotional experience of being born again—over ratiocination.
meanings.example_cn: 布什皈依基督教福音派，该派强调主观情绪，尤其是狂热的再生体验，要凌驾于推理之上。

meanings.meaning_en: government by one person
meanings.example: The citizen politics is a kind of monocracy politics, and the law is the body of people's will.
meanings.example_cn: 国民政治是法治政治，法律是人民意志的体现；国民政治的实现、维持和运用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可逆的；可撤消的；可反转的
meanings.meaning_en: a change that is reversible can be changed back to how it was before
meanings.example: A lot of chemical reactions are reversible.
meanings.example_cn: 很多化学反应都是可逆的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 产生；招致；引起；当…的父亲
meanings.meaning_en: to cause something or make it happen
meanings.example: Hunger begets crime.
meanings.example_cn: 饥饿滋生犯罪。

meanings.meaning_en: a small brown bird that has pointed wings, flies very fast, and is similar to a  swallow
meanings.example: My letter received a swift reply.
meanings.example_cn: 我的信很快就得到了回复。

meanings.meaning_cn: 快的；迅速的；敏捷的；立刻的
meanings.meaning_en: happening or done quickly and immediately
meanings.example: She shot a swift glance at Paul.
meanings.example_cn: 她迅速瞥了保罗一眼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 易燃的；易怒的；易激动的
meanings.meaning_en: inflammable materials or substances will start to burn very easily
meanings.example: Petrol is highly inflammable.
meanings.example_cn: 汽油高度易燃。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance that contains water
meanings.example: ...aluminium hydrate.
meanings.example_cn: ...氢氧化铝。

meanings.meaning_en: to express doubt about or opposition to a plan or suggestion
meanings.example: They demurred politely, but finally agreed to stay.
meanings.example_cn: 他们礼貌地推却，但最后还是同意留下。

meanings.meaning_en: disagreement or disapproval
a strong pleasant smell
meanings.example: the aroma of fresh coffee
meanings.example_cn: 新煮咖啡的香味

meanings.meaning_en: insufficiently spacious; cramped
meanings.example: I awoke with stiff and cramped muscles from having slept long on the incommodious seat of a day coach.
meanings.example_cn: 由于在座席客车不舒服的座位上睡了太久，我肌肉僵硬麻痹的醒来。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is latent is present but hidden, and may develop or become more noticeable in the future
meanings.example: latent aggression
meanings.example_cn: 潜在的侵略

meanings.meaning_cn: 投降；提交（物）；服从；（向法官提出的）意见；谦恭
meanings.meaning_en: when you give or show something to someone in authority, for them to consider or approve
meanings.example: The deadline for the submission of proposals is May 1st.
meanings.example_cn: 呈交提案的最后期限是 5 月 1 日。

meanings.meaning_en: to change someone’s appearance so that people cannot recognize them
meanings.example: He escaped across the border disguised as a priest.
meanings.example_cn: 他装扮成神父越境逃走了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 伪装；假装；用作伪装的东西
meanings.meaning_en: something that you wear to change your appearance and hide who you are, or the act of wearing this
the study of the rocks, soil etc that make up the Earth, and of the way they have changed since the Earth was formed
meanings.example: He was visiting professor of geology at the University of Georgia.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾是佐治亚大学的地质学客座教授。

meanings.meaning_cn: 复制；再生；生殖；使…在脑海中重现
meanings.meaning_en: if an animal or plant reproduces, or reproduces itself, it produces young plants or animals
meanings.example: The turtles return to the coast to reproduce.
meanings.example_cn: 海龟回到岸上繁殖。

meanings.meaning_cn: （组织的）层；[地质] 地层；社会阶层
meanings.meaning_en: a layer of rock or earth
meanings.example: people of different social strata
meanings.example_cn: 各个社会阶层的人

meanings.meaning_en: to grow again, or make something grow again
meanings.example: Small nodules form as the liver cells regenerate.
meanings.example_cn: 肝细胞再生时会形成一些小结节。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut words or designs on metal, wood, glass etc
meanings.example: Your wedding ring can be engraved with a personal inscription at no extra cost.
meanings.example_cn: 你的结婚戒指可以刻上个人题字不另收费。

meanings.meaning_cn: 书信的；书信体的；用书信的
meanings.meaning_en: written in the form of a letter or a series of letters
meanings.example: an epistolary novel
meanings.example_cn: 书信体小说

meanings.meaning_cn: 企业；事业；进取心；事业心
meanings.meaning_en: a company, organization, or business
meanings.example: commercial enterprises such as banks and food manufacturers
meanings.example_cn: 银行和食品制造厂等商业企业

meanings.meaning_cn: 平息，缓和；使…平静；使…变软
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel less angry and upset about something
meanings.example: He attempted to mollify her.
meanings.example_cn: 他想安抚她。

meanings.meaning_cn: 诙谐的；爱开玩笑的；滑稽的；(尤指在不合适的时候)开玩笑的
meanings.meaning_en: saying things that are intended to be clever and funny but are really silly and annoying
meanings.example: Don’t be so facetious!
meanings.example_cn: 别这么乱开玩笑！

meanings.meaning_en: the process of giving or getting the right type of food for good health and growth
meanings.example: Nutrition and exercise are essential to fitness and health.
meanings.example_cn: 营养和运动是保持健康所必不可少的。

meanings.meaning_en: related to the process of knowing, understanding, and learning something
meanings.example: cognitive psychology
meanings.example_cn: 认知心理学

meanings.meaning_en: a sign or omen, esp one that is favourable

meanings.meaning_cn: 拉长；伸展得超出的范围
meanings.meaning_en: to extend or expand; stretch out
to set up a tent or a camp for a short time
meanings.example: Try and pitch your tent on level ground.
meanings.example_cn: 试试在平地上搭帐篷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沥青；音高；程度；树脂；倾斜；投掷；球场
meanings.meaning_en: a marked out area of ground on which a sport is played
to make it difficult for you to do something or for something to happen
meanings.example: He died in 1874, heavily encumbered by debt.
meanings.example_cn: 他于1874年去世，负债累累。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is in a situation where they are not protected from something dangerous or unpleasant
meanings.example: Exposure to lead is known to damage the brains of young children.
meanings.example_cn: 已知接触铅会损害幼童的大脑。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical that turns red when it touches acid, and blue when it touches an alkali
meanings.example: Find the right “litmus test”, though, and what is now being done with TB drugs could succeed with any of these as well.
meanings.example_cn: 然而发现了正确的“石蕊试验”，与现在和治疗肺结核药物的一起进行的也会和任何一种实验一样成功。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of having enough courage to take risks or say impolite things
meanings.example: I can’t believe he had the audacity to ask me for more money!
meanings.example_cn: 我真不敢相信，他竟胆敢还向我要钱！

meanings.meaning_en: If someone or something is imbued with an idea, feeling, or quality, they become filled with it
meanings.example: The film is imbued with the star's rebellious spirit.
meanings.example_cn: 这部电影充满了那位明星的反叛精神。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of something that you can hold in one or both arms
meanings.example: He hurried out with an armful of brochures.
meanings.example_cn: 他抱着一摞小册子匆忙出去了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone leave a place or building by using force
meanings.example: Two engines cut out and the plane started to eject fuel as it lost height.
meanings.example_cn: 两个发动机突然熄火，飞机在下降的同时开始喷出燃料。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欢闹的；非常滑稽的；喜不自禁的
meanings.example: a hilarious story
meanings.example_cn: 极有趣的故事

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that emphasizes the good qualities of another person or thing
meanings.example: The green wallpaper is the perfect complement to the old pine of the dresser.
meanings.example_cn: 绿色墙纸是旧松木梳妆台的完美衬托。

meanings.meaning_en: If people or things complement each other, they are different or do something different, which makes them a good combination
meanings.example: There will be a written examination to complement the practical test.
meanings.example_cn: 会有一次书面考试来补充实践测试。

meanings.meaning_cn: 复发的；周期性的，经常发生的
meanings.meaning_en: happening or appearing several times
meanings.example: recurrent minor illnesses
meanings.example_cn: 不断发作的小病

meanings.meaning_en: living or continuing for ever
meanings.example: Plato believed that the soul is immortal.
meanings.example_cn: 柏拉图认为灵魂不灭。

meanings.meaning_en: An immortal is someone who will be remembered for a long time
meanings.example: ...the players considered to be the immortals of the game.
meanings.example_cn: …被认为是该运动项目不朽人物的运动员们。

meanings.meaning_en: to understand something that is complicated or difficult
meanings.example: She cannot comprehend the extent of the disaster.
meanings.example_cn: 她无法理解这场灾难的严重程度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 预先确定；预先决定；预先查明
meanings.meaning_en: to determine beforehand

meanings.meaning_cn: 痉挛，绞痛；[五金] 铁夹钳
meanings.meaning_en: a severe pain that you get in part of your body when a muscle becomes too tight, making it difficult for you to move that part of your body
meanings.example: Several players were suffering from cramp.
meanings.example_cn: 有几名球员抽筋了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 束缚，限制；使…抽筋；以铁箍扣紧
meanings.meaning_en: to prevent the development of someone or something
meanings.example: muscle cramps
meanings.example_cn: 肌肉痉挛

meanings.meaning_cn: 狭窄的；难解的；受限制的

meanings.meaning_en: a sign that something is going to happen soon
meanings.example: The November air stung my cheeks, a harbinger of winter.
meanings.example_cn: 11月的空气刺痛了我的脸颊，这是冬天要来的先兆。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to buy something, use something, or take part in something as a way of protesting
meanings.example: We boycott all products tested on animals.
meanings.example_cn: 我们抵制所有拿动物做试验的产品。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of boycotting something, or the period of time when it is boycotted
a short phrase that contains a wise idea
meanings.example: It's one thing to forget the past, with predictable consequences, as the favorite aphorism goes. But what about those who refuse to comprehend the present?
meanings.example_cn: 正如格言所说，展望未来，忘记过去。话是这样说，但是那些拒绝理解现在的人怎么办呢？

meanings.meaning_en: a wide pile of earth or a stone wall built to protect a castle or city in the past
meanings.example: ...a walk along the ramparts of the Old City.
meanings.example_cn: ...一次沿着老城的土城墙的漫步。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在进行中的；徒步的；准备中
meanings.meaning_en: being planned or happening
meanings.example: Everybody knew that something awful was afoot.
meanings.example_cn: 每个人都知道糟糕的事在酝酿之中。

meanings.meaning_cn: 潜能；可能性；[电] 电势
meanings.meaning_en: the possibility that something will develop in a particular way, or have a particular effect
meanings.example: The boy has great potential.
meanings.example_cn: 这个男孩有很大的潜力。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to develop into a particular type of person or thing in the future
to deliberately avoid doing or using something
meanings.example: I had eschewed politics in favour of a life practising law.
meanings.example_cn: 我选择从事律师职业，有意避开了政治。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is dogmatic is completely certain of their beliefs and expects other people to accept them without arguing
meanings.example: Her staff find her bossy and dogmatic.
meanings.example_cn: 她的员工认为她爱指挥别人而且自以为是。

meanings.meaning_en: the person on a military aircraft who is responsible for dropping bombs
money, property etc that you receive from someone who has died
meanings.example: Lucinda has to fight for her life and her inheritance in this gripping novel.
meanings.example_cn: 在这部扣人心弦的小说里，露辛达不得不为自己的生命与所继承的遗产进行抗争。

meanings.meaning_en: if soldiers pillage a place in a war, they steal a lot of things and do a lot of damage
meanings.example: Soldiers went on a rampage, pillaging stores and shooting.
meanings.example_cn: 士兵狂暴地掠夺商店，不停地扫射。

meanings.meaning_en: Pillage is also a noun
meanings.example: There were no signs of violence or pillage.
meanings.example_cn: 没有暴力和掠夺的迹象。

meanings.meaning_en: to move in an unsteady way, as if you cannot see properly
meanings.example: They blundered badly when they gave him the job.
meanings.example_cn: 他们犯了大错，让他做这份工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a careless or stupid mistake
very noisy, because a lot of people are laughing or shouting
meanings.example: an uproarious party
meanings.example_cn: 喧闹的聚会

meanings.meaning_cn: 使…敌对；使…对抗；对…起反作用
meanings.meaning_en: to annoy someone very much by doing something that they do not like
meanings.example: Do not antagonize your customers.
meanings.example_cn: 不要惹恼顾客。

meanings.example: We can reduce this by avoiding homogeneity in group composition.
meanings.example_cn: 在群体成分中避免同质化，可以降低这种可能性。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something seem small or unimportant
meanings.example: He tends to belittle her efforts.
meanings.example_cn: 他往往轻视她的努力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 宽宏大量的；有雅量的；宽大的
meanings.meaning_en: kind and generous, especially to someone that you have defeated
meanings.example: a magnanimous gesture
meanings.example_cn: 宽宏大量的姿态

meanings.meaning_en: a deep empty hole in the ground
meanings.example: The torrent, swollen by the melting snow, plunges into a tremendous abyss.
meanings.example_cn: 因融化的雪水而高涨的急流泻入一个巨大的深渊之中。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or arriving late
meanings.example: a belated attempt to increase support
meanings.example_cn: 一个迟来的增加资助的举措

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two organs in your lower back that separate waste products from your blood and make urine
meanings.example: a kidney transplant
meanings.example_cn: 肾脏移植

meanings.meaning_cn: 无经验的人；刚会飞的幼鸟
meanings.meaning_en: a young bird that is learning to fly
meanings.example: ...when fledglings are almost ready to leave the nests.
meanings.example_cn: …当刚长出羽毛的雏鸟差不多可以离开鸟巢的时候。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of an all-male religious group that lives apart from other people in a  monastery
meanings.example: ...saffron-robed Buddhist monks.
meanings.example_cn: …身穿黄袍的和尚们。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不屈不挠的；不服输的；不气馁的
meanings.meaning_en: having great determination or courage
meanings.example: an indomitable old lady
meanings.example_cn: 勇敢的老妇人

meanings.meaning_cn: 庄严的，严肃的；隆重的，郑重的
meanings.meaning_en: very serious and not happy, for example because something bad has happened or because you are at an important occasion
meanings.example: a solemn expression
meanings.example_cn: 严肃的表情

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in an unpleasant or rude way because you think you are more important than other people
meanings.example: He was unbearably arrogant.
meanings.example_cn: 他的傲慢让人无法忍受。

meanings.meaning_en: a very big change that often causes problems
meanings.example: political upheaval

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s character, especially the way they behave towards other people

meanings.meaning_en: to officially end a law, or change a decision or agreement

meanings.meaning_cn: 智慧的；明智的；赋予智慧的

meanings.meaning_cn: 切断，毁坏；使…残缺不全；使…支离破碎

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something very badly

meanings.meaning_cn: 发泄；报仇；造成（巨大的破坏或伤害）

meanings.example: But its decline across Europe is not uniform; in each country, the church faces a different mixture of threats and residual strengths.

meanings.meaning_en: to behave in a friendly way towards someone, especially someone who is younger or needs help

meanings.example_cn: 我初到伦敦求学时，他们待我如同朋友。

meanings.meaning_en: with many smooth twists and turns
meanings.example: They followed the sinuous trail deep into the mountains.
meanings.example_cn: 他们沿着弯弯曲曲的小径进入深山。

meanings.meaning_cn: 透镜，镜头；眼睛中的水晶体；晶状体；隐形眼镜；汽车的灯玻璃
meanings.meaning_en: the part of a camera through which the light travels before it reaches the film
meanings.example: a standard 50mm lens
meanings.example_cn: 50毫米标准镜头

meanings.meaning_en: official orders or laws stopping trade, communication etc with another country, as a way of forcing its leaders to make political changes
meanings.example: a resolution to impose sanctions (= start using sanctions ) on DPRK
meanings.example_cn: 对朝鲜实施制裁的决议

meanings.meaning_en: to officially accept or allow something
meanings.example: the threat of trade sanctions
meanings.example_cn: 贸易制裁的威胁

meanings.meaning_cn: 临时的，暂时的；中间的；间歇的
meanings.meaning_en: intended to be used or accepted for a short time only, until something or someone final can be made or found
meanings.example: an interim report
meanings.example_cn: 中期报告

meanings.meaning_cn: 过渡时期，中间时期；暂定
meanings.meaning_en: in the period of time between two events
meanings.example: He received an interim payment of £10,000.
meanings.example_cn: 他收到暂时支付的一万英镑。

meanings.example: cadaverous cheeks
meanings.example_cn: 苍白的脸颊

meanings.meaning_cn: 同时代的人；同时期的东西
meanings.meaning_en: someone who lived or was in a particular place at the same time as someone else
meanings.example: Like most of my contemporaries, I grew up in a vastly different world.
meanings.example_cn: 像我同时代的大多数人一样，我在一个非常不同的世界里长大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 当代的；同时代的；属于同一时期的
meanings.meaning_en: belonging to the present time
to carry (developing young) in the uterus during pregnancy

meanings.meaning_cn: 冒称；霸占；没来由地将…归属于
meanings.meaning_en: to claim that you have a particular right, position etc, without having the legal right to it
to spread an idea or belief to as many people as possible
meanings.example: The shipping industry promulgated a voluntary code.
meanings.example_cn: 航运业对自律守则进行了宣传。

meanings.meaning_en: one of a fixed number of changes in the appearance of the Moon or a  planet  when it is seen from the Earth
meanings.example: We should phase the input and output of the machine.
meanings.example_cn: 我们应该使机器的输入功率和输出功率的相位同步。

meanings.meaning_en: to make people obey a rule or law
meanings.example: Parking restrictions will be strictly enforced.
meanings.example_cn: 停车限制将会严格执行。

meanings.meaning_cn: 救济；赔偿；纠正；重新调整
meanings.meaning_en: to correct something that is wrong or unfair
meanings.example: Little could be done to redress the situation .
meanings.example_cn: 局势难以挽回。

meanings.meaning_en: money that someone pays you because they have caused you harm or damaged your property
meanings.example: Affirmative action was meant to redress the balance (= make the situation fair ) for minorities.
meanings.example_cn: 反歧视行动旨在弥补对少数群体的不公平待遇。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel very unhappy
meanings.example: The thought of taking the exam again depressed him.
meanings.example_cn: 想到要补考，他就心情沮丧。

meanings.meaning_en: anger and hate that will not go away
If someone has poise, they are calm, dignified, and self-controlled
meanings.example: What amazed him even more than her appearance was her poise.
meanings.example_cn: 比她的长相更让他惊讶的是她的沉着镇定。

meanings.meaning_en: to put or hold something in a carefully balanced position, especially above something else

meanings.meaning_cn: 华丽的；装饰的；（文体）绚丽的
meanings.meaning_en: covered with a lot of decoration
meanings.example: an ornate gold mirror
meanings.example_cn: 华丽的金镜子

meanings.meaning_cn: 天使的；似天使的；天国的
meanings.meaning_en: looking good, kind, and gentle or behaving in this way
meanings.example: She had an angelic smile, but a dreadful temper.
meanings.example_cn: 她笑起来像个天使，但脾气很可怕。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that you get from one of your five senses, especially the sense of touch
meanings.example: Jerry realized that he had no sensation in his legs.
meanings.example_cn: 杰里意识到自己双腿都没有了知觉。

meanings.example: The nettles stung their legs.
meanings.example_cn: 荨麻刺痛了他们的腿。

meanings.meaning_en: a wild plant with rough leaves that sting you
a difference between two or more things, especially an unfair one
the number of times that something happens within a particular period of time or within a particular group of people
meanings.example: Side effects from prescribed drugs are being reported with increasing frequency (= more and more often ) .
meanings.example_cn: 处方药的副作用正越来越频繁地被报道出来。

meanings.meaning_en: existing or being produced in large quantities
meanings.example: He could drink copious amounts of beer without ill effect.
meanings.example_cn: 他可以豪饮啤酒而无不适。

meanings.meaning_en: a very important event in the development of something
meanings.example: He said the launch of the party represented a milestone in Zambian history.
meanings.example_cn: 他说该党的成立代表着赞比亚历史上的一个里程碑。

meanings.meaning_en: when you are loyal to your husband, girlfriend etc, by not having sex with anyone else
meanings.example: the importance of marital fidelity
meanings.example_cn: 对婚姻忠贞的重要性

meanings.meaning_en: the top or highest part of something pointed or curved
meanings.example: the apex of the roof
meanings.example_cn: 房顶的尖端

meanings.meaning_en: forgiveness and less severe punishment for a crime

meanings.meaning_cn: 古雅的；奇怪的；离奇有趣的；做得很精巧的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is quaint is attractive because it is old-fashioned
meanings.example: ...a small, quaint town with narrow streets and traditional half-timbered houses.
meanings.example_cn: …一座古朴的小镇，有着狭窄的街道和传统的半木制房屋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 指挥棒；接力棒；警棍；司令棒
meanings.meaning_en: a short thin stick used by a  conductor (=  the leader of a group of musicians  )  to direct the music
meanings.example: The maestro raises his baton.
meanings.example_cn: 大师举起他的指挥棒。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of ending something, or the end of something
meanings.example: This includes initialization, sharing resources, and resource termination or resource clean up.
meanings.example_cn: 这包括初始化、共享资源及终止资源或清理资源。

meanings.meaning_cn: 超速，加速；加速，迅速前行；兴隆
meanings.meaning_en: to be driving faster than the legal limit
meanings.example: I got caught speeding on the A40 yesterday.
meanings.example_cn: 昨天我在 A40 号干线公路上超速行驶被逮到。

meanings.meaning_cn: 速度，速率；迅速，快速；昌盛，繁荣
meanings.meaning_en: the rate at which something moves or travels
characterized by or experiencing a presentiment
something that indicates

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 近似法；接近；[数] 近似值
meanings.meaning_en: a number, amount etc that is not exact, but is almost correct
meanings.example: That is a fair approximation of the way in which the next boss is being chosen.
meanings.example_cn: 那是一个挑选下任老板的大体近似方式。

meanings.meaning_en: a special advantage that is given only to one person or group of people
meanings.example: He had no special privileges and was treated just like every other prisoner.
meanings.example_cn: 他不享受特权，待遇和任何其他犯人一样。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat some people or things better than others
incapable of being blamed or accused; guiltless
to go somewhere with someone
meanings.example: Children under 14 must be accompanied by an adult.
meanings.example_cn: 14岁以下儿童必须有成人陪同。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that you want to avoid something or move away from it, because it is extremely unpleasant
meanings.example: I felt a mixture of amazement and repulsion.
meanings.example_cn: 我感到既吃惊又反感。

meanings.meaning_en: to correct or make small changes to something that is written or spoken
meanings.example: The law was amended to include women.
meanings.example_cn: 该法律经修改把女性也包括在内。

meanings.example: The defendant later amended his evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 被告后来修改了证词。

meanings.meaning_cn: （表面的）粗糙；（气候等的）严酷；艰苦的条件；（性格）粗暴
meanings.meaning_en: if you speak with asperity, you say something in a way that is rough or severe, showing that you are feeling impatient
meanings.example: "I told you Preskel had no idea," remarked Kemp with some asperity.
meanings.example_cn: "我跟你说过普瑞克一无所知"，坎普有点儿不耐烦地说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 深奥的；隐藏的；默默无闻的
meanings.meaning_en: recondite facts or subjects are not known about or understood by many people
meanings.example: Her poems are modishly experimental in style and recondite in subject matter.
meanings.example_cn: 她的诗在风格上时尚朦胧，在主题上深奥难懂。

meanings.meaning_en: using cruel words or physical violence
meanings.example: Smith denies using abusive language to the referee.
meanings.example_cn: 史密斯否认辱骂裁判。

meanings.meaning_cn: 温和的；适度的；有节制的
meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that is temperate is calm and sensible
meanings.example: The Nile Valley keeps a temperate climate throughout the year.
meanings.example_cn: 尼罗河流域全年气候温和。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神秘的；不可理解的；不能预测的；不可思议的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is inscrutable shows no emotion or reaction in the expression on their face so that it is impossible to know what they are feeling or thinking
meanings.example: He stood silent and inscrutable.
meanings.example_cn: 他静静地站着，让人难以捉摸。

meanings.meaning_en: complete honesty
meanings.example: I have always found Bentner to be a model of probity in our dealings.
meanings.example_cn: 在我们的交往中，我一贯认为班特纳是诚实的典范。

meanings.meaning_en: Herbivorous animals only eat plants
meanings.example: " Cornett's attorney, Jack Johnston, said the tooth "looks like it would be from a herbivorous rodent of some type.
meanings.example_cn: 科内特的律师杰克·约翰斯顿说，这颗牙“看起来像是某种食草的啮齿类动物的牙。”

meanings.meaning_cn: 开始，着手；发作；攻击，进攻
meanings.meaning_en: the beginning of something, especially something bad
meanings.example: the onset of winter
meanings.example_cn: 冬天的来临

meanings.meaning_cn: 点火，点燃；着火，燃烧；点火开关，点火装置
meanings.meaning_en: the electrical part of a vehicle’s engine that makes it start working
meanings.example: The device automatically disconnects the ignition.
meanings.example_cn: 那个装置自动断开了点火器。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可以忍受的；足可支撑的；养得起的；可持续的
meanings.meaning_en: able to continue without causing damage to the environment
meanings.example: The government should do more to promote sustainable agriculture.
meanings.example_cn: 政府应该做更多工作来推动可持续农业的发展。

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s ultimate aim is their main and most important aim, that they hope to achieve in the future
meanings.example: The ultimate outcome of the experiment cannot be predicted.
meanings.example_cn: 试验的最后结果无法预测。

meanings.meaning_cn: 热情的；热心的；激烈的；燃烧般的
meanings.meaning_en: showing strong positive feelings about an activity and determination to succeed at it
meanings.example: an ardent supporter of free trade
meanings.example_cn: 自由贸易的热心支持者

meanings.meaning_en: a way of hiding something, especially soldiers and military equipment, by using paint, leaves etc to make it look like the things around it
meanings.example: soldiers learning camouflage technique
meanings.example_cn: 在学习伪装技术的士兵

meanings.meaning_en: to hide something, especially by making it look the same as the things around it, or by making it seem like something else
meanings.example: the camouflage netting over the tanks
meanings.example_cn: 坦克上的伪装网

meanings.meaning_en: an inclusive price or cost includes everything
meanings.example: Not everyone shares his vision of an inclusive America.
meanings.example_cn: 不是所有人都同意他的观点，认为美国是个包容性很强的国家。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone behaves according to a particular rule, belief, principle etc
meanings.example: Holdbrooks has more in common with his former colleagues than he realises: their allegiance to the army is matched by his adherence to faith.
meanings.example_cn: 霍德布鲁克与昔日同僚的相似之处比他意识到的还要多：他们对军队的效忠就好比他对信仰的坚持。

meanings.meaning_en: Argumentation is the process of arguing in an organized or logical way, for example, in philosophy
meanings.example: These are all types of argumentation, and they exist in academia in similar forms.
meanings.example_cn: 所有这些论证方式，在学术讨论中都以类似的存在。

meanings.meaning_en: to wake someone who is sleeping deeply
meanings.example: His banging roused the neighbours.
meanings.example_cn: 他重重的关门声把邻居都吵醒了。

meanings.meaning_en: a general area of knowledge, activity, or thought
meanings.example: the spiritual realm
meanings.example_cn: 精神领域

meanings.meaning_en: using or containing too many words
meanings.example: For once, his usually verbose wife was content to listen.
meanings.example_cn: 他那个一贯唠叨的老婆难得一次愿意倾听。

meanings.meaning_en: If you feast, you take part in a feast
meanings.example: Only a few feet away, their captors feasted in the castle's banqueting hall.
meanings.example_cn: 仅仅几英尺外，俘获他们的人在城堡的宴会厅里大吃大喝。

meanings.meaning_en: a large meal where a lot of people celebrate a special occasion

meanings.meaning_cn: 宫殿似的；宏伟的；壮丽的
meanings.meaning_en: a palatial building etc is large and beautifully decorated
meanings.example: a palatial country residence
meanings.example_cn: 富丽堂皇的乡村住宅

meanings.meaning_cn: 热情友好的；（环境）舒适的
meanings.meaning_en: friendly, welcoming, and generous to visitors
meanings.example: The local people were very kind and hospitable.
meanings.example_cn: 当地人非常友好热情。

meanings.meaning_cn: 政权，政体；社会制度；管理体制
meanings.meaning_en: a government, especially one that was not elected fairly or that you disapprove of for some other reason
meanings.example: The regime got rid of most of its opponents.
meanings.example_cn: 该政权清除了大多数反对者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 穿孔于，打孔穿透；在…上打齿孔
meanings.meaning_en: to make a hole or holes in something
meanings.example: A broken rib had perforated her lung.
meanings.example_cn: 一根肋骨骨折，刺穿了她的肺部。

meanings.meaning_cn: 讨厌的；令人憎恶的；糟透的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely unpleasant or of very bad quality
meanings.example: abominable cruelty
meanings.example_cn: 令人发指的暴行

meanings.meaning_en: to say or write bad things about someone or something
meanings.example: The agency has been vilified by some doctors for being unnecessarily slow to approve life-saving drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 该机构因对救生药物的审批速度过慢而备受一些医生的诽谤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 承诺，保证；委托；承担义务；献身
meanings.meaning_en: a promise to do something or to behave in a particular way
meanings.example: Are you ready to make a long-term commitment ?
meanings.example_cn: 你是否准备好作出长久的承诺？

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone realize that something which they thought was true or good is not really true or good
meanings.example: I hate to disillusion you, but I don’t think she’s coming back.
meanings.example_cn: 我真不愿意让你失望，但我想她是不会回来了。

meanings.meaning_en: Disillusion is the same as
meanings.example: There is disillusion with established political parties.
meanings.example_cn: 对各个确立的政党有幻灭感。

meanings.meaning_cn: 背书；认可；签署；赞同；在背面签名
meanings.meaning_en: to express formal support or approval for someone or something
meanings.example: I can endorse their opinion wholeheartedly.
meanings.example_cn: 我可以全心全意地支持他们的观点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 新信徒；新入教者；初学者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has just started to learn a particular skill, art, job etc
meanings.example: ...the self-proclaimed political neophyte Ross Perot.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个自命为政治新手的叫罗斯·佩罗的人。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that is against the rules of social behaviour or against a moral principle
meanings.example: Orton’s plays transgress accepted social norms.
meanings.example_cn: 奥顿的戏剧违背了公认的社会准则。

meanings.meaning_cn: [力] 惯性；惰性，迟钝；不活动
meanings.meaning_en: when no one wants to do anything to change a situation
meanings.example: political inertia
meanings.example_cn: 政治上的保守

meanings.meaning_en: always wanting more money, goods etc than you need or have a right to
meanings.example: rapacious landlords
meanings.example_cn: 贪婪的房东

meanings.meaning_cn: 压迫的；沉重的；压制性的；难以忍受的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe a society, its laws, or customs as oppressive, you think they treat people cruelly and unfairly
meanings.example: The new laws will be just as oppressive as those they replace.
meanings.example_cn: 新法律将跟被它所取代的那些法律一样不公正。

meanings.meaning_en: official praise or approval

meanings.meaning_cn: 声誉好的；受尊敬的；卓越的
meanings.meaning_en: respected for being honest or for doing good work
meanings.example: You are well advised to buy your car through a reputable dealer.
meanings.example_cn: 你通过一个声誉好的经销商来买车是明智的。

meanings.meaning_en: a generous attitude, or generous behaviour
meanings.example: an act of great generosity
meanings.example_cn: 十分慷慨的行为

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually get more and more money, possessions, knowledge etc over a period of time
meanings.example: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth.
meanings.example_cn: 少数特权阶级继续积聚财富，这是不公平的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 倦怠的；无精打采的；百无聊赖的
meanings.meaning_en: feeling tired and not interested in things
meanings.example: The heat was making me listless.
meanings.example_cn: 炎热的天气使我懒洋洋的。

meanings.meaning_en: to kill large numbers of people or animals of a particular type so that they no longer exist
meanings.example: Staff use the poison to exterminate moles and rabbits.
meanings.example_cn: 员工用毒药来消灭鼹鼠和野兔。

meanings.meaning_cn: [法] 遗嘱认证；处以缓刑；加以监护；在遗嘱认证法庭证明…精神失常
meanings.example: Probate cases can go on for two years or more.
meanings.example_cn: 遗嘱认证案可能会持续两年或更长时间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 遗嘱检验；经认证的遗嘱；遗嘱认证法院管辖范围内的一切事项
meanings.meaning_en: the legal process of deciding that someone’s  will  has been properly made
solid substances that settle at the bottom of a liquid
meanings.example: a thick layer of sediment
meanings.example_cn: 一层厚厚的沉积物

meanings.example: We must arouse them to fight for their own emancipation.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须使他们行动起来为他们自己的解放而斗争。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you need to have in order to live
meanings.example: She saw books as a necessity, not a luxury.
meanings.example_cn: 她视书籍为必需品而非奢侈品。

meanings.example: the Bering Strait
meanings.example_cn: 白令海峡

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow passage of water between two areas of land, usually connecting two seas
to be all around someone or something on every side
meanings.example: He glared at the people who surrounded the tent.
meanings.example_cn: 他怒视着围住帐篷的那些人。

meanings.meaning_en: the most that can be done
meanings.example: The medical staff did their utmost(= tried as hard as they could ) to save the patient’s life.
meanings.example_cn: 医护人员竭尽全力挽救那位病人的生命。

meanings.meaning_en: You can use utmost to emphasize the importance or seriousness of something or to emphasize the way that it is done
meanings.example: It is a matter of the utmost urgency to find out what has happened to these people.
meanings.example_cn: 当务之急是弄清楚这些人出了什么事。

meanings.meaning_en: If you think that someone eats too much or is greedy, you can say they are gluttonous
meanings.example: ...a selfish, gluttonous and lazy person.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个自私、贪食而又懒惰的家伙。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat shape with four sides in which each side is the same length as the side opposite it and parallel to it
meanings.example: OK, so now what the area of this parallelogram?
meanings.example_cn: 那么现在这个平行四边形的面积是多少？

meanings.meaning_en: a long and complicated argument
meanings.example: Don't wrangle with others over trifles.
meanings.example_cn: 别为一些琐事与别人争吵。

meanings.meaning_en: to argue with someone angrily for a long time
meanings.example: In political terms, he will “own” health care: suddenly every shortcoming in America’s system—each delayed appointment, insurance wrangle or botched operation—will be his fault.
meanings.example_cn: 在政治谈判中，他“拥有”医疗：美国政府系统突然出现的每个缺点，都将是他的错误——每次约定的推迟、保险的争论、行动的修补。

meanings.meaning_en: If animals or people gambol, they run or jump about in a playful way
meanings.example: ...the sight of newborn lambs gambolling in the fields.
meanings.example_cn: …初生羊羔在牧场上跳跃的景象。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does not eat meat or fish
meanings.example: Our youngest daughter is a vegetarian.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的小女儿是个素食主义者。

meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is vegetarian never eats meat or fish
meanings.example: dishes suitable for vegetarians
meanings.example_cn: 适合素食者的菜肴

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a way that is different from what you claim to believe – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: It would be hypocritical to say I travel at 70 mph simply because that is the law.
meanings.example_cn: 如果仅仅因为法律规定的时速是70英里我就说自己的行驶时速是70英里，那就太虚伪了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 粗暴的；可恶的；令人吃惊的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something as outrageous, you are emphasizing that it is unacceptable or very shocking
meanings.example: By diplomatic standards, this was outrageous behaviour.
meanings.example_cn: 按外交标准，这是不可接受的行为。

meanings.meaning_en: Crepuscular means relating to
meanings.example: ...peering through the crepuscular gloom.
meanings.example_cn: ...透过昏暗的暮色凝视。

meanings.meaning_cn: 模糊的；含糊的；不明确的；暧昧的
meanings.meaning_en: unclear because someone does not give enough detailed information or does not say exactly what they mean
meanings.example: The governor gave only a vague outline of his tax plan.
meanings.example_cn: 州长只是含糊地大致说了一下他的税务计划。

meanings.meaning_en: a terrible event in which there is a lot of destruction, suffering, or death
meanings.example: From all points of view, war would be a catastrophe.
meanings.example_cn: 从各个方面来看，战争都会是一场灾难。

meanings.meaning_cn: 前兆；预示；迹象；异常之物
meanings.meaning_en: a sign or warning that something is going to happen
meanings.example: The savage civil war there could be a portent of what's to come in the rest of the region.
meanings.example_cn: 那里的野蛮战争可能预示着该地区将要发生什么事情。

meanings.meaning_cn: [医] 恶性的；有害的；有恶意的
meanings.meaning_en: a malignant disease is one such as  cancer  , which can develop in an uncontrolled way and is likely to cause someone’s death
meanings.example: She developed a malignant tumour in her breast.
meanings.example_cn: 她的乳房长了个恶性肿瘤。

meanings.meaning_en: Piecemeal is also an adverb
meanings.example: It was built piecemeal over some 130 years.
meanings.example_cn: 它是在大约一百三十年间一点一点建造起来的。

meanings.meaning_en: a process that is piecemeal happens slowly and in stages that are not regular or planned properly

meanings.meaning_cn: 产品；结果；[数] 乘积；作品
meanings.meaning_en: something that is grown or made in a factory in large quantities, usually in order to be sold
meanings.example: The London factory assembles the finished product .
meanings.example_cn: 伦敦工厂组装成品。

meanings.meaning_en: not working or producing anything
meanings.example: I cannot afford to leave the land lying idle.
meanings.example_cn: 我不能让土地闲置。

meanings.meaning_en: if an engine idles, it runs slowly while the vehicle, machine etc is not moving
meanings.example: The whole team stood idle, waiting for the mechanic.
meanings.example_cn: 整队人干站着等技工来。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle that flies in the air and has wings and at least one engine
meanings.example: It is a big airline with a large fleet of planes.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一家大航空公司，拥有庞大的机群。

meanings.meaning_en: if you plane a piece of wood, you make it smoother or smaller, using a plane
meanings.example: It’s much quicker to go by plane .
meanings.example_cn: 乘飞机去会快很多。

meanings.meaning_en: completely flat and smooth
meanings.example: She slept on the plane .
meanings.example_cn: 她在飞机上睡着了。

meanings.meaning_en: to collect and save large amounts of food, money etc, especially when it is not necessary to do so
meanings.example: families who hoarded food during the strike
meanings.example_cn: 罢工期间囤积食品的家庭

meanings.meaning_en: a collection of things that someone hides somewhere, especially so they can use them later
showing that something is likely to be successful
a place where a large number of historical records are stored, or the records that are stored
meanings.example: an archive of the writer’s unpublished work
meanings.example_cn: 那位作家未发表作品的档案

meanings.meaning_en: to put documents, books, information etc in an archive

meanings.meaning_cn: 容易消散的；逐渐消失的；会凋零的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is evanescent gradually disappears from sight or memory
meanings.example: ...the evanescent scents of summer herbs.
meanings.example_cn: ...夏季香草逐渐消散的味道。

meanings.meaning_en: to make known something that was previously secret or unknown
meanings.example: He may be prosecuted for revealing secrets about the security agency.
meanings.example_cn: 他可能因泄露安全部门的机密而被起诉。

meanings.example: a test that can reveal a teacher’s hidden skills
meanings.example_cn: 能够展现老师潜在技能的测试

meanings.example: She let her short blonde perm grow shoulder-length and dyed it auburn.
meanings.example_cn: 她任其金色短烫发长到齐及肩长，而后染成赤褐色。

meanings.meaning_en: auburn hair is a reddish brown colour
meanings.example: Louise has straight, auburn hair and, judging by the only photograph I have of her, she's in her 30s.
meanings.example_cn: 从我手上唯一一张她的照片可以看出，路易莎一头赤褐色的直发，30岁上下。

meanings.example: He used to train in a local park and mingle with other runners.
meanings.example_cn: 他过去常在地方公园里锻炼，并与其他跑步的人相交往。

meanings.example: In both types of surgery beauty and mental healing subtly mingle, he claims, and both benefit health.
meanings.example_cn: 所有的手术类型中，美和心灵治疗微妙地混合，他声称，都有益于健康。

meanings.meaning_en: new machines, equipment, and ways of doing things that are based on modern knowledge about science and computers
meanings.example: Modern technology makes moving money around much easier than it used to be.
meanings.example_cn: 现代科技使货币流动比以前便捷得多。

meanings.meaning_en: food or drink that is insipid does not have much taste
meanings.example: an insipid pasta dish
meanings.example_cn: 一盘没有味道的意大利面食

meanings.meaning_en: a thin curved board that an artist uses to mix paints, holding it by putting his or her thumb through a hole at the edge
meanings.example: The painter's right hand holds the brush, the left the palette.
meanings.example_cn: 那位画家的右手握着画笔，左手拿着调色盘。

meanings.meaning_cn: 煽动性的；扰乱治安的；参与煽动的
meanings.meaning_en: A seditious act, speech, or piece of writing encourages people to fight against or oppose the government
meanings.example: He fell under suspicion for distributing seditious pamphlets.
meanings.example_cn: 他因分发反政府传单而受到怀疑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 催眠的，催眠术的；易于催眠的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to  hypnosis
meanings.example: a hypnotic trance
meanings.example_cn: 催眠后的恍惚状态

meanings.meaning_en: a drug that helps you to sleep

meanings.meaning_cn: 脾气；（钢等）回火；性情；倾向
meanings.meaning_en: a tendency to become angry suddenly or easily
meanings.example: That temper of hers will get her into trouble one of these days.
meanings.example_cn: 她那种脾气早晚会让她惹麻烦的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使回火；锻炼；调和；使缓和
meanings.meaning_en: to make something less severe or extreme
meanings.example: According to Nathan, Robin has quite a temper .
meanings.example_cn: 据内森讲，罗宾脾气很大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 多才多艺的；通用的，万能的；多面手的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is versatile has many different skills
meanings.example: a very versatile performer
meanings.example_cn: 多才多艺的表演者

meanings.meaning_en: the Pope
meanings.example: The Pontiff celebrated mass in Mexico City.
meanings.example_cn: 教皇在墨西哥城主持了弥撒。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do something bad or violent
meanings.example: He accused union leaders of instigating the disturbances.
meanings.example_cn: 他指责工会领导人煽动骚乱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 折衷的；选择的；折衷学派的
meanings.example: galleries with an eclectic range of styles and artists
meanings.example_cn: 收藏各个流派和艺术家作品的美术馆

meanings.meaning_cn: 折衷派的人；折衷主义者

meanings.meaning_en: to emphasize the fact that something is important or true
meanings.example: The Labour Department figures underscore the shaky state of the economic recovery.
meanings.example_cn: 劳工部的数字突出显示了经济复苏的不稳定。

meanings.meaning_en: Enmity is a feeling of hatred toward someone that lasts for a long time
meanings.example: I think there is an historic enmity between them.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为他们之间存在着宿怨。

meanings.example: a pristine white shirt
meanings.example_cn: 非常干净的白衬衫

meanings.meaning_en: a particular quality in someone’s character
meanings.example: The study found that some alcoholics had clear personality traits showing up early in childhood.
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究发现一些酗酒者早在孩童时就表现出明显的个性特征。

meanings.meaning_cn: 火蜥蜴；蝾螈目动物；耐火的人；烤箱
meanings.meaning_en: a small animal similar to a  lizard  , which lives on land and in the water
plants that are herbaceous have soft stems rather than hard stems made of wood
meanings.example: To their surprise, Ms Sagot and Dr Stevens found that all four of the most sociable species are among those forced to use herbaceous plants, and thus to build ramshackle homes.
meanings.example_cn: 令他们吃惊的是，萨戈女士和史蒂文斯博士发现，所有最善群居的四个种群是那些迫使运用草本植物并因此建造摇摇欲坠的巢穴的蝙蝠。

meanings.meaning_en: to repeat a statement or opinion in order to make your meaning as clear as possible
meanings.example: Let me reiterate the most important points.
meanings.example_cn: 我来把最重要的几点重申一遍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 耗尽，用尽；使衰竭，使空虚
meanings.meaning_en: To deplete a stock or amount of something means to reduce it
meanings.example: ...substances that deplete the ozone layer.
meanings.example_cn: …消耗臭氧层的物质。

meanings.meaning_cn: 身高，身材；（精神、道德等的）高度
meanings.meaning_en: someone’s height or size
meanings.example: Bernard was short in stature, with a large head.
meanings.example_cn: 伯纳德个子矮，头很大。

meanings.meaning_en: a quick look
meanings.example: He gave her a quick glance and smiled.
meanings.example_cn: 他迅速地瞥了她一眼，笑了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 扫视，匆匆一看；反光；瞥闪，瞥见
meanings.meaning_en: to quickly look at someone or something
meanings.example: The brothers exchanged glances (= looked at each other quickly ) .
meanings.example_cn: 兄弟俩互相瞥了一眼。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of forcing someone to leave a place
meanings.example: The headmaster threatened the boys with expulsion.
meanings.example_cn: 校长警告这几名男生说要开除他们。

meanings.meaning_cn: 漏洞；枪眼；换气孔；射弹孔
meanings.meaning_en: a small mistake in a law that makes it possible to avoid doing something that the law is supposed to make you do
meanings.example: It is estimated that 60,000 businesses are exploiting a loophole in the law to avoid prosecution.
meanings.example_cn: 据估计6万家公司在钻法律的空子来逃避起诉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 少说，少报；保守地说；有意轻描淡写
meanings.meaning_en: to describe something in a way that makes it seem less important or serious than it really is
meanings.example: The press have tended to understate the extent of the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 媒体想淡化问题的严重程度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 责备，告诫；抗议；表示异议
meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that you strongly disapprove of something they have said or done
meanings.example: He remonstrated with the referee.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾向裁判抗议。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有差异的；相差的；矛盾的
meanings.example: Even Enrico Fermi apparently did not bother to read Hasenöhrl's papers properly before concluding wrongly that the discrepant 3/4 prefactor was due to the electron self-energy identified by Abraham.
meanings.example_cn: 就连恩里科·费米显然也没有下功夫好好拜读哈泽内尔的著作，才会错误地将3／4前因数的误差归咎于亚伯拉罕的电子自能。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in a difficult or painful situation for a long time without complaining
meanings.example: It seemed impossible that anyone could endure such pain.
meanings.example_cn: 似乎谁都不可能忍受这样的疼痛。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is unfriendly and full of anger towards another person
meanings.example: a cessation of hostilities
meanings.example_cn: 停战

meanings.meaning_en: denoting or relating to euphony; pleasing to the ear
meanings.example: The sound of whistle is euphonious , emotional, and melodic.
meanings.example_cn: 口哨的音色悦耳动听，抒情性极强，极富歌唱性。

meanings.meaning_en: A levy is a sum of money that you have to pay, for example, as a tax to the government
meanings.example: ...an annual levy on all drivers.
meanings.example_cn: …向所有司机征收的年税。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially say that people must pay a tax or charge
a change in a price, amount, level etc
meanings.example: Prices are subject to fluctuation.
meanings.example_cn: 价格可能会有波动。

meanings.meaning_en: a precarious situation or state is one which may very easily or quickly become worse
meanings.example: Her health remained precarious, despite the treatment.
meanings.example_cn: 她尽管接受了治疗，但健康状况还是不稳定。

meanings.meaning_en: influenced by superstitions
meanings.example: a superstitious woman
meanings.example_cn: 一个迷信的女人

meanings.meaning_en: an acrid smell or taste is strong and unpleasant and stings your nose or throat
meanings.example: a cloud of acrid smoke
meanings.example_cn: 一团刺鼻的烟雾

meanings.meaning_en: a small change that makes someone or something slightly different, or the process of this change
meanings.example: Making some simple alterations to your diet will make you feel fitter.
meanings.example_cn: 对你的饮食做一些简单的改变会使你感觉更健康。

meanings.example: So without further ado, I’ll now ask Mr Davis to open the debate.
meanings.example_cn: 不再多说了，现在我请戴维斯先生开始辩论。

meanings.meaning_cn: 灾难的；悲惨的；灾难性的，毁灭性的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is catastrophic involves or causes a sudden terrible disaster
meanings.example: A tidal wave caused by the earthquake hit the coast causing catastrophic damage.
meanings.example_cn: 地震引发的海啸袭击了海岸，造成了灾难性的损失。

meanings.meaning_cn: 伦理学；伦理观；道德标准
meanings.meaning_en: Ethics are moral beliefs and rules about right and wrong
meanings.example: Refugee workers said such action was a violation of medical ethics.
meanings.example_cn: 难民工作者称这种行为违背了医学道德。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea or set of ideas that is intended to explain something about life or the world, especially an idea that has not yet been proved to be true
meanings.example: Freudian theory has had a great influence on psychology.
meanings.example_cn: 弗洛伊德理论对心理学产生过巨大影响。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to understand and realize what people or situations are really like
meanings.example: a woman of great insight
meanings.example_cn: 一位极有眼光的妇女

meanings.meaning_en: a round roof on a building
meanings.example: ...the dome of the Capitol.
meanings.example_cn: …国会大厦的穹顶。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something with something else or with a group of other things
meanings.example: If the mixture seems dry, add water.
meanings.example_cn: 如果混合物看上去干，加点水。

meanings.example: “Please don’t gibe me,” Lydia said.
meanings.example_cn: “请不要嘲笑我，”利迪娅说。

meanings.example: At the gate of the Exhibition, Mr. Khrushchev voiced a gibe about the United States ban on the shipment of strategic goods to the Soviet Union.
meanings.example_cn: 在展览馆大门口，赫鲁晓夫先生以嘲弄的口气抗议美国针对苏联的战略物资禁运。

meanings.meaning_en: a scientific instrument that makes extremely small things look larger
meanings.example: The slightest movement will defocus the microscope.
meanings.example_cn: 最轻微的运动都会使显微镜散焦。

meanings.meaning_en: having the same duration; equal in time
meanings.example: In the new period, the studies of this issue by scholars both in and out of China are isochronous , with more and more achievements and different voices coming out.
meanings.example_cn: 进入新时期以来，大陆学者和港台、海外汉学界对这一问题的探索和论证基本上趋于同步了，越来越多的研究成果和不同声音浮出水面。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可互换的；可交换的；可交替的
meanings.meaning_en: things that are interchangeable can be used instead of each other
meanings.example: These two words are almost interchangeable.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个单词几乎可以互换使用。

meanings.meaning_en: a gas stored in liquid form, used for cooking and heating
meanings.example: Portable stove such as butane or charcoal.
meanings.example_cn: 便携炉，比如丁烷或木炭

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that you have when you think you are going to vomit (= bring food up from your stomach through your mouth )
meanings.example: I was overcome with a feeling of nausea.
meanings.example_cn: 我感到一阵恶心。

meanings.meaning_en: more than enough
meanings.example: an ample bosom
meanings.example_cn: 丰满的胸部

meanings.meaning_en: a situation, condition etc that is close to or similar to a particular one, usually a good one
meanings.example: She was trying to get her thoughts back into some semblance of order .
meanings.example_cn: 她想稍微理出个头绪来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 辐射；传播；流露；发射；广播
meanings.meaning_en: if someone radiates a feeling, or if it radiates from them, it is very easy to see that this is how they feel
meanings.example: He radiated calm confidence.
meanings.example_cn: 他身上散发着沉稳自信的气质。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone’s plans, efforts, or attempts from succeeding
meanings.example: Their attempts to speak to him were frustrated by the guards.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想跟他说话，但被警卫拦住了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 庆祝；举行；赞美；祝贺；宣告
meanings.meaning_en: to show that an event or occasion is important by doing something special or enjoyable
meanings.example: It’s Dad’s birthday and we’re going out for a meal to celebrate.
meanings.example_cn: 今天是爸爸的生日，我们打算出去吃饭庆祝一下。

meanings.meaning_en: a law passed by a parliament, council etc and formally written down
meanings.example: Protection for the consumer is laid down by statute (= established by law ) .
meanings.example_cn: 保障消费者权益已有法律明文规定。

meanings.meaning_en: to write an exact copy of something
meanings.example: He had been asked to transcribe an ancient manuscript.
meanings.example_cn: 他被要求抄写一本古代手稿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奏效的；会应验的；有法律效力的
meanings.meaning_en: producing the result that was wanted or intended
meanings.example: This is the only effectual way to secure our present and future happiness.
meanings.example_cn: 这是确保我们现在和未来幸福的唯一有效途径。

meanings.meaning_cn: 灵巧的；机敏的；敏捷熟练的
meanings.meaning_en: a deft movement is skilful, and often quick
meanings.example: He sketched her with quick, deft strokes.
meanings.example_cn: 他给她画素描，下笔又快又熟练。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有效的；强有力的，有权势的；有说服力的
meanings.meaning_en: having a very powerful effect or influence on your body or mind
meanings.example: potent drugs
meanings.example_cn: 强效药物

meanings.meaning_en: Buffoonery is foolish behaviour that makes you laugh
something such as useful land, or minerals such as oil or coal, that exists in a country and can be used to increase its wealth
meanings.example: Canada’s vast mineral resources
meanings.example_cn: 加拿大丰富的矿产资源

meanings.meaning_cn: 破坏的；毁灭性的；有害的，消极的
meanings.meaning_en: causing damage to people or things
meanings.example: the destructive power of modern weapons
meanings.example_cn: 现代武器的破坏力

meanings.meaning_en: Yip is also a noun
meanings.example: ...a yip of pain.
meanings.example_cn: ...一声痛苦的吠叫。

meanings.meaning_en: If a dog or other animal yips, it gives a sudden short cry, often because of fear or pain
meanings.example: Far up the west rim of the canyon, a coyote yipped twice.
meanings.example_cn: 远处峡谷的西岸，一只丛林狼嚎叫了两声。

meanings.meaning_en: If you are circumspect, you are cautious in what you do and say and do not take risks
meanings.example: The banks should have been more circumspect in their dealings.
meanings.example_cn: 银行在交易时应更加谨慎。

meanings.meaning_cn: 隔离，使孤立；使绝缘，使隔热
meanings.meaning_en: to cover or protect something with a material that stops electricity, sound, heat etc from getting in or out
meanings.example: an insulated attic
meanings.example_cn: 隔热[隔音]的阁楼

meanings.meaning_cn: 可抢救的；可打捞的；可挽回的；能利用的

meanings.meaning_en: a congenital medical condition or disease has affected someone since they were born
meanings.example: congenital abnormalities
meanings.example_cn: 先天畸形

meanings.meaning_en: able to move quickly and easily with light neat movements
meanings.example: nimble fingers
meanings.example_cn: 灵巧的手指

meanings.meaning_en: very careful and thorough
meanings.example: The work had been done with painstaking attention to detail.
meanings.example_cn: 这项工作被一丝不苟地完成了。

meanings.example: Chris described in painstaking detail what had happened.
meanings.example_cn: 克里斯非常详细地描述了所发生的事情。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which the level of your voice changes in order to add meaning to what you are saying, for example by going up at the end of a question
meanings.example: intonation patterns
meanings.example_cn: 语调类型

meanings.meaning_cn: 忠告；法庭传票；宗教法庭的诫谕
meanings.meaning_en: a warning or caution; admonition
a space or area, for example a particular point on a surface or in a room, building, town, city etc
meanings.example: Make sure you keep the key in a safe place.
meanings.example_cn: 一定要把钥匙放在安全的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something somewhere, especially with care
meanings.example: I’ve spent the day dashing about from place to place.
meanings.example_cn: 我这一天尽是在东奔西跑。

meanings.meaning_en: to criticize or punish someone severely
seeming calm and not upset or angry
meanings.example: He appeared very composed despite the stress he was under.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管压力很大，他看起来仍十分镇定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 组成；作曲（compose的过去分词）；著作

meanings.example: The earthquake wreaked havoc on the city.

meanings.example_cn: 令人生厌的气味

meanings.meaning_en: related to music that is sung by a large group of people together

meanings.example_cn: 合唱音乐晚会

meanings.meaning_en: A dispensation is special permission to do something that is normally not allowed
meanings.example: They were promised dispensation from military service.
meanings.example_cn: 他们被许诺将被特免不用服兵役。

meanings.meaning_cn: 怀恨的；有报仇心的；惩罚的
meanings.meaning_en: unreasonably cruel and unfair towards someone who has harmed you
meanings.example: a bitter and vindictive old man
meanings.example_cn: 充满仇恨和报复心的老人

meanings.meaning_en: to escape from a difficult or embarrassing situation, or to help someone escape
meanings.example: It represents a last-ditch attempt by the country to extricate itself from its economic crisis.
meanings.example_cn: 这是该国摆脱经济危机的最后一搏。

meanings.meaning_en: good at something that needs care and skill
meanings.example: I’m afraid she’s also an adept liar.
meanings.example_cn: 恐怕她还是一个撒谎专家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 承认；答谢；报偿；告知已收到
meanings.meaning_en: to admit or accept that something is true or that a situation exists
meanings.example: The family acknowledge the need for change.
meanings.example_cn: 全家人都承认需要改变一下。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赌博；孤注一掷；投机；打赌
meanings.meaning_en: to risk money or possessions on the result of something such as a game or a race, when you do not know for certain what the result will be
meanings.example: Their religion forbids them to drink or gamble.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的宗教禁止饮酒和赌博。

meanings.meaning_en: an action or plan that involves a risk but that you hope will succeed

meanings.meaning_cn: 古代的；陈旧的；古体的；古色古香的
meanings.meaning_en: old and no longer used

meanings.example_cn: 古词

meanings.meaning_cn: 废除；撤销；废止；放弃；否定
meanings.meaning_en: if a government repeals a law, it officially ends that law
meanings.example: The government has just repealed the law segregating public facilities.
meanings.example_cn: 政府刚刚废除了隔离公共设施的法令。

meanings.meaning_en: Repeal is also a noun
meanings.example: Next year will be the 60th anniversary of the repeal of Prohibition.
meanings.example_cn: 明年将是禁酒令废止的60周年。

meanings.meaning_cn: 反对；抨击；轻视；声明不赞成
meanings.meaning_en: to strongly disapprove of or criticize something
meanings.example: He deprecated the low quality of entrants to the profession.
meanings.example_cn: 他抨击了行业中的滥竽充数。

meanings.example: He was accosted by four youths and forced to give them all his money.
meanings.example_cn: 四个少年走上前来和他搭讪，逼迫他交出身上所有的钱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 脾气坏的；爱吵架的；难相处的
meanings.meaning_en: bad-tempered and complaining a lot
meanings.example: a cantankerous old man
meanings.example_cn: 爱抱怨的倔老头

meanings.meaning_en: to use or spend a lot of energy etc in order to do something
meanings.example: Children expend a lot of energy and may need more high-energy food than adults.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们耗能多，可能比成人需要更多高能量的食物。

meanings.example: Surely His pleading with the lost, His offers of mercy to the reprobate, and the call of the gospel to all who hear are all sincere expressions of the heart of a loving God.
meanings.example_cn: 他对迷失方向的的人的恳求，他对堕落的人的同情，他对所有听到他声音的人施与福音，这一切真挚的表达都源于他充满爱的心。

meanings.example: They profess that they know God; but in works they deny him, being abominable, and disobedient, and unto every good work reprobate.
meanings.example_cn: 他们说是认识神行事却和他相背。 本是可憎恶的，是悖逆的，在各样善事上是可废弃的。

meanings.meaning_en: speech or writing that is didactic is intended to teach people a moral lesson
meanings.example: His novel has a didactic tone.
meanings.example_cn: 他的小说有一种道德说教的口吻。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong dislike of something or someone
meanings.example: Many people have a natural and emotional aversion to insects.
meanings.example_cn: 很多人对昆虫有一种天生的厌恶之感。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately avoid someone or something
meanings.example: a shy woman who shunned publicity
meanings.example_cn: 不爱抛头露面的羞怯女子

meanings.example: Victims of the disease found themselves shunned by society.
meanings.example_cn: 患这种病的人发现，社会上的人都躲着 他们。

meanings.meaning_en: A melee is a noisy, confusing fight between the people in a crowd
meanings.example: A policeman was killed and scores of people were injured in the melee.
meanings.example_cn: 混战中一名警察被打死，许多人受伤。

meanings.meaning_en: the freedom and the right to do whatever you want without asking permission or being afraid of authority
meanings.example: the fight for liberty and equality
meanings.example_cn: 争取自由和平等的斗争

meanings.meaning_en: having many forms or kinds
meanings.example: Conclusions Thus, it is very necessary to improve mothers knowledge on serious symptom of ARI and CDD and family nursing through multiform health education.
meanings.example_cn: 结论通过各种形式的健康教育来提高ARI、CDD重症识别知识及家庭护理知识知晓率是十分必要的。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who praises powerful people too much because they want to get something from them – used in order to show disapproval

meanings.example_cn: 被阿谀奉承者包围的独裁者

meanings.meaning_cn: 疏忽的；不注意的（副词inadvertently）；无意中做的

meanings.example: The government has said it was an inadvertent error.
meanings.example_cn: 政府声称那是无意的过失。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奢侈，浪费；过度；放肆的言行
meanings.meaning_en: Extravagance is the spending of more money than is reasonable or than you can afford
meanings.example: When the company went under, tales of his extravagance surged through the industry.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司破产时，有关他的奢靡的传言传遍了整个业界。

meanings.meaning_en: the belief that God does not exist
meanings.example: In 1666 the English parliament cited his atheism as the probably cause of the plague and the fire of London.
meanings.example_cn: 可能是由于瘟疫的爆发和伦敦的火灾,1666年英国国会开始引用他的无神论。

meanings.meaning_en: showing colours that seem to change in different lights

meanings.meaning_cn: 冷漠的；无动于衷的，缺乏兴趣的

meanings.example_cn: 她毫无兴趣，甚至连动都不想动。

meanings.meaning_en: diaphanous cloth is so thin that you can almost see through it
meanings.example: ...a diaphanous dress of pale gold.
meanings.example_cn: ...一件浅金色薄得几乎透明的裙子。

meanings.meaning_en: to take action or make changes that you have officially decided should happen

meanings.example_cn: 政府许诺要实施新的制度来控制金融贷款机构。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool, especially one used for outdoor physical work

meanings.meaning_cn: 混合；使咬字不清晰；使微醉
meanings.meaning_en: to confuse one person or thing with another, and make a mistake
meanings.example: The twins are so alike that it’s easy to muddle them up.
meanings.example_cn: 这对双胞胎看上去太像了，很容易弄混。

meanings.meaning_en: when there is confusion about something, and things are done wrong as a result

meanings.example_cn: 西班牙语和意大利语很相似，我有时会把它们弄混。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement that you have done something wrong, illegal, or embarras-sing, especially a formal statement
meanings.example: Sanchez’s confession was read out to the court.
meanings.example_cn: 桑切斯的供词在法庭上宣读了出来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 图标；偶像；肖像，画像；圣像
meanings.meaning_en: a small sign or picture on a computer screen that is used to start a particular operation
meanings.example: To open a new file, click on the icon.
meanings.example_cn: 要打开新文档，点击该图标。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a situation or the effects of something less unpleasant, harmful, or serious

meanings.example_cn: 需要采取措施来减轻燃煤增加对环境造成的影响。

meanings.meaning_en: to divide or split into different parts, or to make something do this

meanings.example_cn: 这样可以防止调味汁分层。

meanings.meaning_cn: 单独的；分开的；不同的；各自的；
meanings.meaning_en: different
meanings.example: First, separate the eggs (= divide the white part from the yellow part ) .
meanings.example_cn: 第一步，把蛋清和蛋黄分开。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or affecting your brain

meanings.example_cn: 脑出[溢]血

meanings.meaning_cn: 微温的，温热的；不太热烈的；不热情的

meanings.meaning_cn: 悲怅；痛苦；同情；哀婉动人的词句

meanings.example_cn: 那个女人试图留住爱侣的哀婉之情

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel great pity

meanings.example_cn: 关于孩子被人从父母身边夺走的悲伤故事

meanings.meaning_en: a medical instrument used for picking up and holding things

meanings.example_cn: 一把镊子

meanings.meaning_en: something that seems similar between two situations, processes etc

meanings.example: Conservationists say the law must be strengthened.
meanings.example_cn: 环保主义者称必须加强法制。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for a very short time

someone you know, but who is not a close friend

meanings.example: Moscow-based Kaspersky Lab has long been a magnet for Russia's young computer geniuses, luring them away from their usual forte, hacking, to viral analysis.
meanings.example_cn: 总部位于莫斯科的卡巴斯基实验室许久以来就是吸引俄罗斯年轻计算机英才的一块磁石，诱使他们远离自己平常的黑客特长，转而从事病毒分析。

meanings.meaning_en: played or sung loudly

meanings.example_cn: “他的长处是运营”，在彭博电视采访中一名Rodman &Renshaw 公司的分析员Ashok Kumar曾说过。

meanings.meaning_en: if an electric current oscillates, it changes direction very regularly and very frequently

meanings.meaning_en: when someone suddenly stops believing in a religion or supporting a political party

meanings.meaning_en: the process of discovering exactly what is wrong with someone or something, by examining them closely

meanings.meaning_cn: 精力充沛的；积极的；有力的

meanings.example_cn: 精力旺盛的男子

meanings.meaning_en: boring, very serious, and seeming to progress very slowly

meanings.example_cn: 本章末尾附着有用书籍的精选书目。

meanings.example_cn: 他很难击败。我确信这一点，不过我准备好了。

meanings.meaning_en: shaped like a circle

meanings.example_cn: 圆桌

meanings.meaning_cn: 弧（度）；弧光（全称electric arc）；弧形物；天穹
meanings.meaning_en: a curved shape or line

meanings.example_cn: 彩虹的弧状

meanings.meaning_en: to treat a wound or a growth on your body by burning it with hot metal, a  laser  , or a chemical

meanings.example_cn: 他用一块烧红的烙铁来给伤口进行烧灼治疗。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something clearer or easier to understand

meanings.meaning_en: to delay the development of something, or to make something happen more slowly than expected

meanings.example_cn: 寒冷的天气使许多植物生长滞缓。

meanings.meaning_en: to get used to a new situation, job, or way of life

meanings.example_cn: 离婚后需要时间重新适应。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of small islands
Periodical events or situations happen occasionally, at fairly regular intervals
meanings.example: She made periodical visits to her dentist.
meanings.example_cn: 她定期去看牙医。

meanings.meaning_en: a magazine, especially one about a serious or technical subject

meanings.meaning_cn: 有罪的；该责备的；不周到的；应受处罚的
meanings.meaning_en: deserving blame

meanings.example_cn: 双方都被追究了一定的责任。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迂曲的；绕行的；迂回线路的
meanings.meaning_en: going from one place to another in a way that is longer than the most direct way

meanings.example_cn: 一次艰难曲折的徒步旅行

meanings.example: But as Kinzer explains, "For most of Turkey's modern history, the Muslim world has seen [the country] as an apostate," having "no religious legitimacy" and acting "as Washington's lackey.
meanings.example_cn: 但作者认为“在土耳其的现代历史中，穆斯林世界将那时的土耳其视为一种变节，一点没有宗教气节，完全是美国的走狗。”

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has stopped believing in a religion or supporting a political party

meanings.meaning_cn: [仪] 投影仪；放映机；探照灯；设计者
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that makes a film or picture appear on a screen or flat surface
meanings.example: ...a slide projector.
meanings.example_cn: …幻灯机。

meanings.meaning_en: a  plus sign

meanings.example_cn: 白天的气温仅零上5度。

meanings.meaning_en: more than zero – used especially when talking about temperatures
used to show that one number or amount is added to another
a chemical  compound  that has a simple structure of large  molecule s
meanings.example: So, what I want to do is go back to this simple polymer configurational model that we introduced before.
meanings.example_cn: 那么，我想做的是回到,简单的聚合物构型模型,我们之前介绍过的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有声的，浊音的；声音的，语音的；声学的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to sound
meanings.example: ...the phonic system underlying a particular language.
meanings.example_cn: ...某种特定语言的发音体系。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is sturdy is strong, short, and healthy looking
meanings.example: a sturdy young man
meanings.example_cn: 健壮的小伙子

meanings.example: sturdy legs
meanings.example_cn: 结实的双腿

meanings.meaning_en: when someone uses another person’s words, ideas, or work and pretends they are their own
meanings.example: The journal accused the professor of plagiarism.
meanings.example_cn: 那份刊物指控该教授剽窃。

meanings.meaning_en: a sound or way of speaking or singing that continues on the same note without getting any louder or softer, and therefore sounds very boring
meanings.example: He answered all the lawyer’s questions in a dull monotone.
meanings.example_cn: 他用单调的语气回答了律师所有的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: A monotone sound or surface does not have any variation in its tone or colour
meanings.example: He was seen on TV delivering platitudes about the crisis in a monotone voice.
meanings.example_cn: 人们看到他在电视上念经似地就危机问题老调重弹。

meanings.meaning_en: to give the exact words of something that has been written, especially in order to support an opinion or prove an idea
meanings.example: The passage cited above is from a Robert Frost poem.
meanings.example_cn: 以上的引文出自罗伯特•弗罗斯特的一首诗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 评审员；确定税款的人；顾问
meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to calculate the value of something or the amount of tax someone should pay

meanings.meaning_cn: 小冲突，小规模战斗；小争论
meanings.meaning_en: a fight between small groups of soldiers, ships etc, especially one that happens away from the main part of a battle – used in news reports
meanings.example: Border skirmishes between India and Pakistan were common.
meanings.example_cn: 印巴边境的小冲突曾经是常有的事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 进行小规模战斗；发生小争论
meanings.meaning_en: If people skirmish, they fight
meanings.example: They were skirmishing close to the minefield now.
meanings.example_cn: 他们当时正在雷区附近小规模交火。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a fire or light stop burning or shining

meanings.example_cn: 请把香烟都熄灭了。

meanings.meaning_en: to state publicly that you do not approve of something

meanings.example_cn: 对一些人谴责激励机制只是作为“新政治”责任思考的毒果这样的结论本身是很冒险的。

meanings.meaning_en: a rude way of saying you are glad someone has left
meanings.example: She was awful. Good riddance to her, I say!
meanings.example_cn: 她很讨厌。 我说啊，她滚蛋了真好！

meanings.meaning_en: a lighter-than-air craft, such as a balloon
meanings.example: The Air Force intends to integrate the aerostat radars with the three Airborne Warning and Control System AWACS being purchased from Israel.
meanings.example_cn: 空军打算把该高空气球的雷达和三架拥有机载预警和控制系统的预警机（AWACS）综合起来，目前AWACS正在从以色列购买。

meanings.meaning_en: boring and ordinary, and having no variety or interest
meanings.example: ...her lawyer husband, trapped in a humdrum but well-paid job.
meanings.example_cn: ...她整天做着单调乏味的工作但收入颇丰的律师丈夫。

meanings.meaning_en: of, relating to, or resembling an alveolus
meanings.example: Their principle function is production of type III collagen, elastin, and proteoglycans of the extracellular matrix of the alveolar septa.
