meanings.example_cn: 那些领导人已被民族主义者赶下了台。

meanings.meaning_en: to change, or to make someone or something change
meanings.example: Her face hadn’t altered much over the years.
meanings.example_cn: 过了这么多年，她的容貌并没有多大改变。

meanings.meaning_cn: (Alter)人名；(英)奥尔特；(德、捷、葡、爱沙、立陶、拉脱、俄、西、罗、瑞典)阿尔特
meanings.example: The city centre has altered beyond recognition (=  changed very much  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 市中心变得都认不出来了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 蒙住；裹住；抑制；发低沉的声音
meanings.meaning_en: to cover yourself or another person with something thick and warm
meanings.example: The falling snow muffled the sound of our footsteps.
meanings.example_cn: 飘落的雪使我们的脚步声变得低沉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 低沉的声音；消声器；包裹物（如头巾，围巾等）；唇鼻部

meanings.meaning_en: a  gland  inside your body, near your stomach, that produces  insulin  and a liquid that helps your body to use the food that you eat
meanings.example: And actually it damages the pancreas itself, after a while.
meanings.example_cn: 事实上，一段时间之后它对胰腺本身也会产生伤害。

meanings.meaning_cn: 增加；爬上；使骑上马；安装，架置；镶嵌，嵌入；准备上演；成立（军队等）
meanings.meaning_en: to increase gradually in amount or degree
meanings.example: Tension here is mounting , as we await the final result.
meanings.example_cn: 我们等待着最终结果，这里的气氛也越来越紧张。

meanings.meaning_cn: 山峰；底座；乘骑用马；攀，登；运载工具；底座
meanings.meaning_en: used as part of the name of a mountain
meanings.example: Casualties on both sides of the battle have continued to mount.
meanings.example_cn: 交战双方的伤亡人数继续增加。

meanings.meaning_en: an official process in which someone becomes king, queen, president etc
information that is clearly arranged in the form of a simple picture, set of figures,  graph  etc, or a piece of paper with this information on it
meanings.example: a chart showing last year’s sales
meanings.example_cn: 显示去年销售情况的一份图表

meanings.meaning_cn: 绘制…的图表；在海图上标出；详细计划；记录；记述；跟踪（进展或发展
meanings.meaning_en: to record information about a situation or set of events over a period of time, in order to see how it changes or develops
meanings.example: a weather chart
meanings.example_cn: 天气图

meanings.meaning_cn: 助手，大副；配偶；同事；配对物
meanings.meaning_en: someone you work with, do an activity with, or share something with
meanings.example: He has found his ideal mate.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经找到了理想的配偶。

meanings.meaning_en: if animals mate, they have sex to produce babies

meanings.meaning_cn: 垂直的，直立的；[解剖] 头顶的，顶点的
meanings.meaning_en: pointing up in a line that forms an angle of 90˚ with a flat surface
meanings.example: a vertical line
meanings.example_cn: 垂直线

meanings.meaning_en: the direction of something that is vertical
meanings.example: the vertical axis of a graph
meanings.example_cn: 图的纵轴

meanings.meaning_en: controlled or strongly influenced by someone or something
meanings.example: We have a congress that is in thrall to special interest groups.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的国会受制于一些特殊利益集团。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something, especially something difficult or useful
meanings.example: Surgeons performed an emergency operation.
meanings.example_cn: 外科医生做了一个急诊手术。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone or something dumbfounds you, they surprise you very much
meanings.example: This suggestion dumbfounded Joe.
meanings.example_cn: 这个建议使乔伊惊呆了。

meanings.meaning_en: making you expect something unpleasant
meanings.example: dark menacing clouds
meanings.example_cn: 可怕的乌云

meanings.example: a low menacing laugh
meanings.example_cn: 带威胁的低声一笑

meanings.meaning_cn: [心理] 自我中心的；利己主义的
meanings.meaning_en: thinking only about yourself and not about what other people might need or want
meanings.example: He was egocentric, a man of impulse who expected those around him to serve him.
meanings.example_cn: 他自我中心，易冲动，希望周围的人为他服务。

meanings.meaning_cn: 健谈的；缠绕的；易旋转的
meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone is voluble, you mean that they talk a lot with great energy and enthusiasm
meanings.example: She was voluble with excitement.
meanings.example_cn: 她因为激动而变得很健谈。

meanings.meaning_cn: [化学] 衍生物，派生物；导数
meanings.meaning_en: something that has developed or been produced from something else
meanings.example: the derivatives market
meanings.example_cn: 金融衍生品市场

meanings.meaning_en: extremely unpleasant
meanings.example: an odious little man
meanings.example_cn: 讨厌的小男人

meanings.meaning_en: Nostalgia is an affectionate feeling you have for the past, especially for a particularly happy time
meanings.example: He might be influenced by nostalgia for the surroundings of his happy youth.
meanings.example_cn: 他也许被他对快乐青年时代的环境的怀念影响了。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone talks to a person in authority in order to prevent something bad happening to someone else
meanings.example: His intercession could be of help to the tribe.
meanings.example_cn: 他的调解会对该部落有帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: a perfect example of something, because it has all the most important qualities of things that belong to that type
meanings.example: He came to this country 20 years ago and is the archetype of the successful Asian businessman.
meanings.example_cn: 他20年前来到这个国家，是成功的亚裔商人的典型。

meanings.meaning_cn: 健谈者；善谈者；擅长讲故事的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is good at telling stories in an interesting and amusing way
meanings.example: He spoke eight languages and was a noted raconteur.
meanings.example_cn: 他说八种语言，是个出了名的讲故事高手。

meanings.meaning_en: a refusal to give official permission for something, or the right to refuse to give such permission
meanings.example: The Senate had a sufficient majority to override the presidential veto (= not accept his refusal ).
meanings.example_cn: 参议院有足够的多数票可以推翻总统的否决。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone in authority vetoes something, they refuse to allow it to happen, especially something that other people or organizations have agreed

meanings.meaning_cn: 可证实的；能作证的；可检验的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is verifiable can be proved to be true or genuine
meanings.example: This is not a romantic notion but verifiable fact.
meanings.example_cn: 这不是一个不切实际的念头，而是一个有依据的事实。

meanings.meaning_cn: 取出；抽出；拔出；抽出物；出身
meanings.meaning_en: the process of removing or obtaining something from something else

meanings.meaning_cn: 诱捕；诱入陷阱；进入罗网
meanings.meaning_en: If an animal is ensnared, it is caught in a trap
meanings.example: The spider must wait for prey to be ensnared on its web.
meanings.example_cn: 蜘蛛一定要耐心等待，直到猎物被它的蛛网困住。

meanings.meaning_en: not looking, pointing etc directly at something
meanings.example: an oblique glance
meanings.example_cn: 斜瞥

meanings.meaning_cn: 有密切关系的；贴切的；恰当的
meanings.meaning_en: an idea, remark etc that is germane to something is related to it in an important and suitable way
meanings.example: ...the suppression of a number of documents which were very germane to the case.
meanings.example_cn: ...对几份与本案密切相关的文件的隐瞒。

meanings.meaning_en: an oxidant, esp a substance that combines with the fuel in a rocket engine
meanings.example: This strong oxidizer in the match head is highly combustible.
meanings.example_cn: 这种在火柴头中的强力氧化剂极其易燃。

meanings.meaning_cn: 病态的；由病引起的；恐怖的；病变部位的
meanings.meaning_en: with a strong and unhealthy interest in unpleasant subjects, especially death
meanings.example: The trip was made all the worse by Frankie’s morbid fear of flying.
meanings.example_cn: 弗朗基对坐飞机有种病态的恐惧，使得旅途变得更加糟糕。

meanings.meaning_cn: 调节，规定；控制；校准；有系统的管理
meanings.meaning_en: to control an activity or process, especially by rules
meanings.example: strict rules regulating the use of chemicals in food
meanings.example_cn: 限制化学品在食物中使用的严格规定

meanings.meaning_en: a job which you get paid for even though you do not have to do very much work
meanings.example: She found him an exalted sinecure as a Fellow of the Library of Congress.
meanings.example_cn: 她给他找了一个级别很高的闲职：国会图书馆研究员。

meanings.meaning_cn: 到来；出现；基督降临；基督降临节
meanings.meaning_en: the time when something first begins to be widely used
meanings.example: the advent of the computer
meanings.example_cn: 计算机的问世

meanings.meaning_cn: 有效的；有根据的；合法的；正当的
meanings.meaning_en: a valid ticket, document, or agreement is legally or officially acceptable
meanings.example: a valid credit card
meanings.example_cn: 有效信用卡

meanings.example: evening dresses in opulent fabrics
meanings.example_cn: 用华丽织物做成的晚礼服

meanings.meaning_en: the act of shrinking, or the amount that something shrinks
meanings.example: Pollution led to a shrinkage of grasslands.
meanings.example_cn: 污染导致草原面积缩小。

meanings.meaning_cn: 仰卧的；懒散的；掌心向上的；向后靠的
meanings.meaning_en: lying on your back
meanings.example: in a supine position
meanings.example_cn: 以仰卧的姿势

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time in history that is known for a particular event, or for particular qualities
meanings.example: His death marked the end of an era.
meanings.example_cn: 他的去世标志着一个时代的终结。

meanings.meaning_en: the longest side of a  triangle  that has a  right angle
meanings.example: I want to compute the length of the hypotenuse of a right triangle.
meanings.example_cn: 我想计算下,直角三角形的斜边。

meanings.example: They even bestride the carriage lamps.
meanings.example_cn: 他们甚至骑在马车的灯笼上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 复兴；复活；苏醒；恢复精神
meanings.meaning_en: to bring something back after it has not been used or has not existed for a period of time
meanings.example: Local people have decided to revive this centuries-old tradition.
meanings.example_cn: 当地人决定复兴这一延续了数个世纪的传统。

meanings.meaning_cn: 忽略；俯瞰；远眺；检查；高耸于…之上
meanings.meaning_en: to not notice something, or not see how important it is
meanings.example: It is easy to overlook a small detail like that.
meanings.example_cn: 那样的小细节很容易被忽略。

meanings.example: Nobody could overlook the fact that box office sales were down.
meanings.example_cn: 谁也无法忽视票房销售额在下降这个事实。

meanings.meaning_cn: 社交的；好交际的；友善的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is sociable is friendly and enjoys being with other people
meanings.example: a pleasant, sociable couple
meanings.example_cn: 一对和善且喜欢与人交往的夫妇

meanings.meaning_en: a short description of the main events or ideas in a book, film etc
meanings.example: For each title there is a brief synopsis of the book.
meanings.example_cn: 每本书都附有一个该书的简短提要。

meanings.example: I’ve had a pretty hectic day.
meanings.example_cn: 我忙乱了一整天。

meanings.meaning_cn: 兴奋的，狂热的；脸上发红；肺病的；忙碌的
meanings.meaning_en: very busy or full of activity
meanings.example: a hectic social life
meanings.example_cn: 繁忙的社交生活

meanings.meaning_en: feeling sympathy for people who are suffering
meanings.example: a caring, compassionate man
meanings.example_cn: 有同情心并关爱他人的人

meanings.example: I allowed him to go home on compassionate grounds .
meanings.example_cn: 我出于同情让他回家了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 透明的；显然的；坦率的；易懂的
meanings.meaning_en: if something is transparent, you can see through it
meanings.example: a transparent plastic container
meanings.example_cn: 透明的塑料容器

meanings.meaning_en: many, or involving many things, people, events etc
meanings.example: Baxter was rushed to the hospital with multiple stab wounds.
meanings.example_cn: 巴克斯特因多处刺伤被紧急送往医院。

meanings.meaning_en: a number that contains a smaller number an exact number of times
meanings.example: Having multiple partners increases your risk of sexual diseases.
meanings.example_cn: 性伴侣多会增加得性病的风险。

meanings.meaning_cn: 易怒的，暴躁的；爱发牢骚的，抱怨的；爱挑剔的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is querulous complains about things in an annoying way
meanings.example: ‘But why can’t I go?’ he said in a querulous voice.
meanings.example_cn: “可是为什么我不能去呢？”他抱怨道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 代表；作为…的典型；具有…的特点
meanings.meaning_en: to be a typical example of something
meanings.example: the features which typify a Scottish Highland landscape
meanings.example_cn: 苏格兰高地典型的地貌特征

meanings.meaning_en: a system of rules about the correct way to behave on an official occasion
meanings.example: a breach of diplomatic protocol
meanings.example_cn: 违反外交礼节

meanings.meaning_cn: [等离子] 等离子体；血浆；[矿物] 深绿玉髓
meanings.meaning_en: the yellowish liquid part of blood that contains the blood cells

meanings.example: Let every declamation turn upon the beauty of liberty and virtue, and the deformity, turpitude, and malignity of slavery and vice.
meanings.example_cn: 让每一篇演讲都来谈自由和道德之美，都来谈奴役和邪恶之丑陋、卑鄙和恶毒。

meanings.meaning_en: If you lambaste someone, you criticize them severely, usually in public
meanings.example: And you can be sure that when the referee cheats our boys, I'll be ready to lambaste him.
meanings.example_cn: 而且你可以放心，如果裁判对孩子们不公平，我会公开斥责他。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a statement saying what is likely to happen in the future, based on the information that you have now
meanings.example: Rain was forecast for the weekend.
meanings.example_cn: 预报周末有雨。

meanings.meaning_en: a description of what is likely to happen in the future, based on the information that you have now

meanings.example: Both the model and the satellite sensor use infrared energy to measure clouds.
meanings.example_cn: 模型和卫星传感器都使用红外能量来进行云的估算。

meanings.meaning_en: Infrared radiation is similar to light but has a longer wavelength, so we cannot see it without special equipment
meanings.example: "This is an exciting result, " says Tinetti. "This is the first near-infrared spectrum of a planet.
meanings.example_cn: 迪奈蒂说：“这是个令人兴奋的结果，这是行星上发现的第一个近红外光谱。

meanings.meaning_en: to think carefully and seriously about something

meanings.meaning_cn: 社区；[生态] 群落；共同体；团体
meanings.meaning_en: the people who live in the same area, town etc
meanings.example: The new arts centre will serve the whole community.
meanings.example_cn: 这座新的艺术中心将为整个社区服务。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欺骗；哄骗；诱惑；【罕用】迷惑；逃避；使失望
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone believe something that is not true
meanings.example: I was angry with him for trying to delude me.
meanings.example_cn: 他想骗我，因此我很恼火。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乘；使增加；使繁殖；使相乘
meanings.meaning_en: to do a calculation in which you add a number to itself a particular number of times
meanings.example: Children will learn to multiply in the second grade.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童在二年级学习乘法。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance which provides your body with energy and is found in foods such as grain, rice, and potatoes, or a food that contains this substance
meanings.example: He eats a lot of starch.
meanings.example_cn: 他吃大量含淀粉的食物。

meanings.meaning_en: to make cloth stiff, using starch
meanings.example: Avoid fatty foods and starches.
meanings.example_cn: 避免食用高脂的和含淀粉的食物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 贵族；贵族统治；上层社会；贵族政治
meanings.meaning_en: the people in the highest social class, who traditionally have a lot of land, money, and power
meanings.example: dukes, earls, and other members of the aristocracy
meanings.example_cn: 公爵、伯爵及其他贵族成员

meanings.meaning_cn: 神话；虚构的人，虚构的事
meanings.meaning_en: an ancient story, especially one invented in order to explain natural or historical events
meanings.example: a book of Greek myths
meanings.example_cn: 一本关于希腊神话的图书

meanings.meaning_en: impossible to remove or forget
meanings.example: Her words left an indelible impression on me for years to come.
meanings.example_cn: 她的话多年来我都难以忘怀。

meanings.meaning_cn: 适合的，一致的；全等的；和谐的
meanings.meaning_en: fitting together well
meanings.example: They want to work in an organization whose values are congruent with their own.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想在一家与他们自己的价值观相同的组织里工作。

meanings.meaning_en: shining, brilliant, or radiant
meanings.example: Answer: Anyone can use a happy feeling to wish a refulgent result.
meanings.example_cn: 答：任何人都可以用幸福的心情期待辉煌的成果。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有暴风雨的；暴乱的；剧烈的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe a relationship or a situation as tempestuous, you mean that very strong and intense emotions, especially anger, are involved
meanings.example: For years, the couple's tempestuous relationship made the headlines.
meanings.example_cn: 多年来这对夫妻间紧张起伏的关系总是登上报纸头条。

meanings.meaning_cn: 指定；指派；标出；把…定名为
meanings.meaning_en: to choose someone or something for a particular job or purpose
meanings.example: Buildings are designated by red squares on the map.
meanings.example_cn: 在地图上建筑物用红色方块标明。

meanings.meaning_en: If you misstate something, you state it incorrectly or give false information about it
meanings.example: Look at the false police reports that omitted or misstated crucial facts.
meanings.example_cn: 看看那些失实的警方报告吧，它们忽略或谎报了关键的事实。

meanings.meaning_cn: 空气的；通风的；幻想的；轻快的；空中的
meanings.meaning_en: an airy room or building has plenty of fresh air because it is large or has a lot of windows
meanings.example: All the hotel’s bedrooms are light and airy.
meanings.example_cn: 这家酒店的所有客房都明亮通风。

meanings.meaning_en: the clarity of a piece of writing, law, argument etc is its quality of being expressed clearly
meanings.example: Letters may be edited for length and clarity.
meanings.example_cn: 信件可能要加以修改以求篇幅合适，意思明了。

meanings.meaning_en: to behave as if something is true when in fact you know it is not, in order to deceive people or for fun
meanings.example: Let’s pretend we’re on the moon.
meanings.example_cn: 我们假装自己是在月球上吧。

meanings.meaning_en: imaginary or not real - used especially by children
meanings.example: He’s not asleep – he’s just pretending.
meanings.example_cn: 他并没睡着，不过是装睡而已。

meanings.example: Located near the base of the neck, the thyroid is a large endocrine gland that produces hormones that help control growth and metabolism.
meanings.example_cn: 甲状腺位于颈部的底部附近，是一个很大的内分泌腺体，它产生激素，协助控制生长和新陈代谢。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the system in your body that produces hormones
meanings.example: Some of the chemicals that are all around us have the ability to interfere with our endocrine systems, which regulate the hormones that control our weight, our biorhythms and our reproduction.
meanings.example_cn: 我们周围的某些化学物质会影响人体的内分泌系统——其作用是通过调节激素分泌从而控制体重、生理周期以及生殖能力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 历史的；史学的；基于史实的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the past
meanings.example: places of historical interest
meanings.example_cn: 历史名胜

meanings.meaning_cn: 磁铁；[电磁] 磁体；磁石
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of iron or steel that can stick to metal or make other metal objects move towards itself
meanings.example: It's possible to hang a nail from a magnet and then use that nail to pick up another nail.
meanings.example_cn: 把一颗钉子挂在一个磁体上再用这颗钉子去吸起另一颗钉子是可能的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 旅馆；门房；集会处；山林小屋
meanings.meaning_en: a small house on the land of a large country house, usually at the main entrance gate
meanings.example: the porter’s lodge
meanings.example_cn: 传达室

meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal or official complaint, protest etc
having the shape of a rectangle
meanings.example: ...a rectangular table.
meanings.example_cn: …一张长方形的桌子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无感觉的；缺乏感知力的
meanings.meaning_en: lacking in perception; obtuse
A laxative is something you eat or drink that makes you go to the toilet
meanings.example: Foods that ferment quickly in the stomach are excellent natural laxatives.
meanings.example_cn: 在胃里快速发酵的食物是极好的天然泻药。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无忧无虑；漫不经心；满不在乎
meanings.meaning_en: a cheerful feeling of not caring or worrying about anything
meanings.example: an air of insouciance
meanings.example_cn: 无忧无虑的神态

meanings.meaning_en: a complete change in ways of thinking, methods of working etc
meanings.example: the French Revolution of 1789
meanings.example_cn: 1789年法国大革命

meanings.meaning_cn: 酵母；酵素；潜移默化的影响
meanings.meaning_en: a substance, especially yeast, that is added to a mixture of flour and water so that it will swell and can be baked into bread

meanings.meaning_cn: 天性快活的；主神朱庇特的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe a person as jovial, you mean that they are happy and behave in a cheerful way
meanings.example: Father Whittaker appeared to be in a jovial mood.
meanings.example_cn: 惠特克神父似乎心情非常好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 宽敞的；广阔的；容积大的
meanings.meaning_en: able to contain a lot
meanings.example: a capacious suitcase
meanings.example_cn: 容量很大的手提箱

meanings.meaning_cn: 因情况而异的；不一定的；偶然发生的；可能的；依情况而定的；偶然的；[逻]有条件的
meanings.meaning_en: depending on something that may happen in the future
meanings.example: Has the Scottish contingent arrived yet?
meanings.example_cn: 苏格兰代表团到了没有？

meanings.meaning_cn: 分遣队；偶然事件；分得部分；代表团
meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who all have something in common, such as their nationality, beliefs etc, and who are part of a larger group
a set of stories, poems, songs etc by different people collected together in one book
meanings.example: an anthology of American literature
meanings.example_cn: 美国文学选集

meanings.meaning_en: a desire to have a lot of money that is considered to be too strong
meanings.example: He paid a month's rent in advance, just enough to satisfy the landlord's avarice.
meanings.example_cn: 他预交了一个月的房租，正好满足了房东的贪心。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone calm, quiet, and satisfied after they have been angry or upset
meanings.example: ‘You’re right,’ Rita said, in order to pacify him.
meanings.example_cn: “你是对的。”丽塔安抚他道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 朦胧；阴暗；晦涩；身份低微；不分明
meanings.meaning_en: something that is difficult to understand, or the quality of being difficult to understand
meanings.example: obscurities in the text
meanings.example_cn: 文中的难解之处

meanings.meaning_en: when you decide not to have something valuable, in order to get something that is more important
meanings.example: The minister stressed the need for economic sacrifice.
meanings.example_cn: 部长强调了在经济上作出牺牲的必要性。

meanings.meaning_en: to willingly stop having something you want or doing something you like in order to get something more important
meanings.example: The workforce were willing to make sacrifices in order to preserve jobs.
meanings.example_cn: 雇员为了保住饭碗情愿作出牺牲。

meanings.meaning_en: a blessing, esp a spoken one
meanings.example: If you can hear my benison.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你能听见我的祝祷。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less painful or difficult to deal with
meanings.example: measures to alleviate poverty
meanings.example_cn: 扶贫措施

meanings.meaning_cn: 同音异义词；同形异义词；同形同音异义词；同名异物
meanings.meaning_en: a word that is spelled the same and sounds the same as another, but is different in meaning or origin. For example, the noun ‘bear’ and the verb ‘bear’ are homonyms.

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 指数；典型；说明者，说明物
meanings.meaning_en: a sign written above and to the right of a number or letter to show how many times that quantity is to be multiplied by itself
meanings.example: The Alvin Ailey American Dance Theatre was formed in the 1950s and quickly established itself as a leading exponent of progressive choreography and contemporary dance.
meanings.example_cn: 阿尔文·艾利美国舞蹈剧形成于20世纪50年代，并很快树立自己为激进舞蹈艺术和现代舞蹈的最主要的典范。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a measurement of space which is calculated by multiplying the length of something by its width and height
meanings.example: the cubic capacity of an engine
meanings.example_cn: 引擎汽缸的容积

meanings.meaning_cn: 古怪的；异想天开的；反复无常的
meanings.meaning_en: unusual or strange and often amusing
meanings.example: He has a wonderful whimsical sense of humour.
meanings.example_cn: 他怪异的幽默感令人惊叹。

meanings.meaning_cn: 固体的；可靠的；立体的；结实的；一致的
meanings.meaning_en: hard or firm, with a fixed shape, and not a liquid or gas
meanings.example: The lake was frozen solid .
meanings.example_cn: 湖水冻得结结实实。

meanings.meaning_en: a firm object or substance that has a fixed shape, not a gas or liquid
meanings.example: It was good to be back on solid ground again.
meanings.example_cn: 又能踏上坚实的土地感觉真好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一丝不苟的；小心翼翼的；拘泥小节的
meanings.meaning_en: very careful about small details, and always making sure that everything is done correctly
meanings.example: He kept meticulous accounts.
meanings.example_cn: 他的账记得一丝不苟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 隐藏处；树丛；蔽覆羽翮基部的羽毛
meanings.meaning_en: a group of thick bushes where animals can hide

meanings.example_cn: 秘密行动

meanings.meaning_cn: 隐蔽的；隐密的；偷偷摸摸的；在丈夫保护下的
meanings.meaning_en: secret or hidden
a thick tropical forest with many large plants growing very close together
meanings.example: the Amazon jungle
meanings.example_cn: 亚马孙丛林

meanings.meaning_cn: 顶点；[昆] 头顶；[天] 天顶
meanings.meaning_en: the point where two lines meet to form an angle, especially the point of a triangle

meanings.meaning_cn: 布阵；列阵；整军备战；严阵以待
重力；万有引力；地心吸力
meanings.meaning_en: the force that causes two objects such as  planets  to move towards each other because of their  mass
meanings.example: Newton’s law of gravitation
meanings.example_cn: 牛顿万有引力定律

meanings.meaning_en: to avoid work by pretending to be ill

meanings.example_cn: 他指责弗兰克装病逃避工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使全神贯注；用大字体书写；正式写成（决议等）；独占；吸引
meanings.meaning_en: if something engrosses you, it interests you so much that you do not notice anything else
meanings.example: The scene was stunning, and for a time engrossed all our attention.
meanings.example_cn: 景色非常美丽，一时间把我们都完全吸引住了。

meanings.meaning_en: something that protects a person or thing from harm or damage
meanings.example: He used his left hand as a shield against the reflecting sunlight.
meanings.example_cn: 他用左手遮挡反射过来的阳光。

meanings.meaning_en: to protect someone or something from being harmed or damaged

meanings.meaning_cn: [药] 解毒剂；解药；矫正方法
meanings.meaning_en: a substance that stops the effects of a poison
meanings.example: When he returned, he noticed their sickness and prepared an antidote.
meanings.example_cn: 当他返回时，他注意到了他们的病情，准备了解毒药。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无赖；流氓；（纸牌中的）杰克
meanings.example: the knave of hearts
meanings.example_cn: 红桃杰克

meanings.meaning_en: information which is false or which emphasizes just one part of a situation, used by a government or political group to make people agree with them
meanings.example: the spreading of political propaganda
meanings.example_cn: 政治宣传的开展

meanings.example: “Technology does not need to estrange us from one another,” Cox said. “The physical reality comes alive with the human stories we have told there.”
meanings.example_cn: “技术不会使我们彼此疏离，”考克斯说道，“当我们来到那些有故事的地点时，现实也就活灵活现了。”

meanings.meaning_en: the limits within which amounts, quantities, ages etc vary

meanings.example_cn: 72 度到85度之间的温度范围

meanings.meaning_cn: （在内）变动；平行，列为一行；延伸；漫游；射程达到
meanings.meaning_en: to move around in an area without aiming for a particular place
meanings.example: Even the cheapest property was out of our price range (= too expensive for us ) .
meanings.example_cn: 即使是最便宜的房子也超出了我们能承受的价格范围。

meanings.meaning_en: the science concerned with the study of physical objects and substances, and of natural forces such as light, heat, and movement
meanings.example: ...the laws of physics.
meanings.example_cn: …物理学定律。

meanings.meaning_en: when you translate something, or something that has been translated
meanings.example: She read the letter and gave us a rough translation (= she did not translate everything exactly ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她看了信，给我们大概翻译了一下。

meanings.meaning_en: to decorate something such as a building or street by hanging things all over it
meanings.example: ...flags bedecking the balcony.
meanings.example_cn: ... 装饰阳台的旗子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧急的；浮现的；意外的；自然发生的

meanings.example_cn: 世界上新成立的国家

meanings.example: Lawmakers spent the day quibbling over the final wording of the resolution.
meanings.example_cn: 立法者们花了一天争辩决议的最后措词。

meanings.meaning_cn: 诡辩；挑剔；说模棱两可的话
meanings.meaning_en: When people quibble over a small matter, they argue about it even though it is not important
to choose someone to do a particular job, or to be a representative of a group, organization etc
meanings.example: Officials have now been delegated to start work on a draft settlement.
meanings.example_cn: 官员们现已被委派开始准备一份拟定协议。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been elected or chosen to speak, vote, or take decisions for a group
the beginning of something
meanings.example: All applicants should be at least 16 years of age at the commencement of this course.
meanings.example_cn: 所有申请人在本课程开始时应至少年满16岁。

meanings.meaning_cn: 安静的，平静的；安宁的；稳定的
meanings.meaning_en: pleasantly calm, quiet, and peaceful

meanings.example_cn: 宁静的小村庄

meanings.meaning_en: to divide into branches or branchlike parts

meanings.meaning_cn: 谬误的；骗人的；靠不住的；不合理的
meanings.meaning_en: containing or based on false ideas

meanings.example_cn: 这种论点即使不完全是谬误，也是误导人的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 随便的；非正式的；临时的；偶然的

meanings.example: Jean felt more comfortable in casual clothes .
meanings.example_cn: 琼穿上便服感到更舒服。

meanings.meaning_cn: 便装；临时工人；待命士兵

meanings.example_cn: 休闲夹克

meanings.meaning_cn: 侵略性的；好斗的；有进取心的；有闯劲的

meanings.example_cn: 吉姆的声音凶了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement that expresses in a shorter, clearer, or different way what someone has said or written

meanings.example_cn: 最后两个分句是对福思先生言论的准确引用而不是改述。

meanings.meaning_en: to express in a shorter, clearer, or different way what someone has said or written
a movement or an attack that is intended to deceive an opponent, especially in  boxing
meanings.example: I feinted to the left, then to the right.
meanings.example_cn: 我佯装要攻到左方，然后再到右方。

meanings.meaning_en: to pretend to hit someone in  boxing

meanings.meaning_cn: 容易地；乐意地；无困难地
meanings.meaning_en: quickly, willingly, and without complaining

meanings.example_cn: 杰克爽快地答应帮忙。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of watching something or someone carefully for a period of time
meanings.example: He spent two nights under close observation in hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 他在医院接受了两个晚上的严密观察。

meanings.meaning_en: to murder an important person
meanings.example: a plot to assassinate the President
meanings.example_cn: 刺杀总统的阴谋

meanings.meaning_cn: 诙谐的，幽默的；滑稽的，可笑的

meanings.example_cn: 诙谐的故事

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that you can trust someone or something to be good, work well, or produce good results

meanings.example_cn: 我觉得自己干得不错，自信心就开始增加了。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately make something unclear or difficult to understand

meanings.example_cn: 他们在这个问题上混淆视听，也只有保险公司才做得出这种事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 根除，连根拔起；迫使某人离开出生地或定居处
半岛的；形成半岛的；半岛状的
洗牌；推诿，推卸；拖曳，慢吞吞地走；搅乱
meanings.meaning_en: to mix  playing card s  into a different order before playing a game with them

meanings.example_cn: 轮到我洗牌了吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 洗牌，洗纸牌；混乱，蒙混；拖着脚走

meanings.example_cn: 请洗牌吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 遗传的；世袭的；世代相传的
meanings.meaning_en: a quality or illness that is hereditary is passed from a parent to a child before the child is born

meanings.example_cn: 世袭贵族

meanings.meaning_cn: 无礼的；傲慢的；粗野的；无耻的
meanings.meaning_en: rude and not showing any respect

meanings.example_cn: 傲慢的语气

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone come to court to hear what their crime is

meanings.example_cn: 他因非法怂恿一名叛国者而被传讯。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does silly amusing things

meanings.meaning_cn: 公平的，公正的；平衡法的
meanings.meaning_en: treating all people in a fair and equal way
meanings.example: an equitable distribution of food supplies
meanings.example_cn: 所供应食品的合理分配

meanings.meaning_cn: 提升；举起；振奋情绪等；提升…的职位
meanings.meaning_en: to move someone or something to a more important level or rank, or make them better than before

meanings.example_cn: 语言使人类高于其他动物。

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something, especially something that is difficult to get

meanings.example_cn: 当时仍然很难获得食品、燃料和其他日用必需品。

meanings.meaning_en: rapidity; swiftness; speed
meanings.example: It is an effective liquid separation tool with advantages such as simpleness, celerity and veracity.
meanings.example_cn: 该量取器使用方法简单、快速，是一种准确、有效的液体分离工具。

meanings.meaning_en: something that covers all or part of your face, to protect or to hide it

meanings.example_cn: 外科手术口罩

meanings.meaning_en: to hide your feelings or the truth about a situation
meanings.example: He was attacked and robbed by two people wearing masks .
meanings.example_cn: 他被两个蒙面人袭击并抢劫。

meanings.example_cn: 在半导体收音机中晶体管代替了真空管。

meanings.meaning_en: a large crowd

meanings.example_cn: 道路被密密麻麻的抗议者阻塞了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 群众的，民众的；大规模的，集中的
meanings.meaning_en: involving or intended for a very large number of people
to come together, or to make people or things come together, in a large group
to express hatred of someone or something
meanings.example: The President was now reviled by the same party he had helped to lead.
meanings.example_cn: 如今谩骂总统的正是他曾经协助领导的那个政党。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拙劣的模仿；诙谐的改编诗文
meanings.meaning_en: something that is not a correct or acceptable example of something
meanings.example: Her performance contains a strong element of self-parody (= when someone makes fun of their own style ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她的表演包含了强烈的自嘲元素。

meanings.meaning_en: to copy someone or something in a way that makes people laugh

meanings.meaning_cn: 繁茂的；丰富的；奢华的；肥沃的
meanings.meaning_en: growing strongly and thickly

meanings.example_cn: 浓密的黑发

meanings.meaning_en: to regularly travel a long distance to get to work

meanings.example_cn: 鲍德里二十年的刑期被减至三年。

meanings.meaning_en: A commute is the journey that you make when you commute
meanings.example: The average Los Angeles commute is over 60 miles a day.
meanings.example_cn: 洛杉矶平均通勤路程每天超过60英里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 退缩；抖缩；蜷缩；弯腰屈膝
meanings.meaning_en: to bend low and move back because you are frightened
meanings.example: The hostages cowered in their seats.
meanings.example_cn: 这些人质蜷缩在其座位上。

meanings.meaning_en: to take control of a country or area next to your own, especially by using force
meanings.example: The Baltic republics were annexed by the Soviet Union in 1940.
meanings.example_cn: 1940年，波罗的海各共和国被苏联吞并。

meanings.meaning_en: If you are remunerated for work that you do, you are paid for it
meanings.example: You will be remunerated and so will your staff.
meanings.example_cn: 你将会得到报酬，你的员工也会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 海的；海事的；沿海的；海员的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sea or ships
meanings.example: San Francisco has lost nearly all of its maritime industry.
meanings.example_cn: 旧金山几乎失去了所有海运业。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the possible different forms of an atom of a particular  element
meanings.example: ...tritium, a radioactive isotope of hydrogen.
meanings.example_cn: ...氚，氢的一种放射性同位素。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无罪释放；表现；脱卸义务和责任；清偿
meanings.meaning_en: to do something well, especially something difficult that you do for the first time in front of other people

meanings.example_cn: 所有被告都被判无罪。

meanings.meaning_en: given to frolicking; merry and playful

meanings.example_cn: 在不远的将来，当小狗崽长到可以四处奔跑嬉戏的时候——狼会回到山坡。

meanings.meaning_en: unnecessarily complicated and difficult to understand

meanings.example_cn: 数学既有深奥的理论，又有精密的计算。

meanings.meaning_cn: 彩色的；色品的；易染色的
meanings.meaning_en: related to bright colours

meanings.meaning_cn: 公正的；坦白的；率直的；偷拍的
meanings.meaning_en: telling the truth, even when the truth may be unpleasant or embarrassing
meanings.example: It struck me as an unusually candid confession for a politician.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得这对一个政治家来说是非常坦率的告白了。

meanings.example: Google Earth has given scientists a way to scout terrain and cheaply reconnoiter habitats likely to produce new finds.
meanings.example_cn: 谷歌地球（Google Earth）使科学家能够廉价地侦察地形，探索那些有可能出现新物种的栖息地。

meanings.meaning_en: crazy or unusual in a way that is amusing

meanings.example_cn: 搞怪喜剧演员维克·里夫斯

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately encourage people to fight, argue etc
meanings.example: They were charged with inciting racial hatred.
meanings.example_cn: 他们被指控煽动种族仇恨。

meanings.meaning_cn: 节约的，节省的；有节制的
meanings.meaning_en: careful not to have too much food, drink etc
meanings.example: The Norwegian adolescents who said they regularly use alcohol and cigarettes were no more likely to report acne than those who were abstemious.
meanings.example_cn: 说自己长了青春痘的那些经常抽烟喝酒的挪威青少年并不比说自己长了青春痘的有节制的孩子们多。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is often asked to give their opinion publicly of a situation or subject

meanings.example_cn: …一位著名的政治权威。

meanings.meaning_cn: 歪斜的，扭歪的；歪曲的；用反语表达幽默的；揶揄的

meanings.example_cn: “那事和你想的一样糟吗？”特拉维斯苦笑着问道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 平静的；安详的；清澈的；晴朗的
meanings.meaning_en: very calm or peaceful
meanings.example: The child’s face was serene and beautiful.
meanings.example_cn: 这孩子的神情宁静可爱。

meanings.example: a serene mountain lake
meanings.example_cn: 静谧的山间湖泊

meanings.meaning_cn: 剧毒的；恶性的；有恶意的
meanings.meaning_en: a poison, disease etc that is virulent is very dangerous and affects people very quickly

meanings.example_cn: 特别凶猛的一种流感

meanings.meaning_cn: 学院的学生；学院的一员
meanings.meaning_en: a member of a college

meanings.example_cn: 作为一名英语专业的学生，我现在已经是一家实验室的销售经理。

meanings.meaning_cn: 类的；一般的；属的；非商标的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to a whole group of things rather than to one thing

meanings.example_cn: 医生有时开比较便宜的非注册商标的药品，而不开比较昂贵的品牌药。

meanings.meaning_en: a contradiction in terms

meanings.meaning_cn: 水槽，水槽；低谷期；饲料槽；低气压
meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow open container that holds water or food for animals
meanings.example: a horse trough
meanings.example_cn: 马槽

meanings.meaning_en: a subject or problem that is often discussed or argued about, especially a social or political matter that affects the interests of a lot of people
meanings.example: Abortion is a highly controversial issue.
meanings.example_cn: 堕胎是个很有争议的话题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发行，发布；发给；放出，排出
meanings.meaning_en: if an organization or someone in an official position issues something such as documents or equipment, they give these things to people who need them
meanings.example: We should raise the issue of discrimination with the council.
meanings.example_cn: 我们应提请市政会讨论歧视的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 多余的，过剩的；被解雇的，失业的；冗长的，累赘的
meanings.meaning_en: if you are redundant, your employer no longer has a job for you
meanings.example: Seventy factory workers were made redundant in the resulting cuts.
meanings.example_cn: 在继而发生的裁员中，70名工厂工人被解雇。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is very fat in a way that is unhealthy
meanings.example: So, what of the future of obesity in America?
meanings.example_cn: 那么，未来美国的肥胖状况会怎么发展呢？

meanings.meaning_en: Something that is engrossing is very interesting and holds your attention completely
meanings.example: He is an engrossing subject for a book.
meanings.example_cn: 他是非常有趣的写书题材。

meanings.meaning_en: a quality or feature, especially one that is considered to be good or useful
meanings.example: What attributes should a good manager possess?
meanings.example_cn: 一名优秀的经理应该具备哪些素质？

meanings.meaning_en: If you attribute something to an event or situation, you think that it was caused by that event or situation
meanings.example: Women tend to attribute their success to external causes such as luck.
meanings.example_cn: 女性往往把她们的成功归因于外因，如运气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 骨架，骨骼；纲要；骨瘦如柴的人
meanings.meaning_en: the most important parts of something, to which more detail can be added later
meanings.example: We agreed on a skeleton outline of the proposal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们给提案商定了一个基本框架。

meanings.meaning_cn: 骨骼的；骨瘦如柴的；概略的

meanings.meaning_en: a thin piece of material that women wear to cover their faces at formal occasions or for religious reasons
meanings.example: She lifted her veil with both hands.
meanings.example_cn: 她用双手揭开面纱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 遮蔽；掩饰；以面纱遮掩；用帷幕分隔
meanings.meaning_en: to cover something with a veil
meanings.example: a bridal veil
meanings.example_cn: 新娘的面纱

meanings.meaning_en: not good at doing something
meanings.example: inept leadership
meanings.example_cn: 拙劣的领导

meanings.meaning_cn: 血管；叶脉；[地质] 岩脉；纹理；翅脉；性情
meanings.meaning_en: one of the tubes which carries blood to your heart from other parts of your body
meanings.example: the pulmonary vein
meanings.example_cn: 肺静脉

meanings.meaning_cn: 使成脉络；象脉络般分布于
meanings.example: She felt the blood racing through her veins as they kissed.
meanings.example_cn: 他们接吻时她觉得热血沸腾。

meanings.meaning_en: something such as an organization which has developed from a larger or earlier one
meanings.example: the Mafia and its offshoots
meanings.example_cn: 黑手党组织及其分支

meanings.meaning_en: something that causes problems, or that makes someone or something less likely to be successful or effective
meanings.example: Criminal behaviour can be linked to economic disadvantage.
meanings.example_cn: 犯罪行为可能会与经济困难有关。

meanings.meaning_en: deserving or able to be believed or trusted
meanings.example: Her excuse was barely credible.
meanings.example_cn: 她的借口无法让人信服。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who you try to defeat in a competition, game, fight, or argument
meanings.example: Graf’s opponent in today’s final will be Sukova.
meanings.example_cn: 格拉芙今天的决赛对手将是苏科娃。

meanings.example: He is admired even by his political opponents.
meanings.example_cn: 他甚至受到政敌的钦佩。

meanings.meaning_en: a shape with four equal straight sides, especially one that is not a square
meanings.example: Gradually, though, the rhombus was tipped a little more, until 3-1-2-1-3 became 4-2-4, the system with which Brazil won the World Cup in 1958.
meanings.example_cn: 不过，菱形中场逐渐进一步倾斜，直到31213最后演变成了1958年巴西夺得世界杯时采用的424。

meanings.meaning_en: an insulting word for someone who has a low rank – often used humorously

meanings.meaning_cn: 可理解的；明了的；仅能用智力了解的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is intelligible can be understood
meanings.example: The language of Darwin was intelligible to experts and non-experts alike.
meanings.example_cn: 达尔文的语言对专家和平常人来说都容易理解。

meanings.meaning_en: things that have been stolen during a violent attack, especially during a war
meanings.example: Henry’s army returned loaded down with plunder.
meanings.example_cn: 亨利的部队满载战利品而归。

meanings.meaning_en: to steal large amounts of money or property from somewhere, especially while fighting in a war

meanings.meaning_cn: 独裁者，专制君主；独断独行的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who makes decisions and gives orders to people without asking them for their opinion

meanings.meaning_cn: 活泼的；快活的；有生气的
meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a woman, who is vivacious has a lot of energy and a happy attractive manner – used to show approval
meanings.example: a vivacious personality
meanings.example_cn: 活泼外向的个性

meanings.meaning_cn: 缄默的；不言而喻的；心照不宣的；默许的
meanings.meaning_en: tacit agreement, approval, support etc is given without anything actually being said
meanings.example: a tacit agreement between the three big companies
meanings.example_cn: 三家大公司之间的默契

meanings.meaning_cn: [语] 象形文字；古代石壁画；统计图表
meanings.meaning_en: A pictogram is a simple drawing that represents something. Pictograms were used as the earliest form of writing.
meanings.example: ...a pictogram of a pine tree.
meanings.example_cn: …一幅代表一棵松树的象形图画。

meanings.meaning_en: a tense situation is one in which you feel very anxious and worried because of something bad that might happen
meanings.example: Is anything wrong? You look a little tense.
meanings.example_cn: 有什么不对劲吗？你看起来有点紧张。

meanings.meaning_en: If your muscles tense, if you tense, or if you tense your muscles, your muscles become tight and stiff, often because you are anxious or frightened
meanings.example: Newman's stomach muscles tensed.
meanings.example_cn: 纽曼的腹部肌肉绷紧了。

meanings.meaning_en: any of the forms of a verb that show the time, continuance, or completion of an action or state that is expressed by the verb. ‘I am’ is in the present tense, ‘I was’ is past tense, and ‘I will be’ is future tense.
a part or place that is higher than what is around it
a sea animal with eight legs, a shell, and two large claws
meanings.example: She sold me a couple of live lobsters.
meanings.example_cn: 她卖给了我几只活龙虾。

meanings.meaning_en: a decimal system is based on the number 10
meanings.example: changing to a decimal system
meanings.example_cn: 改为十进制

meanings.meaning_en: a  fraction (= a number less than 1 )  that is shown as a  full stop  followed by the number of  tenth s  ,  hundredth s  etc. The numbers 0.5, 0.175, and 0.661 are decimals.
meanings.example: calculations accurate to three decimal places
meanings.example_cn: 精确到小数点后三位的计算

meanings.meaning_cn: 意外发现珍奇事物的本领；有意外发现珍宝的运气
meanings.meaning_en: Serendipity is the luck some people have in finding or creating interesting or valuable things by chance
meanings.example: Some of the best effects in my garden have been the result of serendipity.
meanings.example_cn: 我花园里最珍贵的几件物品是机缘巧合之下意外所得。

meanings.meaning_cn: 超越；胜过，优于；非…所能办到或理解
meanings.meaning_en: to be even better or greater than someone or something else
meanings.example: He had surpassed all our expectations .
meanings.example_cn: 他超越了我们所有的预期。

meanings.meaning_cn: 混乱，骚乱；精神病院，疯人院
meanings.meaning_en: a situation where there is a lot of noise and confusion
meanings.example: When the bomb exploded, there was bedlam.
meanings.example_cn: 炸弹爆炸以后，现场一片混乱。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the most basic and important parts of something
meanings.example: We have to tackle the fundamental cause of the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须解决问题的根本原因。

meanings.example: the fundamental principles of liberty and equality
meanings.example_cn: 自由和平等这两个基本原则

meanings.meaning_cn: 无情的；不屈不挠的；不可阻挡的；无法改变的
meanings.meaning_en: an inexorable process cannot be stopped
meanings.example: the inexorable decline of Britain’s manufacturing industry
meanings.example_cn: 英国制造业无可挽回的衰落

meanings.meaning_cn: [军] 机动；演习；调遣；用计谋
专业，专长；特产；特性；招牌菜
meanings.meaning_en: a subject or job that you know a lot about or have a lot of experience of
meanings.example: Johnson’s specialty is medieval European history.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰逊的专业是中世纪欧洲史。

meanings.meaning_en: complete, or as great as is possible
meanings.example: a total ban on cigarette advertising
meanings.example_cn: 香烟广告的全面禁止

meanings.meaning_en: to reach a particular total
meanings.example: He looked at her with a total lack of comprehension.
meanings.example_cn: 他一头雾水地望着她。

meanings.meaning_en: the final number or amount of things, people etc when everything has been counted
meanings.example: a sport that demands total commitment
meanings.example_cn: 需要全身心投入的体育运动

meanings.meaning_cn: 多汁的；多水分的；多汁性的
meanings.meaning_en: juicy and good to eat
meanings.example: a succulent steak
meanings.example_cn: 美味多汁的牛排

meanings.meaning_en: a plant such as a  cactus  , that has thick soft leaves or stems that can hold a lot of liquid

meanings.example: Vince watched, his mouth agape in horror.
meanings.example_cn: 文斯注视着，吓得张大了嘴。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal container that holds a fire and is used to keep people warm outside
used to address or talk about the members of an organization or group, especially a religious group
meanings.example: We must help our brethren, it is our duty.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须帮助我们的同胞,这是我们的职责。

meanings.meaning_en: a young male cow that cannot breed

meanings.meaning_cn: 强制的；绝对的；断然的；专横的
meanings.meaning_en: peremptory behaviour, speech etc is not polite or friendly and shows that the person speaking expects to be obeyed immediately
meanings.example: a peremptory demand for silence
meanings.example_cn: 要人肃静的蛮横要求

meanings.meaning_en: plentiful
meanings.example: For thou, Lord, art good, and ready to forgive; and plenteous in mercy unto all them that call upon thee.
meanings.example_cn: 主阿，你本为良善，乐意饶恕人，有丰盛的慈爱，赐给凡求告你的人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who pretends to have certain beliefs or opinions that they do not really have – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: The magazine wrongly suggested he was a liar and a hypocrite.
meanings.example_cn: 该杂志错误地暗示他是个骗子和伪君子。

meanings.meaning_en: in bed

meanings.meaning_cn: 阴冷的；荒凉的，无遮蔽的；黯淡的，无希望的；冷酷的；单调的
meanings.meaning_en: cold and without any pleasant or comfortable features
meanings.example: a bleak January afternoon
meanings.example_cn: 一月里一个阴冷的下午

meanings.meaning_en: one of several natural substances that exist in food such as meat, eggs, and beans, and which your body needs in order to grow and remain strong and healthy
meanings.example: Where do you get your protein?
meanings.example_cn: 你从哪里获得蛋白质？

meanings.example: I know that I get around 90g of protein from that.
meanings.example_cn: 我知道我会从中得到90克左右的蛋白质。

meanings.meaning_cn: 固定的；沉着的；沉静的；古板的，保守的
meanings.example: a staid old bachelor
meanings.example_cn: 一个古板的老光棍

meanings.meaning_en: when someone pretends to have certain beliefs or opinions that they do not really have – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: It would be sheer hypocrisy to pray for success, since I’ve never believed in God.
meanings.example_cn: 我从不相信上帝，因此为获成功而祈祷是纯粹的虚伪之举。

meanings.meaning_en: to send out gas, liquid, smoke etc, or to allow it to escape
meanings.example: Hospitals now tend to discharge patients earlier than in the past.
meanings.example_cn: 与过去相比，现在医院更趋向于让病人早些出院。

meanings.meaning_en: when gas, liquid, smoke etc is sent out, or the substance that is sent out
something unimportant or not valuable
meanings.example: There’s no point in arguing over trifles.
meanings.example_cn: 为琐事争吵毫无意义。

meanings.meaning_en: a transparent block of glass that breaks up white light into different colours
the distance or measurement around the outside of a circle or any round shape
meanings.example: ...a scientist calculating the Earth's circumference.
meanings.example_cn: …一位正在计算地球周长的科学家。

meanings.meaning_en: To refurbish a building or room means to clean it and decorate it and make it more attractive or better equipped
meanings.example: We have spent money on refurbishing the offices.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已在这些办公室的翻新上花了钱。

meanings.meaning_cn: [化学] 溶质；[化学] 溶解物
meanings.meaning_en: the component of a solution that changes its state in forming the solution or the component that is not present in excess; the substance that is dissolved in another substance
meanings.example: Or in solutions, where your solutes, your solute molecules are mixing around.
meanings.example_cn: 或者是溶液状态溶质，溶质分子相互混合。

meanings.meaning_cn: 突降法；虎头蛇尾；令人扫兴的结尾
meanings.meaning_en: a situation or event that does not seem exciting because it happens after something that was much better
meanings.example: Going back to work after a month travelling in China was bound to be an anticlimax.
meanings.example_cn: 在中国旅行了一个月之后再回去工作必然很没劲。

meanings.meaning_en: a petulant mood
similar to something else in size, number, quality etc, so that you can make a comparison
meanings.example: A car of comparable size would cost far more abroad.
meanings.example_cn: 同样大小的汽车在国外要贵得多。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to the earliest time in the existence of the universe or the Earth
meanings.example: Primeval clouds of gas formed themselves into stars.
meanings.example_cn: 原生气团形成了恒星。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring electrical resistance
meanings.example: Referring to the main picture above, the two anode connections uppermost form a 50 ohm balanced line from where the output power is extracted.
meanings.example_cn: 表示主要的照片上方，二个阳极连接在最上形成被平衡线的一个50 欧姆从输出力量被摘录哪里。

meanings.meaning_en: to outline; give a faint indication of
electrical force measured in volts
meanings.example: The systems are getting smaller and using lower voltages.
meanings.example_cn: 这些系统正变得更小而且使用更低的电压。

meanings.meaning_en: to express your sympathy for someone who is unhappy about something
meanings.example: When I lost, he commiserated with me.
meanings.example_cn: 我失败时，他同情我。

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh at a person, idea etc and say that they are stupid
meanings.example: At the time, his ideas were ridiculed.
meanings.example_cn: 当时他的观点被人讥笑。

meanings.meaning_en: unkind laughter or remarks that are intended to make someone or something seem stupid

meanings.meaning_cn: 偶然性；[安全] 意外事故；可能性；[审计] 意外开支；[离散数学或逻辑学]偶然式
meanings.meaning_en: A contingency is something that might happen in the future
meanings.example: I need to examine all possible contingencies.
meanings.example_cn: 我得查看所有可能发生的事。

meanings.meaning_en: moving in a way that does not look graceful
meanings.example: a tall ungainly teenager
meanings.example_cn: 一个动作笨拙的高个子少年

meanings.meaning_en: a statement saying that someone is guilty of a crime or of doing something wrong
meanings.example: The main accusation levelled against him was that he tried to avoid military service.
meanings.example_cn: 对他提出的主要指控是他想逃避兵役。

meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that is stagy is not natural and is like the way an actor behaves on a stage
meanings.example: a very stagy manner
meanings.example_cn: 非常做作的举止

meanings.meaning_en: very similar to something
meanings.example: Something akin to panic overwhelmed him.
meanings.example_cn: 一种近似惊恐的感觉使他不知所措。

meanings.meaning_cn: (Akin)人名；(土、瑞典、尼日利)阿金；(匈)奥金；(英)埃金

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument with a very thin hollow needle used for putting drugs directly into the body through the skin
meanings.example: He held up a hypodermic to check the dosage.
meanings.example_cn: 他举起皮下注射器检查药剂量。

meanings.meaning_en: used to give an  injection  beneath the skin
ungrateful
meanings.example: She gathered her belongings and headed to the gate, refusing to look back at the ingrate thief.
meanings.example_cn: 她收拾好了行李，走向登机口，根本不想再看一眼那忘恩负义的小偷。

meanings.meaning_en: an ungrateful person
meanings.example: Too late to apologize, she realized with grief, that she was the rude one, the ingrate, the thief.
meanings.example_cn: 她悲哀地意识到，道歉已经太晚，她才是那个不讲理的、忘恩负义的、偷了曲奇饼的人。

meanings.meaning_en: You use indubitable to describe something when you want to emphasize that it is definite and cannot be doubted
meanings.example: His brilliance renders this film an indubitable classic.
meanings.example_cn: 他的出色表现让这部电影成为了毋庸置疑的经典。

meanings.meaning_en: to defeat or control a person or group, especially using force
meanings.example: Police managed to subdue the angry crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 警察设法控制住了愤怒的人群。

meanings.meaning_cn: 固执的，坚强的；坚定不移的；坚硬无比的
meanings.meaning_en: determined not to change your opinion or a decision that you have made
meanings.example: She begged me to change my mind, but I remained adamant .
meanings.example_cn: 她求我改变主意，但我坚决不肯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 几何学的；[数] 几何学图形的
meanings.meaning_en: having or using the shapes and lines in  geometry  , such as circles or squares, especially when these are arranged in regular patterns
meanings.example: a geometric design
meanings.example_cn: 几何图形设计

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 除法；部门；分配；分割；师（军队）；赛区
meanings.meaning_en: the act of separating something into two or more different parts, or the way these parts are separated or shared
meanings.example: the traditional division of labour (= the way that particular tasks are shared ) between husband and wife
meanings.example_cn: 夫妻之间传统的分工

meanings.meaning_en: a weapon that can fly over long distances and that explodes when it hits the thing it has been aimed at
meanings.example: a nuclear missile
meanings.example_cn: 核导弹

meanings.meaning_cn: 导弹的；可投掷的；用以发射导弹的
meanings.example: a missile attack
meanings.example_cn: 导弹袭击

meanings.meaning_en: if a room, building etc can accommodate a particular number of people or things, it has enough space for them
meanings.example: He bought a huge house to accommodate his library.
meanings.example_cn: 他买了一座大房子来放他的藏书。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a  battery  that collects  electron s  , often a wire or piece of metal with the sign (+)
meanings.example: So the left electrode will be the cathode as I have configured it, and the right electrode will be anode.
meanings.example_cn: 因此左边电极就成了阴极,正如我原来设定的一样，右边的电极就是阳极。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone stop feeling angry
meanings.example: These changes did little to placate the unions.
meanings.example_cn: 这些变革对于工会没有起到多少安抚作用。

meanings.meaning_en: land that is always very wet or covered with a layer of water
meanings.example: I spent one whole night by a swamp behind the road listening to frogs.
meanings.example_cn: 我整个晚上都在这条路后面的一个沼泽地旁听蛙鸣。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使陷于沼泽；使沉没；使陷入困境
meanings.meaning_en: If something swamps a place or object, it fills it with water
meanings.example: Their electronic navigation failed and a rogue wave swamped the boat.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的电子导航装置失灵了，一个巨浪吞没了那只船。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem less important than it really is
meanings.example: White House officials attempted to downplay the President’s role in the affair.
meanings.example_cn: 白宫官员试图为总统在这一事件中的责任开脱。

meanings.meaning_en: very fat in a way that is unhealthy
meanings.example: Obese people tend to have higher blood pressure than lean people.
meanings.example_cn: 肥胖的人往往比瘦人血压高。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement to meet someone at a particular time and place, often secretly
meanings.example: plans for a secret rendezvous
meanings.example_cn: 秘密约会的计划

meanings.meaning_en: to meet someone at a time or place that was arranged earlier
if a company or government has a monopoly of a business or political activity, it has complete control of it so that other organizations cannot compete with it
meanings.example: a monopoly in copper trading
meanings.example_cn: 对铜交易的垄断

meanings.meaning_en: extreme anger
meanings.example: He was scared of incurring his father’s wrath .
meanings.example_cn: 他害怕惹他父亲大发脾气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 秘密的；鬼鬼祟祟的；暗中的
meanings.meaning_en: done secretly or quickly because you do not want other people to notice
meanings.example: Rory tried to sneak a surreptitious glance at Adam’s wristwatch.
meanings.example_cn: 罗里试图偷偷看一眼亚当的手表。

meanings.meaning_en: very small – used especially in Scottish English
meanings.example: My wee boy is three.
meanings.example_cn: 我的小儿子三岁。

meanings.meaning_cn: 怀旧的，回忆往事的；耽于回想的
meanings.meaning_en: thinking about the past
meanings.example: Her face wore a reminiscent smile.
meanings.example_cn: 她面带微笑，沉浸在往事之中。

meanings.meaning_en: to give up the position of being king or queen
meanings.example: King Alfonso XIII abdicated in favour of his eldest son.
meanings.example_cn: 国王阿方索十三世把王位让给了长子。

meanings.meaning_en: if you unify two or more parts or things, or if they unify, they are combined to make a single unit
meanings.example: Strong support for the war has unified the nation.
meanings.example_cn: 对战争的坚决支持使这个国家团结了起来。

meanings.meaning_cn: （尤指宗教原因的）隐士；隐居者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives alone and has a simple way of life, usually for religious reasons
meanings.example: I've spent the past ten years living like a hermit.
meanings.example_cn: 我过去10年里过着隐士般的生活。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or coming from a province
meanings.example: a provincial election
meanings.example_cn: 省级选举

meanings.meaning_cn: 粗野的人；乡下人；外地人

meanings.meaning_cn: 操作；经营；[外科] 手术；[数][计] 运算

meanings.meaning_en: the way that someone stands and walks

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the veins(= tubes that carry blood ) in your body

meanings.example_cn: ...静脉血。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that settles an argument between two opposing sides

meanings.example_cn: 欧洲法庭将对这宗争端作出最终裁决。

meanings.meaning_cn: 肥沃的；多产的；丰饶的；生殖力旺盛的
meanings.meaning_en: able to produce many children, young animals, or crops

meanings.meaning_en: something that happens

meanings.meaning_en: full of activity, confusion, or violence

meanings.example: We took a gravel road that meandered through farmland.

meanings.meaning_en: showing your good feelings in a very excited way

meanings.meaning_en: To aggrandize someone means to make them seem richer, more powerful, and more important than they really are. To aggrandize a building means to make it more impressive.
meanings.example: At the dinner table, my father would go on and on, showing off, aggrandizing himself.
meanings.example_cn: 吃饭时我父亲总是不停地夸耀和吹嘘自己。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偷懒的；无计谋的；无能的

meanings.example_cn: 回顾往事，我曾是一个悲哀的小男孩，一个无能的、任性的、沮丧的标准问题少年。

meanings.meaning_cn: 灵活的；柔韧的；易弯曲的
meanings.meaning_en: a person, plan etc that is flexible can change or be changed easily to suit any new situation

meanings.meaning_cn: 活力，生气；生命力，生动性

meanings.meaning_en: to hate something or someone very much

meanings.meaning_en: a reduction in the usual price of something

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce the price of something
the place that someone or something is going to

meanings.meaning_cn: 气体；[矿业] 瓦斯；汽油；毒气

meanings.meaning_cn: （主张等）站得住脚的；可维持的

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a proud unfriendly way

meanings.meaning_en: used in the titles of official records of events or activities

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone from doing what they are trying to do

meanings.example_cn: 如果你是自由职业者，应该考虑办理私人养老金事宜。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone does something with abandon, they behave in a careless or uncontrolled way, without thinking or caring about what they are doing

meanings.example_cn: 他以不计后果的放纵态度对待生活–我想他自己都不知道他接下来要做什么。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone, especially someone you are responsible for
to make someone feel less afraid, worried etc

meanings.meaning_en: not like anything known before, and unusual or interesting

meanings.meaning_en: a long written story in which the characters and events are usually imaginary
a space between two objects or two parts of an object, especially because something is missing

meanings.meaning_en: a large quantity of something

meanings.meaning_en: the act of creating something

meanings.meaning_cn: 人类；人道；仁慈；人文学科

meanings.meaning_en: a list of passengers or goods carried on a ship, plane, or train
plain and easy to see
a dead human body, especially one used for study

meanings.meaning_en: to stop developing or making progress

meanings.example: Note that you must use the same variant of this option for all compiler runs related to the same project.
meanings.example_cn: 注意，对于所有运行的与同一个项目相关的编译器，必须使用这个选项的相同变体。

meanings.meaning_cn: [化学] 中和；[化学] 中和作用；中立状态

to leave (land) unseeded after ploughing and harrowing it

meanings.example_cn: 但没有一本书记录了新英格兰的冬夜，尽管它是上天仁慈的恩惠。

meanings.meaning_en: easily broken or damaged

meanings.example: The food had been adulterated to increase its weight.

meanings.meaning_cn: 微妙的；精细的；敏感的；狡猾的；稀薄的

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two special metal springs on the front or back of a train or at the end of a railway track, to take the shock if the train hits something

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce the bad effects of something

meanings.meaning_cn: 划分，分开；[数] 分割；隔墙；隔离物
meanings.meaning_en: a thin wall that separates one part of a room from another

meanings.example_cn: …仅仅用玻璃隔板隔开的新办公室。

meanings.meaning_en: to divide a country, building, or room into two or more parts
If you refer to the mediocrity of something, you mean that it is of average quality but you think it should be better
meanings.example: ...the mediocrity of most contemporary literature.
meanings.example_cn: …大多数当代文学作品的平庸。

meanings.meaning_cn: 平凡的，没有特色的；难以区别的；莫可名状的

meanings.example_cn: 很普通的郊区房子

meanings.meaning_cn: 不属任何类型的人；难以形容的人或物

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a sexually immoral or uncontrolled way

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a right, property, money etc that you believe you should have because of the family or country you belong to

meanings.example_cn: 奥运会冠军

meanings.meaning_en: something that you are trying hard to achieve, especially in business or politics
to force someone to do something they do not want to do by threatening them

meanings.example_cn: 波特曾争辩说是政府胁迫他认罪。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of not being too proud about yourself – use this to show approval

meanings.meaning_en: a clear liquid with a strong bad smell that is used for cleaning or in cleaning products
extremely thorough and complete

meanings.example_cn: 彻底的调查

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of doubt or fear about what might happen or about whether something is right

meanings.meaning_en: unwilling to change your ideas or behaviour, in a way that seems unreasonable

meanings.meaning_cn: 陈腐的；平庸的；老一套的
