meanings.meaning_cn: 掩饰；与…不符；使失望；证明…虚假错误
meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a false idea about something
meanings.example: Her pleasant manner belied her true character.
meanings.example_cn: 她讨人喜欢的举止掩饰了她真实的个性。

meanings.meaning_en: a house or room that is commodious is very big
meanings.example: “The Coffee houses particularly are very commodious for a free Conversation, and for reading at an easie Rate all manner of printed News,” noted one observer.
meanings.example_cn: “尤其是咖啡馆，是一个非常宽敞的自由交谈之处，来阅读与评论形形色色的印刷新闻”，一个观察员指出。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无比的；无双的；空前未有的
meanings.meaning_en: bigger, better, or worse than anything else
meanings.example: an achievement unparalleled in sporting history
meanings.example_cn: 体育史上空前的成就

meanings.meaning_cn: [生理] 阈下的；潜在意识的；微小得难以察觉的
meanings.meaning_en: affecting your mind in a way that you are not conscious of
meanings.example: a subliminal message
meanings.example_cn: 潜在的含义

meanings.meaning_cn: 张力，拉力；紧张，不安；电压
meanings.meaning_en: tightness or stiffness in a wire, rope, muscle etc
meanings.example: Tension in the neck muscles can cause headaches.
meanings.example_cn: 颈部肌肉紧张会导致头痛。

meanings.example: Muscle tension can be a sign of stress.
meanings.example_cn: 肌肉紧张可能是压力大的迹象。

meanings.example: This building epitomizes the spirit of the nineteenth century.
meanings.example_cn: 这栋建筑体现了19世纪的时代精神。

meanings.meaning_cn: 季度的，按季度的；一年四次的
meanings.meaning_en: produced or happening four times a year
meanings.example: We publish a quarterly journal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们出版一份季刊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 按季度，[农] 一季一次地；纵横四分地
meanings.meaning_en: Quarterly is also an adverb
meanings.example: The rent is payable quarterly.
meanings.example_cn: 房租按季度支付。

meanings.meaning_en: a magazine that is produced four times a year
meanings.example: It makes no difference whether dividends are paid quarterly or annually.
meanings.example_cn: 红利是按季度还是按年度支付没有区别。

meanings.meaning_cn: [分化] 烧瓶；长颈瓶，细颈瓶；酒瓶，携带瓶
meanings.meaning_en: a  hip flask
meanings.example: He took out a metal flask from a canvas bag.
meanings.example_cn: 他从帆布袋里拿出了一个金属水瓶。

meanings.meaning_en: not drunk
meanings.example: He’s a nice guy when he’s sober.
meanings.example_cn: 他没喝醉时是个不错的家伙。

meanings.meaning_cn: 似是而非的；外表美观的；华而不实的；徒有其表的
meanings.meaning_en: seeming to be true or correct, but actually false
meanings.example: a specious argument
meanings.example_cn: 貌似有理的 论据

meanings.meaning_cn: 非常高兴的；欢跃的；狂喜的；欢欣鼓舞的
meanings.meaning_en: very happy or proud, especially because you have succeeded in doing something
meanings.example: an exultant mood
meanings.example_cn: 得意的心情

meanings.meaning_cn: 险恶的；气候严酷的；狂风暴雨的
meanings.meaning_en: inclement weather is unpleasantly cold, wet etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 地球上处于正相对应的两个地区，尤指（与欧洲形成对跖地的）澳大拉西亚
meanings.meaning_en: either or both of two points, places, or regions that are situated diametrically opposite to one another on the earth's surface, esp the country or region opposite one's own
to make someone who is climbing a mountain etc safe by attaching a rope to them and to a rock
to speak loudly, sometimes with actions, so that people notice you
meanings.example: He raised his right fist and declaimed: "Liar and cheat!"
meanings.example_cn: 他举起右拳慷慨陈词:"骗子！"

meanings.example: Telling a lie as a joke or to fool someone is a harmless type of lie, also known as a jocose lie.
meanings.example_cn: 开玩笑或捉弄人般地说谎是无害的谎言，也称为戏虐性的谎言。

meanings.meaning_cn: 占有的；所有的；所有格的；占有欲强的
meanings.meaning_en: wanting someone to have feelings of love or friendship for you and no one else
meanings.example: Danny could be very jealous and possessive about me.
meanings.example_cn: 丹尼会很嫉妒，对我独占欲极强。

meanings.meaning_en: an adjective,  pronoun  , or form of a word that shows that something belongs to someone or something
to satisfy a desire or need for something such as food or sex, especially so that you feel you have had too much
meanings.example: The dinner was enough to satiate the gourmets.
meanings.example_cn: 这顿饭足够让美食家们吃个够。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone, especially a child, misbehaves, they behave in a way that is not acceptable to other people
meanings.example: When the children misbehaved she was unable to cope.
meanings.example_cn: 当孩子们捣乱时，她无能为力。

meanings.meaning_en: a bicycle with three wheels, especially for young children
meanings.example: He cannibalized his old bicycle to repair his tricycle.
meanings.example_cn: 他把旧自行车的零件拆下来修配他的三轮车。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of the structure of human or animal bodies
meanings.example: a professor of anatomy
meanings.example_cn: 解剖学教授

meanings.meaning_cn: 仇外；害怕生人者；畏惧和憎恨外国人的人
meanings.meaning_en: a person who hates or fears foreigners or strangers
to damage something very badly or completely
meanings.example: The city centre was devastated by the bomb.
meanings.example_cn: 市中心被这枚炸弹摧毁了。

meanings.meaning_en: able to move quickly and easily
meanings.example: Dogs are surprisingly agile.
meanings.example_cn: 狗出奇地敏捷。

meanings.meaning_cn: [药] 镇静剂；能使安静的东西；止痛药
meanings.meaning_en: a drug used to make someone calm or go to sleep
meanings.example: They use opium as a sedative, rather than as a narcotic.
meanings.example_cn: 他们把鸦片作为镇静剂，而不是作为麻醉剂。

meanings.meaning_en: to compete very hard with someone in order to get something
meanings.example: California is vying with other states to capture a piece of the growing communications market.
meanings.example_cn: 加州正在与各州竞争，以求在不断扩大的通讯市场上获得份额。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has the power to make laws or belongs to an institution that makes laws
meanings.example: ...an attempt to get U.S. legislators to change the system.
meanings.example_cn: …让美国立法者改变体制的一次努力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 讽刺；讽刺文学，讽刺作品
meanings.meaning_en: a way of criticizing something such as a group of people or a system, in which you deliberately make them seem funny so that people will see their faults
meanings.example: the characteristic use of satire in Jonson’s work
meanings.example_cn: 琼森作品中讽刺手法的独到运用

meanings.example: Upon receipt of a copy of the arbitration application, the respondent shall, within the time limit prescribed by the Arbitration Rules, submit its defence to the arbitration commission.
meanings.example_cn: 被申请人收到仲裁申请书副本后，应当在仲裁规则规定的期限内向仲裁委员会提交答辩书。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has to defend their own case in a law court, especially in a  divorce  case
to use satire to make people see someone’s or something’s faults
meanings.example: a play satirizing the fashion industry
meanings.example_cn: 一部讽刺时装业的戏剧

meanings.meaning_en: extremely tired
meanings.example: You look absolutely exhausted.
meanings.example_cn: 你看上去一副疲惫不堪的样子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 耗尽；用尽；使…精疲力尽（exhaust的过去式）
meanings.meaning_en: If something exhausts you, it makes you so tired, either physically or mentally, that you have no energy left
meanings.example: Don't exhaust him.
meanings.example_cn: 别让他精疲力竭了。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that someone or something is not important and deserves no respect
meanings.example: The public is treated with contempt by broadcasters.
meanings.example_cn: 公众受到了节目主持人的轻蔑对待。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely unpleasant or ugly
meanings.example: a hideous dress
meanings.example_cn: 一条很难看的连衣裙

meanings.meaning_en: feeling very ashamed and sad because you know that you have done something wrong
meanings.example: She looked self-conscious and guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 她看上去很不自然，很内疚的样子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迟钝的；圆头的；不锋利的
meanings.meaning_en: slow to understand things, in a way that is annoying
meanings.example: ‘But why?’ said Charles, being deliberately obtuse.
meanings.example_cn: “但是为什么呢？”查尔斯故意傻傻地说道。

meanings.meaning_en: You say that something is anachronistic when you think that it is out of date or old-fashioned
meanings.example: Many of its practices seem anachronistic.
meanings.example_cn: 它的很多做法似乎过时了。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture with a flat top supported by legs
meanings.example: The food was served on long tables.
meanings.example_cn: 食物放在长餐桌上供应。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a bill etc to be discussed or dealt with in the future
prescribed as a rule
meanings.example: But presently we have no concrete prescript in the field. This thesis is trying to solve this problem.
meanings.example_cn: 但目前国内尚无相关的具体规定，本文在这些方面做了初步的尝试。

meanings.meaning_en: an official order or rule
meanings.example: The prescript of company dissolution system in our Company Law is shallow, so that had many problems in practice, the research of theoretics had not further development.
meanings.example_cn: 我国《公司法》对公司解散制度的规定较为粗浅，以致在实践中出现了很多问题，理论界的研究也未进一步深入。

meanings.meaning_en: to drink something, especially alcohol – sometimes used humorously
meanings.example: Both men imbibed considerable quantities of gin.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个男人都喝了大量的杜松子酒。

meanings.meaning_en: to give facts or reasons in order to prove that something is true
meanings.example: Let me adduce more evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 让我举出更多的证据。

meanings.example: Can I open a window? It’s boiling in here.
meanings.example_cn: 我开扇窗好吗？这里热死人了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不知情的；不知不觉的，无意的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe a person or their actions as unwitting, you mean that the person does something or is involved in something without realizing it
meanings.example: We were unwitting collaborators in his plan.
meanings.example_cn: 我们无意中成为他的计划的协作者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使精神错乱；使丧失智能（unwit的ing形式）
羞怯的；缺乏自信的；谦虚谨慎的
meanings.meaning_en: shy and not wanting to make people notice you or talk about you
meanings.example: John was as bouncy and ebullient as Helen was diffident and reserved.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰活泼、热情；而海伦却羞怯、矜持。

meanings.meaning_en: a short sentence or phrase giving a rule on how to behave, which expresses the aims or beliefs of a person, school, or institution
meanings.example: ‘Be prepared’ is the motto of the Boy Scouts.
meanings.example_cn: “时刻准备着”是童子军的格言。

meanings.meaning_en: a solid object with six equal square sides
meanings.example: a sugar cube
meanings.example_cn: 一块方糖

meanings.meaning_cn: 使成立方形；使自乘二次；量…的体积
meanings.meaning_en: to multiply a number by itself twice
meanings.example: an ice cube
meanings.example_cn: 一小方块冰

meanings.meaning_en: frenetic activity is fast and not very organized
meanings.example: She rushes from job to job at a frenetic pace.
meanings.example_cn: 她发疯似的不停地跳槽。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who gives money for a good purpose
meanings.example: An anonymous benefactor donated $2 million.
meanings.example_cn: 一位没留姓名的捐助人捐款二百万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: a slight idea about something
meanings.example: I had an inkling that she was pregnant.
meanings.example_cn: 我隐约知道她怀孕了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 暗示 （inkle的ing形式）；略知；低声说出
母权制；女家长制；女族长制；母系氏族
meanings.meaning_en: a social system in which the oldest woman controls a family and its possessions
a situation in which it is impossible to continue with a discussion or plan because the people involved cannot agree
meanings.example: Negotiations seemed to have reached an impasse.
meanings.example_cn: 谈判似乎陷入了僵局。

meanings.meaning_cn: 疑问，质问；疑问号 ；[计] 查询
meanings.meaning_en: a question that you ask to get information, or to check that something is true or correct
meanings.example: Staff are always available to answer your queries.
meanings.example_cn: 员工随时为您解答疑问。

meanings.meaning_en: to express doubt about whether something is true or correct
If someone expurgates a piece of writing, they remove parts of it before it is published because they think those parts will offend or shock people
meanings.example: He heavily expurgated the work in its second edition.
meanings.example_cn: 在第二版中，他大幅删减了该作品。

meanings.meaning_en: to inspire with love; captivate; charm
having two of something or two parts
meanings.example: a dual system of education
meanings.example_cn: 二元[双元]教育体系

meanings.meaning_cn: 狂热入迷者；盲信者；盲信
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has extreme political or religious ideas and is often dangerous
meanings.example: fanatics who represent a real danger to democracy
meanings.example_cn: 对民主构成很大威胁的狂热分子

meanings.meaning_en: Fanatic means the same as
meanings.example: a religious fanatic
meanings.example_cn: 宗教狂热分子

meanings.meaning_cn: 颗粒；[物] 质点；极小量；小品词
meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of something
meanings.example: dust particles
meanings.example_cn: 尘埃

meanings.meaning_en: having a pleasant taste
meanings.example: If the person is not met on bathing body sapid , if the freezer in the home is long be not cleaned or clean a method incorrect also can have a bad taste, what reason is this after all?
meanings.example_cn: 人要是不洗澡身上就会有味道，家里的冰箱要是长时间不清洗或清洗方法不正确也会有一股难闻的味道，这究竟是什么原因呢？

meanings.meaning_cn: 排斥的；防水的；弹回的；令人讨厌的
meanings.meaning_en: very unpleasant
meanings.example: She found him physically repellent.
meanings.example_cn: 她觉得他的长相很讨厌。

meanings.meaning_cn: 封建制度的；领地的；世仇的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to feudalism
meanings.example: the feudal system
meanings.example_cn: 封建制度

meanings.meaning_en: the speed of something that is moving in a particular direction
meanings.example: the velocity of light
meanings.example_cn: 光速

meanings.meaning_en: a copy of a valuable object, painting etc that is intended to deceive people
meanings.example: The painting was judged a fake.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画被鉴定为赝品。

meanings.meaning_en: to pretend to be ill, interested etc when you are not
meanings.example: Jones can spot a fake from 20 feet away.
meanings.example_cn: 琼斯在20英尺开外就能认出假货。

meanings.meaning_en: made to look like a real material or object in order to deceive people
to make something easier or less complicated
meanings.example: an attempt to simplify the tax system
meanings.example_cn: 简化税制的尝试

meanings.meaning_cn: 复发；重现；采用；再来；循环；递归
meanings.meaning_en: if a number or numbers after a  decimal point  recur, they are repeated for ever in the same order
meanings.example: There is a danger that the disease may recur.
meanings.example_cn: 这种病有复发的危险。

meanings.meaning_en: looking disappointed and upset
meanings.example: He came back looking crestfallen .
meanings.example_cn: 他回来时看上去垂头丧气的。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of mathematics that uses letters and other signs to represent numbers and values
meanings.example: My behavior is on behalf of half zebras," the algebra teacher said.
meanings.example_cn: "我的行为代表了一半斑马的利益,"代数老师说.

meanings.meaning_en: unlimited rule; autocracy
meanings.example: Although the European perspective has been instrumental in guiding young democracies out of the grip of authoritarianism and autarchy, this power to transform the fringe is slipping.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管欧洲一直以来对指引新的民主国家脱离专政与独裁起到了帮助作用，但是，这种能够改变外围的力量正处在不稳定中。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely big
meanings.example: a gigantic skyscraper
meanings.example_cn: 摩天大楼

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone or something and no longer help or support them
meanings.example: Helen was deserted by her husband.
meanings.example_cn: 海伦被丈夫遗弃了。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of land where it is always very dry, and there is a lot of sand
meanings.example: Many of the party’s traditional voters deserted it at the last election.
meanings.example_cn: 许多长期支持该党的选民在上一次选举中抛弃了它。

meanings.example: The price rise caused many readers to desert the magazine.
meanings.example_cn: 价格上涨导致许多读者放弃了这本杂志。

meanings.meaning_en: a camp where soldiers live
meanings.example: Our people's liberation army is now in the cantonment.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的人民解决军现在正在宿营地。

meanings.meaning_cn: [数] 十角形；[数] 十边形
meanings.meaning_en: a polygon having ten sides
meanings.example: Three different planar structural modes of 5 approximants have been put forward by using pentagon, decagon, flat hexagon and boat-shape respectively.
meanings.example_cn: 从高分辨像出发，分别用十边形，五角形以及扁六边形和船形构筑了五种十次准晶近似相的各三种平面结构模型。

meanings.meaning_en: words printed above or below a picture in a book or newspaper or on a television screen to explain what the picture is showing
meanings.example: The local paper featured me standing on a stepladder with a caption, "Wendy climbs the ladder to success."
meanings.example_cn: 当地的报纸刊登了一幅我站在活梯上的特写，下面写着：“温迪登上了成功之梯。”

meanings.meaning_en: unbiased information, opinions, advice etc is fair because the person giving it is not influenced by their own or other people’s opinions
meanings.example: We aim to provide a service that is balanced and unbiased.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的目标是提供一种公平公正的服务。

meanings.meaning_cn: 结晶，晶体；水晶；水晶饰品
meanings.meaning_en: very high quality clear glass
meanings.example: a set of six crystal glasses
meanings.example_cn: 六件套水晶玻璃杯

meanings.meaning_cn: 拆除；破坏；毁坏；推翻；驳倒
meanings.meaning_en: to completely destroy a building
meanings.example: The entire east wing of the building was demolished in the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 大楼的整个东翼都被大火烧毁了。

meanings.meaning_en: rude behaviour that shocks you because it is so confident
meanings.example: The man had the effrontery to be sarcastic.
meanings.example_cn: 那个男人有冷嘲热讽的放肆劲。

meanings.example: cardiac surgery
meanings.example_cn: 心脏手术

meanings.meaning_cn: 心脏的；心脏病的；贲门的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the heart

meanings.meaning_cn: 事后的想法；后来添加的东西
meanings.meaning_en: something that you mention or add later because you did not think of it or plan it before
meanings.example: He added as an afterthought, ‘Bring Melanie too.'
meanings.example_cn: 他想了想又说道: “把梅拉妮也带来。”

meanings.meaning_cn: 虚荣心强的；非常自负的
meanings.meaning_en: too proud of your own abilities, importance etc
small animals, birds, and insects that are harmful because they destroy crops, spoil food, and spread disease
meanings.example: The beds were filthy and full of vermin.
meanings.example_cn: 那些床铺肮脏不堪，而且爬满了虫子。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay out money, especially from a large sum that is available for a special purpose
meanings.example: The aid will not be disbursed until next year.
meanings.example_cn: 援助款项到明年才能拨出。

meanings.meaning_cn: 广告客户；刊登广告的人
meanings.meaning_en: a person or company that advertises something
meanings.example: the Stockport Advertiser
meanings.example_cn: 《斯托克波特广告报》

meanings.meaning_cn: 外交家，外交官；有外交手腕的人；处事圆滑机敏的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who officially represents their government in a foreign country
meanings.example: French diplomats
meanings.example_cn: 法国外交官

meanings.meaning_en: friendly and easy to talk to
meanings.example: an affable guy
meanings.example_cn: 一个平易近人的人

meanings.meaning_cn: 类型；种类；体裁；样式；流派；风俗画
meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of art, writing, music etc, which has certain features that all examples of this type share
meanings.example: a literary genre
meanings.example_cn: 文学体裁

meanings.meaning_cn: 风俗画的；以日常情景为主题的
部门；扇形，扇区；象限仪；函数尺
meanings.meaning_en: a part of an area of activity, especially of business, trade etc
meanings.example: ...the nation's manufacturing sector.
meanings.example_cn: …该国的制造部门。

meanings.meaning_cn: 男性的；有男子气概的；刚健的
meanings.meaning_en: having or showing tradition­ally male qualities such as strength, courage etc – use this to show approval
meanings.example: He wanted his sons to become strong, virile, and athletic like himself.
meanings.example_cn: 他希望他的儿子们变得像他一样身强力壮、充满阳刚之气，并擅长体育运动。

meanings.meaning_en: the outer layer of an organ in your body, especially your brain
meanings.example: ...the cerebral cortex.
meanings.example_cn: ...大脑皮层。

meanings.example: a political party that’s in the ascendant
meanings.example_cn: 一个正在发展壮大的政党

meanings.meaning_en: becoming more powerful or popular

meanings.meaning_cn: 自负；要求；主张；借口；骄傲
meanings.example: the humbleness and lack of pretension of Jordan’s cafe
meanings.example_cn: 乔丹的咖啡馆的朴实和低调

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of people, their societies,  culture s  etc
meanings.example: "In anthropology, you can't equate third gender with homosexuality," he said.
meanings.example_cn: “在人类学中，你不能将同性恋和第三性别混同，”他说。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something or make something impossible
meanings.example: rules that preclude experimentation in teaching methods
meanings.example_cn: 禁止进行教学方法试验的规定

meanings.meaning_cn: 挫败；扰乱，破坏；使…为难；使…破灭
meanings.meaning_en: If you are discomfited by something, it causes you to feel slightly embarrassed or confused
meanings.example: He will be particularly discomfited by the governor's dismissal of his plan.
meanings.example_cn: 州长撤下他计划将让他尤其难堪。

meanings.meaning_en: strong enough, well enough planned etc to continue for a very long time
meanings.example: The reforms will bring lasting benefits.
meanings.example_cn: 改革将带来长久的利益。

meanings.example: Their generosity made a lasting impression on me.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的慷慨给我留下了难忘的印象。

meanings.example: a solution that would bring lasting peace
meanings.example_cn: 将带来持久和平的解决方案

meanings.meaning_cn: 理由；辩护；认为有理，认为正当；释罪
meanings.meaning_en: a good and acceptable reason for doing something
meanings.example: Hoggart felt, with some justification, that his colleagues had let him down.
meanings.example_cn: 霍加特觉得同事令他失望，这是有理由的。

meanings.meaning_en: to belong (to) as a part, function, right, etc; relate (to) or be connected (with)
to prevent someone from doing what they have planned or want to do
meanings.example: Investigators have been stymied by uncooperative witnesses.
meanings.example_cn: 由于目击者不合作，调查人员的工作受阻。

meanings.meaning_en: An audition is a short performance given by an actor, dancer, or musician so that a director or conductor can decide if they are good enough to be in a play, film, or orchestra
meanings.example: ...an audition for a Broadway musical.
meanings.example_cn: …一部百老汇歌舞剧的试演。

meanings.meaning_en: to take part in an audition
very bad luck, or something that happens to you as a result of bad luck
meanings.example: It seems the banks always profit from farmers’ misfortunes.
meanings.example_cn: 银行似乎总是从农民的不幸中获益。

meanings.meaning_cn: 描绘…的特性；具有…的特征
meanings.meaning_en: to describe the qualities of someone or something in a particular way
meanings.example: Bright colours characterize his paintings.
meanings.example_cn: 明亮的色彩是他绘画作品的特点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 积极的；[数] 正的，[医][化学] 阳性的；确定的，肯定的；实际的，真实的；绝对的
meanings.meaning_en: good or useful
meanings.example: At least something positive has come out of the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 至少这个情况也产生了一些积极的东西。

meanings.example: Write down all the positive things about your life.
meanings.example_cn: 记下生活中所有好的事情。

meanings.meaning_cn: 工作；[物] 功；产品；操作；职业；行为；事业；工厂；著作；文学、音乐或艺术作品
meanings.meaning_en: a job or activity that you do regularly, especially in order to earn money
meanings.example: There isn’t a lot of work at this time of the year.
meanings.example_cn: 每年这个时候工作机会都不多。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使工作；操作；经营；使缓慢前进
meanings.meaning_en: to do the activities and duties that are part of your job
meanings.example: He’s been out of work (= without a job ) for two years.
meanings.example_cn: 他失业有两年了。

meanings.meaning_en: famous
meanings.example: a celebrated actress
meanings.example_cn: 著名女演员

meanings.meaning_cn: 庆祝（celebrate的过去式和过去分词）
meanings.example: a celebrated legal case
meanings.example_cn: 一宗备受关注的官司

meanings.meaning_cn: 方言，土话；同源语；行话；个人用语特征
meanings.meaning_en: a form of a language which is spoken only in one area, with words or grammar that are slightly different from other forms of the same language
meanings.example: the local dialect
meanings.example_cn: 当地方言

meanings.meaning_en: affecting or including the whole world
meanings.example: global climate change
meanings.example_cn: 全球气候变化

meanings.meaning_en: a statement that has been made many times before and is not interesting or clever – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: His excuse was the platitude ‘boys will be boys.’
meanings.example_cn: 他还是那一套理由:“男孩总归是男孩。”

meanings.meaning_en: to limit or control the size, amount, or range of something
meanings.example: The new law restricts the sale of hand guns.
meanings.example_cn: 新法规限制手枪的销售。

meanings.meaning_en: To annihilate something means to destroy it completely
meanings.example: There are lots of ways of annihilating the planet.
meanings.example_cn: 有很多毁灭那个星球的方式。

meanings.meaning_cn: [航]陆标；地标；界标；里程碑；纪念碑；地界标；划时代的事
meanings.meaning_en: something that is easy to recognize, such as a tall tree or building, and that helps you know where you are
meanings.example: One of Belfast’s most famous landmarks, the Grosvenor Hall, has been demolished.
meanings.example_cn: 贝尔法斯特最著名的地标之一格罗夫纳大厦已被拆毁了。

meanings.meaning_en: strong feelings of anger when you think a situation is not morally right or fair
meanings.example: He was full of righteous indignation about the attack.
meanings.example_cn: 他对这次袭击事件义愤填膺。

meanings.meaning_cn: 俯卧的；拜倒的；降伏的；沮丧的
meanings.meaning_en: lying on your front with your face towards the ground
meanings.example: They found him lying prostrate on the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 他们发现他趴在地板上。

meanings.meaning_en: If you prostrate yourself, you lie down flat on the ground, on your front, usually to show respect for God or a person in authority
meanings.example: They prostrated themselves before their king.
meanings.example_cn: 他们向他们的国王跪拜行礼。

meanings.meaning_en: If people promote something, they help or encourage it to happen, increase, or spread
meanings.example: You don't have to sacrifice environmental protection to promote economic growth.
meanings.example_cn: 你们没有必要牺牲环保来促进经济增长。

meanings.meaning_en: very painful or unpleasant to experience
meanings.example: a torturous five days of fitness testing
meanings.example_cn: 五天痛苦的体能测试

meanings.meaning_en: if an offer, agreement etc is conditional, it will only be done if something else happens first
meanings.example: a conditional acceptance
meanings.example_cn: 有条件的接受

meanings.meaning_en: a sentence or  clause  that is expressed in a conditional form

meanings.meaning_cn: 神秘的，含义模糊的；[动] 隐藏的
meanings.meaning_en: having a meaning that is mysterious or not easily understood
meanings.example: He has issued a short, cryptic statement denying the spying charges.
meanings.example_cn: 他发表了一个简短、令人捉摸不透的声明，否认对他从事间谍活动的指控。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生动的；保持原味的；适于赛跑的；猥亵的
meanings.example: He listened to David Bright's racy stories about life in the navy.
meanings.example_cn: 他听戴维·布赖特讲有关海军生活的生动有趣的故事。

meanings.meaning_en: to include a wide range of ideas, subjects, etc
meanings.example: The study encompasses the social, political, and economic aspects of the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究涵盖了这一局势的社会、政治和经济三方面。

meanings.meaning_en: to wave something around in a dangerous or threatening way, especially a weapon
meanings.example: A man leapt out, brandishing a kitchen knife.
meanings.example_cn: 一个男人挥着一把菜刀跳了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment consisting of a wheel over which a rope or chain is pulled to lift heavy things
meanings.example: Slowed only slightly, I continued my rapid ascent, not stopping until the fingers of my right hand were two knuckles deep into the pulley.
meanings.example_cn: 只减慢了一点点速度，我还是继续快速上升，直到我的右手手指卷进滑轮两指节深才停下来。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that only eats plants
meanings.example: The meat of the herbivore is, in comparison, far more edible , smellwise.
meanings.example_cn: 相对地，食草动物的肉闻起来要好些，更易食用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 给予选举权；给予自治权；解放，释放
meanings.meaning_en: to give a group of people the right to vote
meanings.example: The company voted to enfranchise its 120 women members.
meanings.example_cn: 公司投票决定给予其120名女员工选举权。

meanings.meaning_cn: 渎职，违法行为；不正当，坏事
meanings.meaning_en: illegal or dishonest activity
the scientific study of plants
when someone or something is considered to be more impor-tant than someone or something else, and therefore comes first or must be dealt with first
meanings.example: Guests were seated in order of precedence .
meanings.example_cn: 宾客们按席次就座。

meanings.meaning_en: to mix one metal with another
meanings.example: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.
meanings.example_cn: 黄铜是铜和锌的合金。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal that consists of two or more metals mixed together
done very quickly without much attention to details
meanings.example: Burke cast a cursory glance at the menu, then flapped it shut.
meanings.example_cn: 伯克粗略瞥了眼菜单，然后啪地合上了。

meanings.meaning_en: to warn of or indicate (an event, result, etc) in advance
meanings.example: can be, if I forebode aright, no power, short of the Divine mercy, to disclose, whether by uttered words, or by type or emblem, the secrets that may be buried with a human heart.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我的预感不错的话，除去上天的仁慈，没有什么力量，无论是通过讲出来的语言或是任何形式的标志，能够揭示可能埋在一个人心里的秘密。

meanings.meaning_en: to use a particular amount of time for something, or give a particular share of money, space etc to someone or something
meanings.example: The seats are allotted to the candidates who have won the most votes.
meanings.example_cn: 这些席位被分配给了赢得了最多选票的候选人。

meanings.meaning_cn: (Allot)人名；(英)阿洛特；(西)阿略特；(法)阿洛
血清；浆液；免疫血清；乳清；树液
meanings.meaning_en: a liquid containing substances that fight infection or poison, that is put into a sick person’s blood
meanings.example: ...painful injections of anti-cancer serum.
meanings.example_cn: …令人痛苦的抗癌血清注射。

meanings.meaning_cn: 意气相投的；性格相似的；适意的；一致的
meanings.meaning_en: suitable for something
meanings.example: Compost provides congenial conditions for roots to develop.
meanings.example_cn: 堆肥为根部的生长提供了适宜的条件。

meanings.meaning_en: hot bright burning gas that you see when something is on fire
meanings.example: Flames poured out of the windows of the building.
meanings.example_cn: 火焰从大楼窗口冒出来。

meanings.meaning_en: to burn brightly
meanings.example: They rushed past us with buckets of water and tried to douse the flames .
meanings.example_cn: 他们提着一桶桶水跑过我们身边去灭火。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分，分钟；片刻，一会儿；备忘录，笔记；会议记录
meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring time. There are 60 minutes in one hour
meanings.example: It takes me ten minutes to walk to work.
meanings.example_cn: 我步行上班要用十分钟。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an official note of something in the record of a meeting
meanings.example: The train arrived at four minutes past eight.
meanings.example_cn: 火车于八点零四分到达。

meanings.meaning_cn: 微小的，详细的 [maɪˈnjuːt; US -ˈnuːt; maɪˋnut]
meanings.meaning_en: extremely small
meanings.example: He returned a few minutes later.
meanings.example_cn: 几分钟后他回来了。

meanings.example: You can bet that would truly paralyze the flow of credit: Does anyone believe Washington can manage banks?
meanings.example_cn: 你可以打赌，这会使流动的信贷真正限于瘫痪：真有人相信华盛顿可以经营银行吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a drawing that uses a line or lines to show how two or more sets of measurements are related to each other
meanings.example: Martin showed me a graph of their recent sales.
meanings.example_cn: 马丁给我看了他们最近销售情况的图表。

meanings.meaning_en: to be better or more successful than someone else at doing something
meanings.example: When it comes to speed of response, a small firm can outdo a big company.
meanings.example_cn: 说到反应速度，小公司会胜过大公司。

meanings.meaning_cn: 长柄勺；浸染工；[鸟] 河鸟
meanings.meaning_en: a small bird that finds its food in streams

meanings.meaning_cn: 追溯的；有追溯效力的；反动的
meanings.meaning_en: a law or decision that is retroactive is effective from a particular date in the past
meanings.example: a retroactive pay increase
meanings.example_cn: 补发的加薪

meanings.meaning_en: to trick a person or organization in order to get money from them
meanings.example: He faces charges of theft and conspiracy to defraud (= a secret plan to cheat someone, made by two or more people ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他面临偷窃和合谋诈骗的指控。

meanings.meaning_en: cold or typical of winter
meanings.example: a wintry day
meanings.example_cn: 一个冬日

meanings.meaning_en: very strong desire for something, especially money or property
meanings.example: the cupidity of some businessmen
meanings.example_cn: 一些商人的贪婪

meanings.meaning_en: if a government or organization retrenches, it spends less money
meanings.example: Shortly afterwards, cuts in defence spending forced the aerospace industry to retrench.
meanings.example_cn: 此后不久，国防开支的削减迫使航空航天业紧缩开支。

meanings.meaning_en: to show or say that something will happen in the future
meanings.example: The revolution foreshadowed an entirely new social order.
meanings.example_cn: 这场革命预示着一种全新的社会秩序将要出现。

meanings.meaning_en: a medicine or substance produced by your body which stops the effects of a poison
meanings.example: In Thailand, delivery of a botulism antitoxin prevented multiple deaths.
meanings.example_cn: 在泰国，肉毒抗毒素避免了多起死亡的发生。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something bad to someone because they have done something bad to you
meanings.example: I was sorely tempted to retaliate.
meanings.example_cn: 我非常想报复。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being happy and satisfied
meanings.example: He gave a sigh of contentment , and fell asleep.
meanings.example_cn: 他满意地舒了口气后就睡着了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 稳健的，温和的；适度的，中等的；有节制的
meanings.meaning_en: not very large or very small, very hot or very cold, very fast or very slow etc
meanings.example: Even moderate amounts of alcohol can be dangerous.
meanings.example_cn: 喝酒即使不多也会有危险。

meanings.meaning_en: If you moderate something or if it moderates, it becomes less extreme or violent and easier to deal with or accept
meanings.example: a moderate degree of success
meanings.example_cn: 一定程度上的成功

meanings.meaning_cn: 内脏的；出于本能的；发自肺腑的；粗俗的
meanings.meaning_en: visceral beliefs and attitudes are the result of strong feelings rather than careful thought
meanings.example: his visceral hatred of the ruling class
meanings.example_cn: 他对统治阶级发自肺腑的仇恨

meanings.meaning_cn: 迟钝的；缺乏热情的；冷漠的
meanings.example: He glanced furtively at the stolid faces of the two detectives.
meanings.example_cn: 他偷偷地瞄了一下两名侦探面无表情的脸。

meanings.meaning_en: an apparatus for detecting an electric charge, typically consisting of a rod holding two gold foils that separate when a charge is applied
meanings.example: It was an electroscope which contained a small amount of radium.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一个验电器，其中载有少量的镭。

meanings.meaning_en: willingness to do what pleases other people
the beginning or origin of something
meanings.example: Could that be the genesis?
meanings.example_cn: 那有可能是起源吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to prove that someone is not guilty of something
a large group of families who often share the same name
meanings.example: the Campbell clan
meanings.example_cn: 坎贝尔家族

meanings.meaning_en: a person who helps someone such as a criminal to do something wrong
meanings.example: Witnesses said the gunman immediately ran to a motorcycle being ridden by an accomplice.
meanings.example_cn: 证人们说该枪手立即向由一名同犯驾驶的摩托车跑去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 野蛮的；残酷的；狂怒的；荒凉的
meanings.meaning_en: very violent or cruel
meanings.example: a savage dog
meanings.example_cn: 一条凶猛的狗

meanings.meaning_cn: 未开化的人；粗鲁的人；残暴成性的人
meanings.meaning_en: a very offensive word for someone who has a simple, traditional way of life
meanings.example: a savage murder
meanings.example_cn: 凶残的谋杀

meanings.meaning_en: if an animal such as a dog savages someone, it attacks them and injures them badly
happening by chance, especially in a way that has a good result
meanings.example: The meeting with Jack was fortuitous.
meanings.example_cn: 遇到杰克是机缘巧合。

meanings.meaning_en: to form (the hair) into tight crisp curls; frizz
a tight crisp curl
when something is kept in its original state or in good condition
meanings.example: methods of food preservation
meanings.example_cn: 保存食物的各种方法

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that one thing is tantamount to another, more serious thing, you are emphasizing how bad, unacceptable, or unfortunate the first thing is by comparing it to the second thing
meanings.example: What Bracey is saying is tantamount to heresy.
meanings.example_cn: 布里斯正在说的无异于异端邪说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不知不觉地；出其不意地；不料
meanings.meaning_en: without noticing
meanings.example: We had walked unawares over the border.
meanings.example_cn: 我们无意中越过了边界。

meanings.meaning_cn: [物] 光子；辐射量子；见光度（等于light quantum）
meanings.meaning_en: a unit of  energy  that carries light and has  zero mass

meanings.meaning_cn: 好色的；淫荡的；挑动情欲的
meanings.meaning_en: showing strong sexual desire, or making someone feel this way
meanings.example: a lascivious wink
meanings.example_cn: 色迷迷的眨眼

meanings.meaning_cn: 外部的；表面的；[药] 外用的；外国的；外面的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the outside of something or of a person’s body
meanings.example: the external appearance of the building
meanings.example_cn: 大楼的外观

meanings.meaning_en: to describe or represent something or someone
meanings.example: His most famous painting portrayed the death of Nelson.
meanings.example_cn: 他最著名的画作描绘的是纳尔逊之死。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神学院；学校；发源地；高级中学
meanings.meaning_en: a college for training priests or ministers
a very small fish that lives in rivers and lakes
meanings.example: one of the minnows of the computer industry
meanings.example_cn: 计算机行业中一家微不足道的小公司

meanings.meaning_cn: 荒废的；即将过时的；逐渐被废弃的
meanings.meaning_en: becoming obsolete
meanings.example: ...outmoded, obsolescent equipment.
meanings.example_cn: ...陈旧过时的设备。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to education, especially at college or university level
meanings.example: He possessed no academic qualifications.
meanings.example_cn: 他没有学历。

meanings.meaning_en: a teacher in a college or university
meanings.example: a program to raise academic standards
meanings.example_cn: 旨在提高学术水平的计划

meanings.meaning_en: to include something as part of a group, system, plan etc
meanings.example: The new cars will incorporate a number of major improvements.
meanings.example_cn: 这种新型汽车将包含许多重大的改进。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合并的；一体化的；组成公司的

meanings.meaning_en: If you refer to a particular subject or person, you talk about them or mention them
meanings.example: In his speech, he referred to a recent trip to Canada.
meanings.example_cn: 在他的讲话中，他提到了最近的加拿大之行。

meanings.meaning_cn: 助动词；辅助者，辅助物；附属机构
meanings.meaning_en: a worker who provides additional help for another group of workers
meanings.example: a nursing auxiliary
meanings.example_cn: 护理辅助人员

meanings.meaning_en: auxiliary workers provide additional help for another group of workers

meanings.meaning_cn: 指责，非难；制止；使相形见绌
meanings.meaning_en: to speak to someone severely about something they have done wrong
meanings.example: The president rebuked the House and Senate for not passing those bills within 100 days.
meanings.example_cn: 总统谴责参众两院未在100天内通过那些法案。

meanings.meaning_en: Rebuke is also a noun
meanings.example: His statements drew a stinging rebuke from the chairman.
meanings.example_cn: 他的申明受到了主席严厉的谴责。

meanings.meaning_en: if a gas condenses, or is condensed, it becomes a liquid
meanings.example: the mist which condensed on every cold surface
meanings.example_cn: 每个冰冷的表面上凝结的水汽

meanings.meaning_en: a brick or stone structure built to support a wall
meanings.example: ...the neo-Gothic buttresses of Riverside Church in Manhattan.
meanings.example_cn: …曼哈顿的里弗赛德教堂中的新哥特式扶璧。

meanings.meaning_en: to support a system, idea, argument etc, especially by providing money
a piece of equipment that you speak into to record your voice or make it louder when you are speaking or performing in public
meanings.example: She spoke confidently into the microphone.
meanings.example_cn: 她自信地对着麦克风说话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 诉讼的；有异议的，引起争论的；爱争论的
meanings.meaning_en: causing a lot of argument and disagreement between people
meanings.example: Sanctions are expected to be among the most contentious issues.
meanings.example_cn: 制裁预计位居最具有争议的问题之列。

meanings.meaning_en: to copy something exactly
meanings.example: New copies of the form can be duplicated from a master copy.
meanings.example_cn: 可以用原件来复制新的表格。

meanings.meaning_en: an exact copy of something that you can use in the same way
meanings.example: The video was duplicated illegally.
meanings.example_cn: 这盘录像带是非法拷贝的。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly the same as something, or made as an exact copy of something
a very large house
meanings.example: a beautiful country mansion
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的乡村宅第

meanings.meaning_en: (of an alcoholic drink) to produce in (a person) a state ranging from euphoria to stupor, usually accompanied by loss of inhibitions and control; make drunk; inebriate

meanings.meaning_cn: 有深刻见解的，富有洞察力的
meanings.meaning_en: able to understand, or showing that you understand, what a situation or person is really like
meanings.example: an insightful analysis
meanings.example_cn: 有见地的分析

meanings.meaning_en: the number above the line in a fraction, for example 5 is the numerator in 5/6

meanings.meaning_cn: 中立的，中性的；中立国的；非彩色的
meanings.meaning_en: not supporting any of the people or groups involved in an argument or disagreement
meanings.example: I always tried to remain neutral when they started arguing.
meanings.example_cn: 他们争论起来的时候我总是努力保持中立。

meanings.meaning_cn: 中立国；中立者；非彩色；齿轮的空档
meanings.meaning_en: a country, person, or group that is not involved in an argument or disagreement
meanings.example: Clive decided to adopt a neutral position.
meanings.example_cn: 克莱夫决定采取中立立场。

meanings.meaning_en: very unpleasant or shocking, and involving someone being killed or badly injured
meanings.example: Police described it as a particularly gruesome attack.
meanings.example_cn: 警方称这是一起极其恐怖的袭击事件。

meanings.meaning_en: The ratification of a treaty or written agreement is the process of ratifying it
meanings.example: We welcome this development and we look forward to early ratification of the treaty by China.
meanings.example_cn: 我们欢迎这一进展并期望中国早日批准本条约。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不同种类的，各式各样的

meanings.meaning_en: if you divert your telephone calls, you arrange for them to go directly to another number, for example because you are not able to answer them yourself for some time
meanings.example: Remember to divert your phone when you are out of the office.
meanings.example_cn: 你不在办公室的时候要记得设定电话转移。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time in the past
meanings.example: The buildings reflect the elegance of a bygone era.
meanings.example_cn: 这些建筑物反映了过去年代的典雅。

meanings.meaning_en: to seek attention and admiration (from) by cringing and flattering
meanings.example: The fawn ran to the top of the ridge.
meanings.example_cn: 那只小鹿跑上山脊。

meanings.meaning_en: a young  deer
having a pale yellow-brown colour

meanings.meaning_cn: 恢复；重新开始；取回；重获；恢复硬币支付
meanings.meaning_en: the act of starting an activity again after stopping or being interrupted
If you besmirch someone or their reputation, you say that they are a bad person or that they have done something wrong, usually when this is not true
meanings.example: He has accused local people of trying to besmirch his reputation.
meanings.example_cn: 他指责当地人企图败坏他的名誉。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel annoyed or worried
meanings.example: It vexed me to think of others gossiping behind my back.
meanings.example_cn: 想到别人在我背后说闲话让我很恼火。

meanings.meaning_en: to suspend (activity) or (of activity) to be suspended temporarily or at intervals
meanings.example: The software control classify main program , intermit subprogram and time-lapse subprogram.
meanings.example_cn: 软件控制程序包括主程序，以及中断子程序和延时子程序。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of tricks to deceive or cheat people

meanings.meaning_cn: 放逐；排斥；按贝壳流放法放逐
meanings.meaning_en: if a group of people ostracize someone, they refuse to accept them as a member of the group
meanings.example: She was afraid that if she spoke up her colleagues would ostracize her.
meanings.example_cn: 她担心，如果她说出来，同事们就会孤立她。

meanings.meaning_en: to understand or think of something or someone in a particular way
meanings.example: That morning, he perceived a change in Franca’s mood.
meanings.example_cn: 那天早上，他注意到弗兰卡情绪的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: words and expressions used in a particular profession or by a particular group of people, which are difficult for other people to understand – often used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Keep it simple and avoid the use of jargon.
meanings.example_cn: 简单点，避免使用术语。

meanings.meaning_en: to become liquid, or make something become liquid
meanings.example: And it's not as if the U.S. would export the excess supply, since the country lacks the infrastructure to easily liquefy large amounts of the gas to sell abroad.
meanings.example_cn: 而且，美国看来不会出口这些过剩的天然气供应，因为当地缺乏能将大量天然气液化并输送出口的基础设施。

meanings.meaning_en: If you divest yourself of something that you own or are responsible for, you get rid of it or stop being responsible for it
meanings.example: The company divested itself of its oil interests.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司从石油生意中抽身。

meanings.meaning_en: special attention or importance
meanings.example: a change of emphasis in government policy
meanings.example_cn: 政府政策重心的变化

meanings.meaning_en: to free prisoners, a city, a country etc from someone’s control
meanings.example: A few days later, our armies liberated the city.
meanings.example_cn: 几天以后，我军解放了这座城市。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality that something has when it has been done in a clever or skilful way, with careful attention to small details
meanings.example: The play lacks subtlety.
meanings.example_cn: 这部戏不够精细。

meanings.meaning_cn: 连贯的，一致的；明了的；清晰的；凝聚性的；互相耦合的；粘在一起的
meanings.meaning_en: if a piece of writing, set of ideas etc is coherent, it is easy to understand because it is clear and reasonable
meanings.example: The three years of the course are planned as a coherent whole.
meanings.example_cn: 这三年的课程是作为连贯的整体来安排的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 唯物主义者；实利主义者
meanings.example: This is a heated debate which involves materialist as opposed to idealist views.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一场唯物主义与唯心主义的大论战。

meanings.meaning_en: law relating to young people who are not yet adults
meanings.example: juvenile crime
meanings.example_cn: 少年犯罪

meanings.meaning_en: A juvenile is a child or young person who is not yet old enough to be regarded as an adult
meanings.example: a juvenile court
meanings.example_cn: 少年法院[法庭]

meanings.meaning_en: to move back suddenly and quickly from something you do not like or are afraid of
meanings.example: We recoil in horror from the thought of subjecting someone to extreme pain.
meanings.example_cn: 想到要让一个人经受极度的痛苦，我们就会恐惧地退缩。

meanings.meaning_en: Recoil is also a noun
meanings.example: ...his small body jerking in recoil from the volume of his shouting.
meanings.example_cn: …他小小身体在他大声的叫喊中畏缩地抽搐着。

meanings.meaning_en: to make certain that something will happen properly
meanings.example: facilities to ensure the safety of cyclists
meanings.example_cn: 确保骑车人安全的设施

meanings.meaning_en: to become weaker or less certain
meanings.example: Her voice wavered uncertainly.
meanings.example_cn: 她吞吞吐吐的。

meanings.example: The students’ attention did not waver.
meanings.example_cn: 学生的兴趣没有减弱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 弹药筒，打印机的（墨盒）；[摄] 暗盒；笔芯；一卷软片
meanings.meaning_en: a small container or piece of equipment that you put inside something to make it work
meanings.example: computer game cartridges
meanings.example_cn: 电脑游戏卡

meanings.meaning_en: If you censure someone for something that they have done, you tell them that you strongly disapprove of it
meanings.example: The ethics committee may take a decision to admonish him or to censure him.
meanings.example_cn: 道德规范委员会可能决定对他进行警告或批评。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of expressing strong disapproval and criticism

meanings.meaning_cn: 使…复活；使…复兴；使…恢复生气
meanings.meaning_en: To revitalize something that has lost its activity or its health means to make it active or healthy again
meanings.example: This hair conditioner is excellent for revitalizing dry, lifeless hair.
meanings.example_cn: 这种护发素对使干枯、无生气的头发重新焕发光彩非常有效。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is stupid and has no imagination
meanings.example: In this well-educated family, Darwin was considered to be rather dull. At one time his school headmaster called him a dullard.
meanings.example_cn: 在这个很有文化涵养的家庭里，达尔文被看成是相当地迟钝。有一次，他的校长称他是笨蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is edible can be eaten
meanings.example: These berries are edible, but those are poisonous.
meanings.example_cn: 这些浆果可以吃，但那些有毒。

meanings.meaning_en: equipment on a ship or  submarine  that uses  sound waves  to find out the position of objects under the water

meanings.meaning_cn: 清爽的；气候有益健康的
meanings.example: the less salubrious area near the docks
meanings.example_cn: 码头附近环境较差的地区

meanings.meaning_cn: 实用；效用；公共设施；功用
meanings.meaning_en: a service such as gas or electricity provided for people to use
meanings.example: Does your rent include utilities?
meanings.example_cn: 你的房租包括公用事业费吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 实用的；通用的；有多种用途的
鲈鱼；男低音；低音部；椴树
meanings.meaning_en: a very low male singing voice, or a man with a voice like this
meanings.example: The band features Johnson on bass (=  playing the bass guitar  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这支乐队由约翰逊弹奏低音吉他。

meanings.meaning_en: a bass instrument or voice produces low notes

meanings.meaning_cn: 过度地；不适当地；不正当地
meanings.meaning_en: more than is normal or reasonable
meanings.example: It didn’t trouble me unduly.
meanings.example_cn: 这事并没有让我太烦恼。

meanings.meaning_en: the most important part of something, from which new ideas develop
meanings.example: India has a good scientific research base.
meanings.example_cn: 印度有良好的科研基础。

meanings.meaning_en: not having good moral principles
to have your main place of work, business etc in a particular place

meanings.example: a series of grisly murders
meanings.example_cn: 一连串恐怖的凶杀案

meanings.meaning_cn: 使康复；使恢复名誉；使恢复原状
meanings.meaning_en: to make people think that someone or something is good again after a period when people had a bad opinion of them
meanings.example: The Prime Minister seems to be trying to rehabilitate the former defence secretary.
meanings.example_cn: 首相似乎在努力为前国防大臣恢复名誉。

meanings.meaning_en: to happen at the same time as something else, especially by chance
meanings.example: When our vacations coincided, we often holidayed together.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的假期要是凑巧赶在一起，我们常常会一同去度假。

meanings.meaning_en: sounding unpleasantly loud
meanings.example: He burst into raucous laughter .
meanings.example_cn: 他突然发出沙哑的笑声。

meanings.meaning_en: to have the most importance or influence, or to be most easily noticed
meanings.example: In this type of case, the rights of the parent predominate.
meanings.example_cn: 像这样的案例，要首先考虑父母的权利。

meanings.meaning_cn: 晒太阳；取暖；愉快或舒适
meanings.meaning_en: to enjoy sitting or lying in the heat of the sun or a fire
meanings.example: All through the hot, still days of their holiday Amy basked in the sun.
meanings.example_cn: 在整个炎热、寂静的假期里埃米都在晒太阳。

meanings.meaning_en: the number by which an unknown quantity is multiplied
meanings.example: In 8pq, the coefficient of pq is 8.
meanings.example_cn: 在8pq中pq的系数为8。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迟疑的；踌躇的；犹豫不定的
meanings.meaning_en: uncertain about what to do or say because you are nervous or unwilling
meanings.example: Gail gave me a hesitant little smile.
meanings.example_cn: 盖尔迟疑地对我微微一笑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 定罪；确信；证明有罪；确信，坚定的信仰
meanings.meaning_en: a very strong belief or opinion
meanings.example: It was a reasonable explanation, but his voice lacked conviction .
meanings.example_cn: 这解释合情合理，只是他的语气不坚定。

meanings.meaning_en: something that happened or existed before something else and influenced its development
meanings.example: He said that the deal should not be seen as a precursor to a merger.
meanings.example_cn: 他说这次交易不应该被看作是合并的前兆。

meanings.meaning_cn: 限制；使具有资格；证明…合格
meanings.meaning_en: to have the right to have or do something, or to give someone this right
meanings.example: Free school lunches are given to children who qualify.
meanings.example_cn: 符合条件的儿童可获得免费的学生午餐。

meanings.meaning_cn: 减轻；低估；为…找借口；使人原谅
meanings.meaning_en: to represent (an offence, a fault, etc) as being less serious than it appears, as by showing mitigating circumstances

meanings.meaning_cn: 乡村的；纯朴的；粗野的；手工粗糙的
meanings.meaning_en: simple, old-fashioned, and not spoiled by modern developments, in a way that is typical of the countryside
meanings.example: The village had a certain rustic charm .
meanings.example_cn: 这个村庄有一种迷人的田园风情。

meanings.meaning_en: someone from the country, especially a farm worker
the action of moving up and down on a surface
meanings.example: Try to catch the ball on the second bounce.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量在球第二次弹起时接住。

meanings.meaning_en: if a ball or other object bounces, or you bounce it, it immediately moves up or away from a surface after hitting it

meanings.example: Her brother is the bane of her life .
meanings.example_cn: 她弟弟是她生活中的灾星。

meanings.meaning_en: to work too much or to make someone work too much
meanings.example: You’ve been overworking – why don’t you take a week off?
meanings.example_cn: 你最近在超强度工作——为什么不休息一周呢？

meanings.meaning_en: too much hard work
meanings.example: Have they been overworking you again?
meanings.example_cn: 他们又让你超负荷工作了？

meanings.meaning_cn: 回顾的；怀旧的；可追溯的
meanings.meaning_en: related to or thinking about the past
meanings.example: a retrospective study of 110 patients
meanings.example_cn: 对110名病人进行的回溯研究

meanings.meaning_en: a show of the work of an  artist  , actor,  film-maker  etc that includes examples of all the kinds of work they have done
a petty officer on a merchant ship or a warrant officer on a warship who is responsible for the maintenance of the ship and its equipment
the belief in basing your ideas on practical experience
meanings.example: Action and experimentation are the cornerstones of empiricism.
meanings.example_cn: 行动和尝试是经验主义的基石。

meanings.meaning_en: a big building where people wait to get onto planes, buses, or ships, or where goods are loaded
meanings.example: the airport’s passenger terminal
meanings.example_cn: 机场航站楼

meanings.meaning_en: a terminal illness cannot be cured, and causes death
a change in the direction or use of something, or the act of changing it
meanings.example: Two prisoners created a diversion to give the men time to escape.
meanings.example_cn: 两名囚犯想办法分散了大家的注意力，使那些人有时间逃跑。

meanings.meaning_en: your interlocutor is the person you are speaking to
meanings.example: Orion had the habit of staring motionlessly at his interlocutor.
meanings.example_cn: 奥利恩有个一动不动地盯着谈话对象的习惯。

meanings.meaning_en: a small amount or piece that is taken from something, so that it can be tested or examined
meanings.example: a blood specimen
meanings.example_cn: 血样

meanings.meaning_en: set of ancient myths
meanings.example: characters from classical mythology
meanings.example_cn: 古典神话中的人物

meanings.meaning_en: when the army of one country enters another country by force, in order to take control of it
meanings.example: the annual invasion of teenagers for the Glastonbury Festival
meanings.example_cn: 每年前来参加格拉斯顿伯里音乐节的青少年的涌入

meanings.meaning_en: to argue about something unimportant
meanings.example: Mother is devoted to Dad although they squabble all the time.
meanings.example_cn: 妈妈深爱着爸爸，虽然他们总是为琐事争吵。

meanings.meaning_en: Squabble is also a noun
meanings.example: There have been minor squabbles about phone bills.
meanings.example_cn: 为电话账单已闹过口角。

meanings.meaning_en: to break off or become broken off
guilty of an offence; corrupt

meanings.meaning_cn: 普遍的，广泛的；分布广的
meanings.meaning_en: existing or happening in many places or situations, or among many people
meanings.example: the widespread use of chemicals in agriculture
meanings.example_cn: 化学品在农业中的广泛使用

meanings.meaning_en: to pour or flow out

meanings.meaning_cn: 腐蚀；腐蚀产生的物质；衰败
meanings.meaning_en: the gradual destruction of metal by the effect of water, chemicals etc or a substance such as  rust  produced by this process
meanings.example: They are sprayed with oil to prevent corrosion.
meanings.example_cn: 它们被喷了油以防腐蚀。

meanings.meaning_cn: 至关重要的；生死攸关的；有活力的
meanings.meaning_en: full of energy in a way that is exciting and attractive
meanings.example: Rodgers and Hart’s music sounds as fresh and vital as the day it was written.
meanings.example_cn: 罗杰斯与哈特的音乐现在听来还有刚写成时的那份清新和活力。

meanings.meaning_cn: (Vital)人名；(法、德、意、俄、葡)维塔尔；(西)比塔尔

meanings.meaning_en: if something is mandatory, the law says it must be done
meanings.example: Murder carries a mandatory life sentence .
meanings.example_cn: 谋杀罪依照法律要判无期徒刑。

meanings.example: The Council has made it mandatory for all nurses to attend a refresher course every three years.
meanings.example_cn: 理事会规定所有护士必须每三年参加一次进修课程。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone is cognizant of something, they know about it and understand it
meanings.example: We are cognizant of the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 我们认识到这个问题的存在。

meanings.meaning_en: something said or written that mentions a subject, person etc indirectly
meanings.example: This last point was understood to be an allusion to the long-standing hostility between the two leaders.
meanings.example_cn: 这最后一点曾被理解为对这两位领导人之间长久敌意的一种影射。

meanings.meaning_cn: 轨道；眼眶；势力范围；生活常规
meanings.meaning_en: the curved path travelled by an object which is moving around another much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc
meanings.example: Mars and Earth have orbits which change with time.
meanings.example_cn: 火星和地球的轨道随着时间而发生改变。

meanings.meaning_en: to travel in a curved path around a much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc
a period of time when a soldier or someone working in another country can return to their own country
meanings.example: a young soldier home on furlough
meanings.example_cn: 回国休假的年轻士兵

meanings.meaning_cn: 喧嚣的；公然的；炫耀的；俗丽的
meanings.meaning_en: something bad that is blatant is very clear and easy to see, but the person responsible for it does not seem embarrassed or ashamed
meanings.example: blatant discrimination
meanings.example_cn: 公然的歧视

meanings.meaning_en: when a person or a group of people are controlled by a government or by another person
meanings.example: the subjection of women
meanings.example_cn: 妇女的从属地位

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which a lot of people behave in an uncontrolled, noisy, or violent way in public
meanings.example: His whole system was thrown into disorder .
meanings.example_cn: 他的全套系统被搞得乱七八糟。

meanings.meaning_en: usual
meanings.example: The pans were in their accustomed places.
meanings.example_cn: 那些锅在老地方。

meanings.meaning_cn: 断然拒绝；回绝；漠不关心
meanings.meaning_en: an unkind or unfriendly answer to a friendly suggestion or offer of help
meanings.example: He received a humiliating rebuff from his manager.
meanings.example_cn: 他遭到经理的断然拒绝，十分丢脸。

meanings.meaning_en: If you rebuff someone or rebuff a suggestion that they make, you refuse to do what they suggest
meanings.example: His proposals have already been rebuffed by the governor.
meanings.example_cn: 他的建议已被州长拒绝了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 充气；让空气进入；使暴露于空气中
meanings.meaning_en: to put a gas or air into a liquid or into soil
meanings.example: Aerate your lawn to allow it to breathe and absorb water better.
meanings.example_cn: 给草坪通气，使它能够多吸收空气和水分。

meanings.meaning_en: to become worse
meanings.example: Ethel’s health has deteriorated.
meanings.example_cn: 埃塞尔的健康状况恶化了。

meanings.meaning_en: dirty air or a thick unpleasant mist that smells bad
meanings.example: He looked up at me through a miasma of cigarette smoke.
meanings.example_cn: 他在香烟烟雾中抬头看着我。

meanings.meaning_en: a bitter green-brown liquid formed in the  liver  , which helps you to  digest  fats
meanings.example: He aims his bile at religion, drugs, and politics.
meanings.example_cn: 他把怒气指向宗教、毒品和政治。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欺骗，诈骗；使受挫折；赖帐
meanings.meaning_en: to cheat someone, especially by taking their money
meanings.example: They are charged with bilking investors out of millions of dollars.
meanings.example_cn: 他们被控骗取投资者数百万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: facts or signs that show clearly that something exists or is true
meanings.example: Murrow’s evidence was enough to convict Hayes of murder.
meanings.example_cn: 默罗的证词足以证明海斯犯了谋杀罪。

meanings.meaning_en: to show that something exists or is true
something that helps a process to develop more quickly or more strongly
meanings.example: Tax cuts provided the stimulus which the slow economy needed.
meanings.example_cn: 减税为不景气的经济带来了其所需的刺激。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal statement of the beliefs of a particular person, group, religion etc
meanings.example: American Express is emphasizing its ‘the customer is first’ credo.
meanings.example_cn: 美国运通公司强调其“客户至上”的信条。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在树皮上刻路标；公开宣布
meanings.example: an innovative young company that has blazed a trail for others to follow
meanings.example_cn: 一家勇于创新的年轻公司，开辟了一条可供效法的新路径

meanings.meaning_cn: 火焰，烈火；光辉；情感爆发
meanings.meaning_en: very bright light or colour

meanings.meaning_cn: 禁止出入港口；禁止或限制贸易；征用或扣押
meanings.meaning_en: to officially stop particular goods being traded with another country
meanings.example: Several countries embargoed arms shipments to Yugoslavia.
meanings.example_cn: 好几个国家对南斯拉夫实行武器禁运。

meanings.meaning_en: an official order to stop trade with another country
a very simple plant without stems or leaves that grows in or near water
meanings.example: ...an effort to control toxic algae in Green Lake.
meanings.example_cn: …控制绿湖里有毒水藻的努力。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a job or position so that it is available for someone else to do
meanings.example: Clay will vacate the position on June 19.
meanings.example_cn: 克莱将于6月19日离职。

meanings.meaning_en: an unhealthy condition of plants in which parts of them dry up and die
meanings.example: All you can do to prevent potato blight is keep an eye on your crops.
meanings.example_cn: 为预防马铃薯枯萎病你惟一能做的就是留意你的庄稼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 英勇的，勇敢的；华丽的；雄伟的
meanings.meaning_en: brave
meanings.example: a gallant attempt to save lives
meanings.example_cn: 救人的勇敢之举

meanings.example: Case: The category of case is prominent in the grammar of Latin, with six distinctions of nominative, vocative, accusative, genitive, dative and ablative.
meanings.example_cn: 格范畴在拉丁语语法里是很显著的。它有六种格：主格，呼格，宾格，属格，与格，离格。

meanings.meaning_en: a word or particular form of a word used to show that you are speaking or writing directly to someone
meanings.example: The value of Ads lies in the fulfillment of their vocative function, which is closely related to the cultural background and national feelings of target people.
meanings.example_cn: 广告的价值在于实现其呼唤功能，这一实现过程与目标人群的文化背景，民族情感密切相关。

meanings.meaning_en: advice about how to behave that is often unwanted
meanings.example: ...a receptive audience for his homily on moral values.
meanings.example_cn: ...乐于倾听他关于道德价值观说教的观众。

meanings.meaning_en: complementary things go well together, although they are usually different
meanings.example: The computer and the human mind have different but complementary abilities.
meanings.example_cn: 电脑与人脑各不相同，却又互为补充。

meanings.meaning_cn: 主要的；卓越的；支配的；有力的；有影响的
meanings.meaning_en: If something is predominant, it is more important or noticeable than anything else in a set of people or things
meanings.example: Mandy's predominant emotion was confusion.
meanings.example_cn: 曼迪的主导情绪是困惑。

meanings.meaning_en: to disturb the order or arrangement of; throw into disorder; disarrange
meanings.example: Whatever you do, don't let the stress derange owe head.
meanings.example_cn: 但无乱咋样，无所不能让压力使得你精神错乱。

meanings.meaning_en: to say something in a strong way
meanings.example: The report emphasizes the importance of improving safety standards.
meanings.example_cn: 报告强调了改进安全标准的重要性。

meanings.meaning_en: lacking confidence and easily frightened
meanings.example: She was no helpless, timorous female.
meanings.example_cn: 她决不是柔弱胆怯的女性。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement in which someone complains about something
meanings.example: If you wish to make a complaint, you should see the manager.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你要投诉，应该去找经理。

meanings.meaning_cn: 模糊的，不清楚的；朦胧的；难以清楚辨认的
meanings.meaning_en: an indistinct sound, image, or memory cannot be seen, heard, or remembered clearly
meanings.example: She muttered something indistinct.
meanings.example_cn: 她含含糊糊地嘟哝了句什么。

meanings.meaning_cn: 顽固的人；不知悔改的人
meanings.example: Endless, of the impenitent and unbelieving.
meanings.example_cn: 无止境的，对不知悔改的和不信。

meanings.meaning_en: not sorry or penitent; unrepentant
meanings.example: We need to remember that God's wrath does burn against impenitent sinners (Psalm 38:1-3).
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须铭记上帝的愤怒曾烧死了不知悔改的恶人（圣歌38：1-3）。

meanings.meaning_cn: 法律；规律；法治；法学；诉讼；司法界
meanings.meaning_en: the whole system of rules that people in a particular country or area must obey
meanings.example: Elected officials ought to obey the law.
meanings.example_cn: 民选官员理应遵守法律。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do something that they do not want to do by talking to them in a kind, gentle, and patient way
meanings.example: ‘Please, Vic, come with us,’ Nancy coaxed.
meanings.example_cn: “求你了，维克，跟我们一起去吧。”南希哄劝道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 精度，[数] 精密度；精确
meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being very exact or correct
meanings.example: precision engineering
meanings.example_cn: 精密工程

meanings.meaning_en: made or done in a very exact way
meanings.example: precision bombing
meanings.example_cn: 精确轰炸

meanings.meaning_en: happening regularly or all the time
meanings.example: There was a constant stream of visitors to the house.
meanings.example_cn: 参观这幢房子的游客川流不息。

meanings.meaning_en: a number or quantity that never changes
meanings.example: Amy lived in constant fear of being attacked.
meanings.example_cn: 埃米一直生活在害怕遭到袭击的恐惧之中。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of magic powers, especially evil ones, to make things happen
meanings.example: This week Sabrina uses witchcraft to overcome her fear of giving a speech.
meanings.example_cn: 这一周萨布丽娜用巫术来克服对发表演说的恐惧。

meanings.meaning_en: friendly and easy to like
meanings.example: The driver was an amiable young man.
meanings.example_cn: 司机是位友善的年轻人。

meanings.meaning_cn: (Amiable)人名；(法)阿米亚布勒；(英)阿米娅布尔
meanings.example: She was in an amiable mood.
meanings.example_cn: 她心情很好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没打烙印的动物；持不同意见的人
meanings.example: He’s always been a bit of a maverick.
meanings.example_cn: 他总是有点特立独行。

meanings.example: ...a maverick group of scientists, who oppose the prevailing medical opinion on the disease.
meanings.example_cn: …一群特立独行的科学家，他们反对关于这种疾病的医学界的盛行观点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 未打烙印的；行为不合常规的；特立独行的
meanings.meaning_en: Maverick is also an adjective

meanings.meaning_cn: 破坏；使瓦解；使分裂；使中断；使陷于混乱
meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something from continuing in its usual way by causing problems
meanings.example: Traffic was disrupted by a hoax bomb.
meanings.example_cn: 有人虚报有炸弹，造成了交通混乱。

meanings.example: Climate change could disrupt the agricultural economy.
meanings.example_cn: 气候变化可能给农业经济带来不良影响。

meanings.meaning_en: a small weakness or strange habit that someone has, which does not harm anyone else
meanings.example: We all have our little foibles .
meanings.example_cn: 我们大家都有各自的小毛病。

meanings.meaning_en: an invented name that a writer, artist etc uses instead of their real name
meanings.example: Both plays were published under the pseudonym of Philip Dayre.
meanings.example_cn: 两个剧本都是以菲利普·戴尔的笔名发表的。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance that has a  pH  of less than 7. Strong acids can burn holes in material or damage your skin
meanings.example: sulphuric acid
meanings.example_cn: 硫酸

meanings.meaning_en: having a sharp sour taste
a thing, place, activity etc that you get something from
meanings.example: They get their money from various sources.
meanings.example_cn: 他们从各种途径弄到钱。

meanings.meaning_en: to get back information that has been stored in the memory of a computer
meanings.example: The new version of the software automatically retrieves digital information.
meanings.example_cn: 新版软件会自动检索数字信息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使负义务；强使，强迫；对…施以恩惠
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone have to do something, because it is the law, their duty, or the right thing to do
meanings.example: The ruling obligates airlines to release information about their flight delays.
meanings.example_cn: 这一裁决迫使航空公司公布航班晚点信息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有责任的，有义务的；必需的

meanings.meaning_en: to collect or study plants
A knighthood is a title that is given to a man by a British king or queen for his achievements or his service to his country
meanings.example: When he finally received his knighthood in 1975 Chaplin was 85.
meanings.example_cn: 当他最终在1975年得到爵士封号时，卓别林已经85岁了。

meanings.meaning_cn: [生化] 维生素；[生化] 维他命
meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance in food that is necessary for good health
meanings.example: Try to eat foods that are rich in vitamins and minerals.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量吃富含维生素和矿物质的食物。

meanings.example: It was medieval European monks who introduced scientific brewing techniques in an effort to produce a nutritious beverage to supplement their meager diets.
meanings.example_cn: 正是中世纪欧洲的僧侣们引进科学的啤酒酿造技术，制造有营养的饮料， 从而补充了他们贫乏的饮食。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or caused by heat
meanings.example: thermal energy
meanings.example_cn: 热能

meanings.meaning_en: a rising current of warm air used by birds
shrubs planted close together
meanings.example: a tangled mass of overgrown shrubbery
meanings.example_cn: 枝蔓交错、疯狂生长的灌木丛

meanings.meaning_cn: 故意的；深思熟虑的；从容的

meanings.example_cn: 对她的故意羞辱

meanings.meaning_en: to think about something very carefully

meanings.example_cn: 对他的袭击完全是有预谋的。

meanings.meaning_en: good enough for people to live in

meanings.meaning_cn: 兄弟关系；手足情谊；四海之内皆兄弟的信念

meanings.example: the spirit of brotherhood

meanings.example_cn: 她没有化妆，脸上长满了粉刺。

meanings.meaning_en: an action or event that is a signal for something else to happen

meanings.example_cn: 她紧张地站在台侧等待出场的提示。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a sign that it is the right moment for them to speak or do something, especially during a performance
to communicate or express something, with or without using words
meanings.example: All this information can be conveyed in a simple diagram.
meanings.example_cn: 所有这些信息可以通过一张简单的图表来表示。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of singer and poet who travelled around the  palaces  and castles of Southern Europe in the 12th and 13th cen-turies
meanings.example: I needed to be with people who admired my long hair and troubadour credentials, you see.
meanings.example_cn: 因为我想要与赞赏我的长头发的人在一起，然后让他们看到我真的是一位有实力的行呤歌手。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不够大的；小于一般尺寸的

meanings.example_cn: 康拉德•安科尔，布雷迪•罗宾逊和麦展只限于他们的尺寸不足二人入口边缘的数千英尺起来就面对。

meanings.meaning_en: when something turns with a circular movement around a central point

meanings.example_cn: 叶片每分钟转100圈。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有助于；报偿，报应；被转移

meanings.example: The success in the Middle East redounds to his benefit.
meanings.example_cn: 中东地区的该项成就对他有益。

meanings.meaning_en: too difficult, bad, annoying etc for you to accept or deal with
meanings.example: ‘This is intolerable!’ exclaimed Sir Rufus.
meanings.example_cn: “这真令人难以忍受！”鲁弗斯爵士喊道。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something go away, especially a belief, idea, or feeling
meanings.example: We want to dispel the myth that you cannot eat well in Britain.
meanings.example_cn: 我们要消除在英国吃不好的误解。

meanings.meaning_en: to lure, beguile, or entice
trickery, cunning, or craftiness

meanings.meaning_cn: 感情脆弱的；容易流泪的；酒后伤感的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone as maudlin, you mean that they are being sad and sentimental in a foolish way, perhaps because of drinking alcohol
meanings.example: Jimmy turned maudlin after three drinks.
meanings.example_cn: 三杯酒下肚后，吉米伤感起来。

meanings.example: ...maudlin self-pity.
meanings.example_cn: ...自艾自怜。

meanings.meaning_en: blame or disapproval
meanings.example: She greeted me with a look of cold reproof.
meanings.example_cn: 她对我报以冷淡、责备的目光。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发光体；杰出人物；知识渊博的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is very famous or highly respected for their skill at doing something or their knowledge of a particular subject
meanings.example: luminaries of Parisian society
meanings.example_cn: 巴黎社会的名流

meanings.meaning_en: many
meanings.example: Numerous attempts have been made to hide the truth.
meanings.example_cn: 为掩盖事实作了很多尝试。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being free from public attention
meanings.example: each individual’s right to privacy
meanings.example_cn: 每个人的隐私权

meanings.meaning_cn: 秘密的；偷偷摸摸的；促进分泌的
meanings.example: The government has been accused of being secretive and undemocratic.
meanings.example_cn: 该政府被指责政务不公开、缺乏民主。

meanings.meaning_cn: [电讯] 天线；[动] 触角，[昆] 触须
meanings.meaning_en: one of two long thin parts on an insect’s head, that it uses to feel things
meanings.example: television antennas
meanings.example_cn: 电视机天线

meanings.example: He should reconsider his decision to resign.
meanings.example_cn: 他应该重新考虑辞职的决定。

meanings.meaning_en: clever at getting what you want, especially by tricking people
